Here's what's in the first draft:

A blackletter masthead reading "The Party Times" with today's date and a "Vol. I, No. 1" line, a section nav (Front Page, Politics, Style, Gossip…), a lead article introducing the concept, and a submission card on the right with fields for Section, Headline, Summary, and Byline. Submitted headlines appear instantly in a three-column grid below, sorted newest first, with little "X min ago" timestamps. There are three seeded examples so it doesn't look empty on first load. Headlines persist in the browser via localStorage, so refreshing won't wipe submissions.

A few things worth deciding before the next pass:

The party name — right now it's literally "The Party Times." Want me to swap in the real name (e.g., "The Sebfest Times")?

Storage — submissions currently live only in each guest's own browser. For a real party where everyone sees the same wall of headlines, you'll want a shared backend (Firebase, Supabase, or a tiny serverless endpoint). I can wire one up if you tell me where it'll be hosted.

Display mode — do you want a separate "TV/projector" view that just cycles through headlines fullscreen for the room to see?

Moderation — should there be a quick approve/reject pass, or fully open?

Let me know and I'll iterate.

The section nav (Front Page, Politics, Style, etc.) is gone. The "Vol. I, No. 1" line is removed — the masthead now just shows "Monday, May 25" and the tagline. The Party Times

✦ ✦ ✦

content.text:
[View your site](computer:///Users/sebastian/Library/Application Support/Claude/local-agent-mode-sessions/89cbab50-0fb3-4368-941c-4a9db031e0ba/e9e996a0-ad85-4a19-8e56-fc4c6ccf761c/local_e947efda-5e19-4502-ab2b-d0a9b213d26c/outputs/index.html)

It now reads as an inside-page spread: an "A6 · The Party Times · Monday, May 25" folio runs across the top in a double-rule, then a big italic "Page Six" banner (with the "Six" in NYT-style red) and a gossipy deck below it. The headlines flow into four narrow newspaper columns separated by vertical rules, with the most recent submission as a slightly larger lead article (with a drop cap) in column one. The rest are stacked down the columns with hairline rules between them.

A few flourishes to make it feel like a real inside page: a subtle paper-grain texture, a couple of small bordered "Classified / Notice / Society / Almanac" boxes tucked into the columns, an "A6" page number repeated in the lower folio, and an Oswald sans-serif used sparingly for labels and bylines (the way newspapers use a condensed sans for furniture). The submit popup picked up the same "Page Six" treatment — the button now reads "+ Submit a Headline" and opens a card titled "File To Page Six."

The column count adapts: 4 columns on desktop, 2 on tablet, 1 on phone, and it re-flows on resize.

One note: because the storage key changed to `v2`, you'll see the new fuller set of seeded gossip items on first load. If you want the page to start empty for guests, say so and I'll strip the seed.

Below it is a "More Headlines" list where each story has a yellow or black graphic tile with a view-count badge in the corner. input.content:
Page Six
Monday, May 25 · Invite Only

You Are
The Headline.

Welcome to the Page 6 Party. This year, the gossip writes itself — because you write it. Submit your hottest, most scandalous, completely-fabricated-or-not-at-all headlines. The best ones will be read aloud, printed, and immortalized at the party.

Takes 30 seconds · Submissions are private

How It Works

  1. Hit the yellow Submit button — top right or bottom of the page.
  2. Write a headline. The juicier, sillier, or more dramatic, the better.
  3. Add your byline so we know who broke the story.
  4. Send to press. The best headlines get the spotlight on May 25.
Deadline · May 25, 6 PM Submissions · Unlimited
Gossip✦ Sighted✦ Scandal✦ Style✦ Overheard✦ Power Couples✦ Exclusives

SAMPLE What A Headline Looks Like

Breaking

Sandals With Socks Sweep The Floor; Crowd Stunned

A bold sartorial choice has divided the dancefloor into believers and skeptics. By the second chorus, the skeptics had quietly converted.

By A Concerned Onlooker
♥38,204
Gossip

Mystery Kitchen Romance Stuns Cheese Plate Witnesses

Sources close to the brie report prolonged eye contact and at least one shared cracker.

By Our Hallway Correspondent
!52,910
Politics

Aux Cord Coup In Progress; DJ Cries Foul

A peaceful transition of power is, as of press time, not assured. Negotiations now hinge on a single Robyn track.

By The Living Room Bureau
✦27,341
Style

Two-Fisted Drinking Officially Declared "A Look"

Fashion editors stunned. "It just makes sense," said one early adopter, gesturing with both.

By The Fashion Desk
◉61,005
Sighted

Plus-One Arrives With Three Bottles, Is Immediately Adored

Identity still being verified. The wine, however, has been authenticated and consumed.

By A Doorway Source
✖44,872
Scandal

Cake Cut At Improper Angle; Etiquette Columnist "Resting"

The breach occurred at 10:47 PM. A second slice has since stabilized the situation.

By The Dessert Desk

Got A Scoop? File It Now.

The party's whole point is the headlines you write. Don't let anyone else get the byline on a story you saw first.

Trending Now

Sample Headlines
"29,118
"I'm Not Drunk, I'm Just Very Into This Song" — Anonymous
By The Couch Bureau
☂14,602
Forecast: Lightly Sweating With A Chance Of Karaoke After 11 PM
By Atmospheric Desk
★71,250
Guest Of Honor Spotted In Three Different Outfits Before 10 PM
By Front-Door Bureau
⚡19,887
Power Outage Lasts Six Seconds; Group Chat Generates 400 Theories
By Tech Desk
The Page 6 Party · May 25 · All The News That Fits, We Print

File a Tip

A scoop is a terrible thing to waste. Submissions stay private until the party.

content.text:
[View your site](computer:///Users/sebastian/Library/Application Support/Claude/local-agent-mode-sessions/89cbab50-0fb3-4368-941c-4a9db031e0ba/e9e996a0-ad85-4a19-8e56-fc4c6ccf761c/local_e947efda-5e19-4502-ab2b-d0a9b213d26c/outputs/index.html)

Restructured around a clear call to action:

The very first thing visitors see below the Page Six masthead is a big black hero with "**You Are The Headline.**" in the Bevan slab serif, copy explaining what the Page 6 Party on May 25 is about, and a chunky yellow **Submit Your Headline** button. To its right is a numbered "How It Works" card (1. Hit Submit, 2. Write a headline, 3. Add your byline, 4. Send to press) with a deadline and submission count callout, so anyone landing on the page understands what to do within a few seconds.

The "Submit a Tip" button in the top-right of the black nav bar now glows yellow as a second always-visible entry point, and the floating bottom-right "+ Submit Your Headline" button is still there too. There's also a sidebar "TIPS WANTED" black card pushing the same CTA — four different doorways to the form on the page.

The sample headlines below are now static and clearly labeled "SAMPLE · What A Headline Looks Like" so guests understand the displayed stories are examples, not other people's submissions.

After submitting, the popup flips to a "Filed · Off The Record" thank-you state — submissions never appear publicly. They're stored privately in localStorage on the submitter's device.

**Important caveat about collecting tips:** since this is a static HTML file with no backend, each submission stays in *that guest's own browser* (not yours). For a real party deployment you'll want one of:

1. **Formspree / Tally / Google Forms** — swap the form action to post to one of these and every submission lands in your inbox. I can wire this up in 30 seconds if you give me an endpoint.
2. **Firebase / Supabase** — slightly more work but stores everything in a real database you control.

For now, if you (the host) open the site in a browser and run `showTips()` in the developer console, you'll see whatever was submitted on *that* device — useful for testing, not for the actual party.

Want me to wire it up to Formspree or a Google Form?

content.text:
There are two things to get sorted to go truly live: **hosting** (so the site has a URL) and **submission collection** (so the headlines actually reach you, not just the guest's browser). Let me wire up the second one, then give you a deploy path.

I'll add Formsubmit as the submission backend — it's free, no account needed, just routes submissions to your email.

content.text:
Got it. Best fit for "real backend with admin login" is Supabase — it gives you a Postgres table, an auth flow (magic-link to your email), and works with a static HTML file. I'll wire it up: submissions go into a `tips` table, and an `/#admin` route on the site lets you sign in with a one-time email link to see them all.

Let me make the changes.

tool_use_result.originalFile:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
<title>The Page 6 Party · May 25</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Anton&family=Oswald:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,700;0,900;1,700;1,900&family=Bevan&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700;800;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@supabase/supabase-js@2"></script>
<style>
  :root {
    --black: #0a0a0a;
    --yellow: #f5d800;
    --ink: #111;
    --muted: #666;
    --line: #e6e6e6;
    --bg: #ffffff;
  }
  * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

  body {
    font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--ink);
    line-height: 1.4;
    padding-bottom: 80px;
  }

  /* ---------- Top black header ---------- */
  .top-header {
    background: var(--black);
    color: #fff;
    padding: 14px 24px;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr auto 1fr;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 16px;
  }
  .top-header .left,
  .top-header .right {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 14px;
  }
  .top-header .right { justify-content: flex-end; }

  .nav-btn {
    border: 1.5px solid #fff;
    background: transparent;
    color: #fff;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 13px;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    padding: 8px 14px;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    cursor: pointer;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }
  .nav-btn:hover { background: #fff; color: var(--black); }
  .nav-btn.cta { background: var(--yellow); color: var(--black); border-color: var(--yellow); }
  .nav-btn.cta:hover { background: #fff; border-color: #fff; }

  .icon-btn {
    background: transparent;
    border: none;
    color: #fff;
    cursor: pointer;
    padding: 6px;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
  }
  .icon-btn:hover { color: var(--yellow); }
  .icon-btn svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; }

  .logo {
    font-family: 'Bevan', 'Bookman Old Style', serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-style: normal;
    font-size: clamp(34px, 5vw, 58px);
    line-height: 1;
    color: #fff;
    letter-spacing: 0;
    white-space: nowrap;
    text-transform: none;
  }

  /* Yellow strip */
  .yellow-strip {
    background: var(--yellow);
    height: 8px;
  }

  /* ---------- THE BIG SUBMIT HERO ---------- */
  .submit-hero {
    background: var(--black);
    color: #fff;
    padding: 56px 24px 64px 24px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    border-bottom: 8px solid var(--yellow);
  }
  .submit-hero .inner {
    max-width: 1100px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1.4fr 1fr;
    gap: 56px;
    align-items: center;
  }
  .submit-hero .eyebrow {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 13px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 4px;
    color: var(--yellow);
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
    display: inline-block;
    border-bottom: 3px solid var(--yellow);
    padding-bottom: 4px;
  }
  .submit-hero h1 {
    font-family: 'Bevan', 'Bookman Old Style', serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: clamp(44px, 6.5vw, 84px);
    line-height: 0.95;
    margin-bottom: 18px;
    color: #fff;
    letter-spacing: -0.5px;
  }
  .submit-hero h1 .accent { color: var(--yellow); }
  .submit-hero .deck {
    font-size: 19px;
    line-height: 1.5;
    color: #e8e8e8;
    margin-bottom: 22px;
    max-width: 560px;
  }
  .submit-hero .deck strong { color: #fff; }

  .submit-hero .cta-row {
    display: flex;
    gap: 14px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    align-items: center;
  }
  .submit-hero .big-btn {
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    border: 3px solid var(--yellow);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 17px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    padding: 18px 28px;
    cursor: pointer;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    transition: transform 0.15s, background 0.15s;
  }
  .submit-hero .big-btn:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); background: #fff; border-color: #fff; }
  .submit-hero .big-btn .arrow { font-size: 22px; line-height: 0; }
  .submit-hero .note {
    color: #aaa;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
  }

  /* The "how-it-works" card */
  .how-card {
    background: #fff;
    color: var(--ink);
    padding: 26px 24px 22px 24px;
    position: relative;
    border-top: 6px solid var(--yellow);
  }
  .how-card::before {
    content: 'EXCLUSIVE';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 24px;
    transform: translateY(-50%);
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 12px;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    padding: 6px 12px;
  }
  .how-card h3 {
    font-family: 'Bevan', serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: 28px;
    line-height: 1.05;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    color: var(--ink);
  }
  .how-card ol {
    list-style: none;
    counter-reset: step;
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
  }
  .how-card ol li {
    counter-increment: step;
    padding: 10px 0 10px 42px;
    position: relative;
    font-size: 15px;
    line-height: 1.4;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .how-card ol li:first-child { border-top: none; padding-top: 6px; }
  .how-card ol li::before {
    content: counter(step);
    position: absolute;
    left: 0;
    top: 10px;
    width: 28px;
    height: 28px;
    background: var(--black);
    color: var(--yellow);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 14px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
  }
  .how-card .meta {
    margin-top: 14px;
    padding-top: 14px;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--line);
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    gap: 14px;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 12px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    color: var(--muted);
  }
  .how-card .meta strong { color: var(--ink); }

  /* ---------- Marquee of section labels ---------- */
  .label-strip {
    background: #fffbe0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
    padding: 12px 24px;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #333;
    text-align: center;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .label-strip span { margin: 0 14px; color: var(--ink); font-weight: 600; }
  .label-strip .dot { color: var(--yellow); font-weight: 900; }

  /* ---------- Sample headlines ---------- */
  .page {
    max-width: 1280px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 36px 24px 24px 24px;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 2fr) minmax(280px, 1fr);
    gap: 40px;
  }

  .hero { min-width: 0; }
  .section-title {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    font-size: 14px;
    border-top: 3px solid var(--black);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--black);
    padding: 8px 0;
    margin-bottom: 22px;
    color: var(--black);
  }
  .section-title .tag {
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    padding: 2px 8px;
    margin-right: 8px;
    font-size: 11px;
  }

  /* Lead story */
  .lead-story {
    margin-bottom: 36px;
    padding-bottom: 28px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .lead-story .kicker {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 13px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    color: var(--black);
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
    display: inline-block;
    border-bottom: 3px solid var(--yellow);
    padding-bottom: 2px;
  }
  .lead-story h2 {
    font-family: 'Anton', 'Oswald', Impact, sans-serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: clamp(46px, 6.5vw, 88px);
    line-height: 0.95;
    letter-spacing: -1px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }
  .lead-story .deck {
    font-size: 18px;
    font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 1.4;
    color: #222;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    max-width: 680px;
  }
  .lead-story .byline {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 12px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    color: var(--muted);
  }

  /* Story cards */
  .story-card {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 110px 1fr;
    gap: 18px;
    padding: 18px 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .story-card:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  .story-card .badge {
    width: 100%;
    aspect-ratio: 1 / 1;
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-family: 'Anton', sans-serif;
    font-size: 36px;
    line-height: 1;
    position: relative;
  }
  .story-card:nth-child(odd) .badge { background: var(--black); color: var(--yellow); }
  .story-card .badge .num {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 6px;
    right: 6px;
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    padding: 2px 5px;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  }
  .story-card:nth-child(odd) .badge .num { background: var(--yellow); color: var(--black); }
  .story-card .body { min-width: 0; }
  .story-card .body .kicker {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 11px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    color: #b8000d;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 4px;
  }
  .story-card .body h4 {
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 800;
    font-size: 20px;
    line-height: 1.15;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
  }
  .story-card .body p {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #333;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    line-height: 1.4;
  }
  .story-card .body .byline {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 11px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    color: var(--muted);
  }

  /* Sidebar */
  .sidebar { min-width: 0; }
  .sidebar-cta {
    background: var(--black);
    color: #fff;
    padding: 22px 20px;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
    border-bottom: 5px solid var(--yellow);
    position: relative;
  }
  .sidebar-cta::before {
    content: 'TIPS WANTED';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 20px;
    transform: translateY(-50%);
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    padding: 5px 10px;
  }
  .sidebar-cta h4 {
    font-family: 'Bevan', serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: 22px;
    line-height: 1.1;
    margin: 8px 0 10px 0;
    color: #fff;
  }
  .sidebar-cta p {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #ddd;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
    line-height: 1.4;
  }
  .sidebar-cta button {
    width: 100%;
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    border: none;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 13px;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    padding: 11px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    cursor: pointer;
  }
  .sidebar-cta button:hover { background: #fff; }

  .trending h3 {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    font-size: 18px;
    margin-bottom: 2px;
  }
  .trending .sub {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 12px;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    color: var(--muted);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    border-bottom: 3px solid var(--yellow);
    padding-bottom: 8px;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
    display: inline-block;
  }
  .trending-item {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 90px 1fr;
    gap: 12px;
    padding: 12px 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .trending-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  .trending-item .thumb {
    width: 90px;
    height: 90px;
    background: var(--black);
    color: var(--yellow);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-family: 'Anton', sans-serif;
    font-size: 32px;
    position: relative;
  }
  .trending-item:nth-child(even) .thumb { background: var(--yellow); color: var(--black); }
  .trending-item .thumb .views {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 6px;
    right: 6px;
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 10px;
    padding: 2px 5px;
  }
  .trending-item:nth-child(even) .thumb .views { background: var(--black); color: var(--yellow); }
  .trending-item h5 {
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 14px;
    line-height: 1.3;
  }
  .trending-item .byline {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 10px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    color: var(--muted);
    margin-top: 4px;
  }

  /* ---------- Footer ---------- */
  footer {
    background: var(--black);
    color: #aaa;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 24px;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 11px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    margin-top: 40px;
  }
  footer .yellow { color: var(--yellow); }

  /* ---------- Floating submit popup ---------- */
  .submit-toggle {
    position: fixed;
    bottom: 24px;
    right: 24px;
    z-index: 50;
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    border: 2px solid var(--black);
    padding: 14px 22px;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 13px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    cursor: pointer;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
    transition: transform 0.2s, background 0.2s;
  }
  .submit-toggle:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); background: #fff; }
  .submit-toggle .plus { margin-right: 6px; }

  .submit-popup {
    position: fixed;
    bottom: 24px;
    right: 24px;
    width: 400px;
    max-width: calc(100vw - 48px);
    background: #fff;
    border: 2px solid var(--black);
    box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
    z-index: 60;
    padding: 0;
    display: none;
    animation: popIn 0.2s ease-out;
  }
  .submit-popup.open { display: block; }
  @keyframes popIn {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(10px); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }
  .submit-popup .popup-header {
    background: var(--black);
    color: #fff;
    padding: 14px 18px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    border-bottom: 4px solid var(--yellow);
  }
  .submit-popup .popup-header h3 {
    font-family: 'Bevan', serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: 20px;
    margin: 0;
    color: #fff;
  }
  .submit-popup .close {
    background: transparent;
    border: none;
    color: #fff;
    font-size: 24px;
    cursor: pointer;
    line-height: 1;
  }
  .submit-popup .close:hover { color: var(--yellow); }
  .submit-popup .popup-body { padding: 18px 18px 20px 18px; }
  .submit-popup .intro {
    font-size: 13px;
    color: #333;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    font-style: italic;
  }
  .submit-popup label {
    display: block;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 10px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    color: var(--muted);
    margin-bottom: 4px;
    margin-top: 10px;
    font-weight: 600;
  }
  .submit-popup input[type="text"],
  .submit-popup textarea {
    width: 100%;
    border: 1.5px solid var(--black);
    background: #fff;
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-size: 14px;
    padding: 8px 10px;
    outline: none;
    color: var(--ink);
  }
  .submit-popup textarea { resize: vertical; min-height: 60px; }
  .submit-popup input[type="text"]:focus,
  .submit-popup textarea:focus { border-color: #b8000d; }
  .submit-popup button.send {
    margin-top: 16px;
    width: 100%;
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    border: 2px solid var(--black);
    padding: 12px 16px;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 13px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    cursor: pointer;
  }
  .submit-popup button.send:hover { background: var(--black); color: var(--yellow); }

  /* Thank-you state inside popup */
  .thanks {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 20px 4px 8px 4px;
  }
  .thanks .stamp {
    display: inline-block;
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    padding: 8px 16px;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    font-size: 12px;
    transform: rotate(-3deg);
    margin-bottom: 14px;
    border: 2px solid var(--black);
  }
  .thanks h4 {
    font-family: 'Bevan', serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: 26px;
    line-height: 1.1;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
  }
  .thanks p {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #333;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
    line-height: 1.4;
  }
  .thanks .again {
    background: transparent;
    border: 1.5px solid var(--black);
    color: var(--black);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 12px;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    padding: 10px 16px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    cursor: pointer;
  }
  .thanks .again:hover { background: var(--black); color: var(--yellow); }

  /* ---------- Responsive ---------- */
  @media (max-width: 980px) {
    .submit-hero .inner { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 32px; }
    .page { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 24px; }
    .top-header { grid-template-columns: auto 1fr auto; gap: 8px; }
    .top-header .left .nav-btn { display: none; }
  }
  @media (max-width: 560px) {
    .submit-popup { width: calc(100vw - 32px); right: 16px; bottom: 16px; }
    .submit-toggle { right: 16px; bottom: 16px; }
    .lead-story h2 { font-size: 40px; }
    .story-card { grid-template-columns: 80px 1fr; }
  }

  /* ---------- Admin overlay ---------- */
  .admin-overlay {
    display: none;
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    background: #f3f3f3;
    z-index: 100;
    overflow-y: auto;
  }
  .admin-overlay.open { display: block; }
  .admin-wrap { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 24px 60px; }
  .admin-header {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    background: var(--black);
    color: #fff;
    padding: 16px 24px;
    margin: 0 -24px 24px -24px;
    border-bottom: 6px solid var(--yellow);
  }
  .admin-header h2 {
    font-family: 'Bevan', serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: 28px;
    color: #fff;
  }
  .admin-close {
    background: transparent;
    border: 1.5px solid #fff;
    color: #fff;
    width: 36px; height: 36px;
    font-size: 22px;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-family: serif;
    line-height: 1;
  }
  .admin-close:hover { background: var(--yellow); color: var(--black); border-color: var(--yellow); }
  .admin-section {
    background: #fff;
    padding: 28px;
    border: 1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .admin-section p { font-size: 15px; color: #333; margin-bottom: 14px; line-height: 1.5; }
  .admin-section label {
    display: block;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 11px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    color: var(--muted);
    margin-bottom: 4px;
  }
  .admin-section input[type="email"] {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 360px;
    border: 1.5px solid var(--black);
    background: #fff;
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-size: 15px;
    padding: 10px 12px;
    outline: none;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
  }
  .admin-section input[type="email"]:focus { border-color: #b8000d; }
  .admin-btn {
    display: inline-block;
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    border: 2px solid var(--black);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 13px;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    padding: 11px 18px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    cursor: pointer;
  }
  .admin-btn:hover { background: var(--black); color: var(--yellow); }
  .admin-btn-sm {
    background: #fff;
    color: var(--black);
    border: 1.5px solid var(--black);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    padding: 6px 12px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    cursor: pointer;
  }
  .admin-btn-sm:hover { background: var(--black); color: var(--yellow); }
  .admin-note { font-size: 13px; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 12px; line-height: 1.5; }
  .admin-note.ok { color: #1a7a1a; }
  .admin-note.err { color: #b8000d; }
  .admin-toolbar {
    display: flex;
    gap: 10px;
    align-items: center;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    padding-bottom: 14px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
    margin-bottom: 18px;
  }
  .admin-toolbar #admin-user-label {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 12px;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    color: var(--muted);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-right: auto;
  }
  .admin-stats {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 13px;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
    color: var(--ink);
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }
  .admin-stats strong { color: #b8000d; }
  .admin-table-wrap { overflow-x: auto; }
  .admin-table {
    width: 100%;
    border-collapse: collapse;
    font-size: 14px;
  }
  .admin-table th {
    background: var(--black);
    color: var(--yellow);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    font-size: 11px;
    padding: 10px 12px;
    text-align: left;
  }
  .admin-table td {
    padding: 12px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
    vertical-align: top;
    line-height: 1.4;
  }
  .admin-table tr:hover td { background: #fffce6; }
  .admin-table td:nth-child(1) { white-space: nowrap; color: var(--muted); font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; }
  .admin-table td:nth-child(2) { color: #b8000d; font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase; white-space: nowrap; }
  .admin-table td:nth-child(3) { font-weight: 700; min-width: 240px; }
  .admin-table td:nth-child(5) { white-space: nowrap; color: var(--muted); font-size: 12px; }
  .admin-link { color: var(--yellow); text-decoration: none; margin-left: 8px; opacity: 0.6; }
  .admin-link:hover { opacity: 1; text-decoration: underline; }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- Top black header -->
<header class="top-header">
  <div class="left">
    <button class="nav-btn" aria-label="Sections">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" width="14" height="14"><line x1="3" y1="6" x2="21" y2="6"/><line x1="3" y1="12" x2="21" y2="12"/><line x1="3" y1="18" x2="21" y2="18"/></svg>
      Sections
    </button>
    <button class="icon-btn" aria-label="Search">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="7"/><line x1="21" y1="21" x2="16.65" y2="16.65"/></svg>
    </button>
    <button class="icon-btn" aria-label="Newsletter">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="3" y="5" width="18" height="14" rx="0"/><polyline points="3,7 12,13 21,7"/></svg>
    </button>
  </div>

  <div class="logo">Page Six</div>

  <div class="right">
    <button class="nav-btn cta" id="submit-toggle-top">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" width="14" height="14"><path d="M12 5v14M5 12h14"/></svg>
      Submit a Tip
    </button>
    <button class="nav-btn">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" width="14" height="14"><path d="M20 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-4-4H8a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v2"/><circle cx="12" cy="7" r="4"/></svg>
      Log In
    </button>
  </div>
</header>

<div class="yellow-strip"></div>

<!-- THE BIG SUBMIT HERO -->
<section class="submit-hero">
  <div class="inner">
    <div>
      <div class="eyebrow">Monday, May 25 · Invite Only</div>
      <h1>You Are<br>The <span class="accent">Headline.</span></h1>
      <p class="deck">
        Welcome to the <strong>Page 6 Party</strong>. This year, the gossip writes itself — because <strong>you write it.</strong>
        Submit your hottest, most scandalous, completely-fabricated-or-not-at-all headlines.
        The best ones will be read aloud, printed, and immortalized at the party.
      </p>
      <div class="cta-row">
        <button class="big-btn" id="hero-submit-btn">
          Submit Your Headline <span class="arrow">›</span>
        </button>
        <span class="note">Takes 30 seconds · Submissions are private</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <aside class="how-card">
      <h3>How It Works</h3>
      <ol>
        <li>Hit the yellow <strong>Submit</strong> button — top right or bottom of the page.</li>
        <li>Write a headline. The juicier, sillier, or more dramatic, the better.</li>
        <li>Add your byline so we know who broke the story — or stay anonymous if you want.</li>
        <li>Send to press. The best headlines get the spotlight on <strong>May 25</strong>.</li>
      </ol>
      <div class="meta">
        <span>Deadline · <strong>May 25, 6 PM</strong></span>
        <span>Submissions · <strong>Unlimited</strong></span>
      </div>
    </aside>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Label strip -->
<div class="label-strip">
  <span>Gossip</span><span class="dot">✦</span>
  <span>Sighted</span><span class="dot">✦</span>
  <span>Scandal</span><span class="dot">✦</span>
  <span>Style</span><span class="dot">✦</span>
  <span>Overheard</span><span class="dot">✦</span>
  <span>Power Couples</span><span class="dot">✦</span>
  <span>Exclusives</span>
</div>

<!-- Sample headlines (static / decorative) -->
<main class="page">
  <section class="hero">
    <h3 class="section-title"><span class="tag">SAMPLE</span> What A Headline Looks Like</h3>

    <article class="lead-story">
      <div class="kicker">Breaking</div>
      <h2>Sandals With Socks Sweep The Floor; Crowd Stunned</h2>
      <p class="deck">A bold sartorial choice has divided the dancefloor into believers and skeptics. By the second chorus, the skeptics had quietly converted.</p>
      <div class="byline">By A Concerned Onlooker</div>
    </article>

    <article class="story-card">
      <div class="badge">♥<span class="num">38,204</span></div>
      <div class="body">
        <div class="kicker">Gossip</div>
        <h4>Mystery Kitchen Romance Stuns Cheese Plate Witnesses</h4>
        <p>Sources close to the brie report prolonged eye contact and at least one shared cracker.</p>
        <div class="byline">By Our Hallway Correspondent</div>
      </div>
    </article>

    <article class="story-card">
      <div class="badge">!<span class="num">52,910</span></div>
      <div class="body">
        <div class="kicker">Politics</div>
        <h4>Aux Cord Coup In Progress; DJ Cries Foul</h4>
        <p>A peaceful transition of power is, as of press time, not assured. Negotiations now hinge on a single Robyn track.</p>
        <div class="byline">By The Living Room Bureau</div>
      </div>
    </article>

    <article class="story-card">
      <div class="badge">✦<span class="num">27,341</span></div>
      <div class="body">
        <div class="kicker">Style</div>
        <h4>Two-Fisted Drinking Officially Declared "A Look"</h4>
        <p>Fashion editors stunned. "It just makes sense," said one early adopter, gesturing with both.</p>
        <div class="byline">By The Fashion Desk</div>
      </div>
    </article>

    <article class="story-card">
      <div class="badge">◉<span class="num">61,005</span></div>
      <div class="body">
        <div class="kicker">Sighted</div>
        <h4>Plus-One Arrives With Three Bottles, Is Immediately Adored</h4>
        <p>Identity still being verified. The wine, however, has been authenticated and consumed.</p>
        <div class="byline">By A Doorway Source</div>
      </div>
    </article>

    <article class="story-card">
      <div class="badge">✖<span class="num">44,872</span></div>
      <div class="body">
        <div class="kicker">Scandal</div>
        <h4>Cake Cut At Improper Angle; Etiquette Columnist "Resting"</h4>
        <p>The breach occurred at 10:47 PM. A second slice has since stabilized the situation.</p>
        <div class="byline">By The Dessert Desk</div>
      </div>
    </article>
  </section>

  <aside class="sidebar">
    <div class="sidebar-cta">
      <h4>Got A Scoop? File It Now.</h4>
      <p>The party's whole point is the headlines you write. Don't let anyone else get the byline on a story you saw first.</p>
      <button id="sidebar-submit-btn">Submit Your Headline</button>
    </div>

    <div class="trending">
      <h3>Trending Now</h3>
      <div class="sub">Sample Headlines</div>

      <div class="trending-item">
        <div class="thumb">"<span class="views">29,118</span></div>
        <div>
          <h5>"I'm Not Drunk, I'm Just Very Into This Song" — Anonymous</h5>
          <div class="byline">By The Couch Bureau</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="trending-item">
        <div class="thumb">☂<span class="views">14,602</span></div>
        <div>
          <h5>Forecast: Lightly Sweating With A Chance Of Karaoke After 11 PM</h5>
          <div class="byline">By Atmospheric Desk</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="trending-item">
        <div class="thumb">★<span class="views">71,250</span></div>
        <div>
          <h5>Guest Of Honor Spotted In Three Different Outfits Before 10 PM</h5>
          <div class="byline">By Front-Door Bureau</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="trending-item">
        <div class="thumb">⚡<span class="views">19,887</span></div>
        <div>
          <h5>Power Outage Lasts Six Seconds; Group Chat Generates 400 Theories</h5>
          <div class="byline">By Tech Desk</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </aside>
</main>

<footer>The Page 6 Party · <span class="yellow">May 25</span> · All The News That Fits, We Print</footer>

<!-- Floating submit toggle -->
<button class="submit-toggle" id="submit-toggle" aria-label="Submit a headline">
  <span class="plus">+</span> Submit Your Headline
</button>

<!-- Floating submit popup -->
<aside class="submit-popup" id="submit-popup" role="dialog" aria-labelledby="popup-title">
  <div class="popup-header">
    <h3 id="popup-title">File a Tip</h3>
    <button class="close" id="popup-close" aria-label="Close">×</button>
  </div>
  <div class="popup-body" id="popup-body">
    <p class="intro">A scoop is a terrible thing to waste. Submissions stay private until the party.</p>
    <form id="headline-form" autocomplete="off">
      <label for="kicker">Section</label>
      <input type="text" id="kicker" placeholder="e.g. Gossip, Style, Scandal" maxlength="40" />

      <label for="headline">Headline*</label>
      <input type="text" id="headline" placeholder="Write a snappy headline…" maxlength="140" required />

      <label for="summary">Summary (optional)</label>
      <textarea id="summary" placeholder="A sentence or two of context…" maxlength="280"></textarea>

      <label for="byline">Your Byline*</label>
      <input type="text" id="byline" placeholder="By Jane Doe" maxlength="60" required />

      <button type="submit" class="send">Send To Press</button>
    </form>
  </div>
</aside>

<script>
  // -----------------------------------------------------------------
  // CONFIG — change this email to wherever submissions should land.
  // First submission to a new address triggers a confirmation email
  // from Formsubmit (one-time, click the link to activate).
  // To hide your email from the page source, register at
  // https://formsubmit.co and replace this with the random hash they give you.
  // -----------------------------------------------------------------
  const FORMSUBMIT_TARGET = 'sebastian.r.buck@gmail.com';

  const form = document.getElementById('headline-form');
  const popup = document.getElementById('submit-popup');
  const popupBody = document.getElementById('popup-body');
  const toggle = document.getElementById('submit-toggle');
  const closeBtn = document.getElementById('popup-close');
  const STORAGE_KEY = 'partyTimes.tips.v1';

  // All the buttons that should open the submission popup
  const openers = [
    document.getElementById('submit-toggle'),
    document.getElementById('submit-toggle-top'),
    document.getElementById('hero-submit-btn'),
    document.getElementById('sidebar-submit-btn')
  ];

  function openPopup() {
    popup.classList.add('open');
    toggle.style.display = 'none';
    // reset to form view in case it was thanked
    restoreForm();
    setTimeout(() => document.getElementById('headline').focus(), 50);
  }
  function closePopup() {
    popup.classList.remove('open');
    toggle.style.display = '';
  }

  openers.forEach(b => b && b.addEventListener('click', openPopup));
  closeBtn.addEventListener('click', closePopup);
  document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
    if (e.key === 'Escape' && popup.classList.contains('open')) closePopup();
  });

  // Save submission silently — does NOT appear on the page.
  // The host can retrieve these later from localStorage,
  // or by typing showTips() in the browser console.
  function saveTip(item) {
    let arr = [];
    try {
      const raw = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
      if (raw) arr = JSON.parse(raw);
    } catch (e) {}
    arr.push(item);
    try { localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(arr)); } catch (e) {}
  }

  // Send the tip to the host's inbox via Formsubmit (no backend needed).
  async function emailTip(item) {
    try {
      const res = await fetch('https://formsubmit.co/ajax/' + FORMSUBMIT_TARGET, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
          'Accept': 'application/json'
        },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          _subject: 'Page 6 Tip: ' + item.headline.slice(0, 80),
          _template: 'box',
          _captcha: 'false',
          Section: item.kicker || '(none)',
          Headline: item.headline,
          Summary: item.summary || '(none)',
          Byline: item.byline,
          Submitted: new Date(item.ts).toLocaleString()
        })
      });
      return res.ok;
    } catch (e) {
      return false;
    }
  }

  function showThanks() {
    popupBody.innerHTML = `
      <div class="thanks">
        <div class="stamp">Filed · Off The Record</div>
        <h4>Thanks for the tip.</h4>
        <p>Your headline is locked in the vault until the party on <strong>May 25</strong>.<br>The juiciest ones get read aloud.</p>
        <button class="again" id="submit-again">Submit Another</button>
      </div>
    `;
    document.getElementById('submit-again').addEventListener('click', restoreForm);
    setTimeout(() => {
      // Auto-close after a few seconds
      if (popup.classList.contains('open')) {
        // Keep open so they can submit another — do nothing on auto-close
      }
    }, 4000);
  }

  function restoreForm() {
    popupBody.innerHTML = `
      <p class="intro">A scoop is a terrible thing to waste. Submissions stay private until the party.</p>
      <form id="headline-form" autocomplete="off">
        <label for="kicker">Section</label>
        <input type="text" id="kicker" placeholder="e.g. Gossip, Style, Scandal" maxlength="40" />

        <label for="headline">Headline*</label>
        <input type="text" id="headline" placeholder="Write a snappy headline…" maxlength="140" required />

        <label for="summary">Summary (optional)</label>
        <textarea id="summary" placeholder="A sentence or two of context…" maxlength="280"></textarea>

        <label for="byline">Your Byline <span style="text-transform:none; letter-spacing:0; color:#999;">(optional — leave blank to stay anonymous)</span></label>
        <input type="text" id="byline" placeholder="By Jane Doe" maxlength="60" />

        <button type="submit" class="send">Send To Press</button>
      </form>
    `;
    bindForm();
  }

  function bindForm() {
    const f = document.getElementById('headline-form');
    if (!f) return;
    f.addEventListener('submit', (e) => {
      e.preventDefault();
      const headline = document.getElementById('headline').value.trim();
      let byline = document.getElementById('byline').value.trim();
      if (!headline) return;
      if (!byline) {
        byline = 'By Anonymous';
      } else if (!byline.toLowerCase().startsWith('by ')) {
        byline = 'By ' + byline;
      }
      const item = {
        kicker: document.getElementById('kicker').value.trim(),
        headline,
        summary: document.getElementById('summary').value.trim(),
        byline,
        ts: Date.now()
      };
      saveTip(item);
      showThanks();
    });
  }

  bindForm();

  // Host-only helper — open the browser console and run showTips()
  // to see every submission collected on this device.
  window.showTips = function () {
    try {
      const raw = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
      const arr = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : [];
      console.log('%cPage 6 — Submitted Tips (' + arr.length + ')', 'font-weight:bold; color:#f5d800; background:#000; padding:4px 8px;');
      console.table(arr.map(t => ({
        when: new Date(t.ts).toLocaleString(),
        section: t.kicker,
        headline: t.headline,
        summary: t.summary,
        byline: t.byline
      })));
      return arr;
    } catch (e) {
      console.error(e);
      return [];
    }
  };
  console.log('%cPage 6 host: type showTips() to see submissions.', 'color:#666');
</script>
</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
<title>The Page 6 Party · May 25</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Anton&family=Oswald:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,700;0,900;1,700;1,900&family=Bevan&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700;800;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@supabase/supabase-js@2"></script>
<style>
  :root {
    --black: #0a0a0a;
    --yellow: #f5d800;
    --ink: #111;
    --muted: #666;
    --line: #e6e6e6;
    --bg: #ffffff;
  }
  * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

  body {
    font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--ink);
    line-height: 1.4;
    padding-bottom: 80px;
  }

  /* ---------- Top black header ---------- */
  .top-header {
    background: var(--black);
    color: #fff;
    padding: 14px 24px;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr auto 1fr;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 16px;
  }
  .top-header .left,
  .top-header .right {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 14px;
  }
  .top-header .right { justify-content: flex-end; }

  .nav-btn {
    border: 1.5px solid #fff;
    background: transparent;
    color: #fff;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 13px;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    padding: 8px 14px;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    cursor: pointer;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }
  .nav-btn:hover { background: #fff; color: var(--black); }
  .nav-btn.cta { background: var(--yellow); color: var(--black); border-color: var(--yellow); }
  .nav-btn.cta:hover { background: #fff; border-color: #fff; }

  .icon-btn {
    background: transparent;
    border: none;
    color: #fff;
    cursor: pointer;
    padding: 6px;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
  }
  .icon-btn:hover { color: var(--yellow); }
  .icon-btn svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; }

  .logo {
    font-family: 'Bevan', 'Bookman Old Style', serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-style: normal;
    font-size: clamp(34px, 5vw, 58px);
    line-height: 1;
    color: #fff;
    letter-spacing: 0;
    white-space: nowrap;
    text-transform: none;
  }

  /* Yellow strip */
  .yellow-strip {
    background: var(--yellow);
    height: 8px;
  }

  /* ---------- THE BIG SUBMIT HERO ---------- */
  .submit-hero {
    background: var(--black);
    color: #fff;
    padding: 56px 24px 64px 24px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    border-bottom: 8px solid var(--yellow);
  }
  .submit-hero .inner {
    max-width: 1100px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1.4fr 1fr;
    gap: 56px;
    align-items: center;
  }
  .submit-hero .eyebrow {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 13px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 4px;
    color: var(--yellow);
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
    display: inline-block;
    border-bottom: 3px solid var(--yellow);
    padding-bottom: 4px;
  }
  .submit-hero h1 {
    font-family: 'Bevan', 'Bookman Old Style', serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: clamp(44px, 6.5vw, 84px);
    line-height: 0.95;
    margin-bottom: 18px;
    color: #fff;
    letter-spacing: -0.5px;
  }
  .submit-hero h1 .accent { color: var(--yellow); }
  .submit-hero .deck {
    font-size: 19px;
    line-height: 1.5;
    color: #e8e8e8;
    margin-bottom: 22px;
    max-width: 560px;
  }
  .submit-hero .deck strong { color: #fff; }

  .submit-hero .cta-row {
    display: flex;
    gap: 14px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    align-items: center;
  }
  .submit-hero .big-btn {
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    border: 3px solid var(--yellow);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 17px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    padding: 18px 28px;
    cursor: pointer;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    transition: transform 0.15s, background 0.15s;
  }
  .submit-hero .big-btn:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); background: #fff; border-color: #fff; }
  .submit-hero .big-btn .arrow { font-size: 22px; line-height: 0; }
  .submit-hero .note {
    color: #aaa;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
  }

  /* The "how-it-works" card */
  .how-card {
    background: #fff;
    color: var(--ink);
    padding: 26px 24px 22px 24px;
    position: relative;
    border-top: 6px solid var(--yellow);
  }
  .how-card::before {
    content: 'EXCLUSIVE';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 24px;
    transform: translateY(-50%);
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 12px;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    padding: 6px 12px;
  }
  .how-card h3 {
    font-family: 'Bevan', serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: 28px;
    line-height: 1.05;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    color: var(--ink);
  }
  .how-card ol {
    list-style: none;
    counter-reset: step;
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
  }
  .how-card ol li {
    counter-increment: step;
    padding: 10px 0 10px 42px;
    position: relative;
    font-size: 15px;
    line-height: 1.4;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .how-card ol li:first-child { border-top: none; padding-top: 6px; }
  .how-card ol li::before {
    content: counter(step);
    position: absolute;
    left: 0;
    top: 10px;
    width: 28px;
    height: 28px;
    background: var(--black);
    color: var(--yellow);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 14px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
  }
  .how-card .meta {
    margin-top: 14px;
    padding-top: 14px;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--line);
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    gap: 14px;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 12px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    color: var(--muted);
  }
  .how-card .meta strong { color: var(--ink); }

  /* ---------- Marquee of section labels ---------- */
  .label-strip {
    background: #fffbe0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
    padding: 12px 24px;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #333;
    text-align: center;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .label-strip span { margin: 0 14px; color: var(--ink); font-weight: 600; }
  .label-strip .dot { color: var(--yellow); font-weight: 900; }

  /* ---------- Sample headlines ---------- */
  .page {
    max-width: 1280px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 36px 24px 24px 24px;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 2fr) minmax(280px, 1fr);
    gap: 40px;
  }

  .hero { min-width: 0; }
  .section-title {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    font-size: 14px;
    border-top: 3px solid var(--black);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--black);
    padding: 8px 0;
    margin-bottom: 22px;
    color: var(--black);
  }
  .section-title .tag {
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    padding: 2px 8px;
    margin-right: 8px;
    font-size: 11px;
  }

  /* Lead story */
  .lead-story {
    margin-bottom: 36px;
    padding-bottom: 28px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .lead-story .kicker {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 13px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    color: var(--black);
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
    display: inline-block;
    border-bottom: 3px solid var(--yellow);
    padding-bottom: 2px;
  }
  .lead-story h2 {
    font-family: 'Anton', 'Oswald', Impact, sans-serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: clamp(46px, 6.5vw, 88px);
    line-height: 0.95;
    letter-spacing: -1px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }
  .lead-story .deck {
    font-size: 18px;
    font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 1.4;
    color: #222;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    max-width: 680px;
  }
  .lead-story .byline {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 12px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    color: var(--muted);
  }

  /* Story cards */
  .story-card {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 110px 1fr;
    gap: 18px;
    padding: 18px 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .story-card:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  .story-card .badge {
    width: 100%;
    aspect-ratio: 1 / 1;
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-family: 'Anton', sans-serif;
    font-size: 36px;
    line-height: 1;
    position: relative;
  }
  .story-card:nth-child(odd) .badge { background: var(--black); color: var(--yellow); }
  .story-card .badge .num {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 6px;
    right: 6px;
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    padding: 2px 5px;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  }
  .story-card:nth-child(odd) .badge .num { background: var(--yellow); color: var(--black); }
  .story-card .body { min-width: 0; }
  .story-card .body .kicker {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 11px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    color: #b8000d;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 4px;
  }
  .story-card .body h4 {
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 800;
    font-size: 20px;
    line-height: 1.15;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
  }
  .story-card .body p {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #333;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    line-height: 1.4;
  }
  .story-card .body .byline {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 11px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    color: var(--muted);
  }

  /* Sidebar */
  .sidebar { min-width: 0; }
  .sidebar-cta {
    background: var(--black);
    color: #fff;
    padding: 22px 20px;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
    border-bottom: 5px solid var(--yellow);
    position: relative;
  }
  .sidebar-cta::before {
    content: 'TIPS WANTED';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 20px;
    transform: translateY(-50%);
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    padding: 5px 10px;
  }
  .sidebar-cta h4 {
    font-family: 'Bevan', serif;

<!-- THE BIG SUBMIT HERO -->

      <h1>You Are<br>The <span class="accent">Headline.</span></h1>
      <p class="deck">
        Welcome to the <strong>Page 6 Party</strong>. This year, the gossip writes itself — because <strong>you write it.</strong>
        Submit your hottest, most scandalous, completely-fabricated-or-not-at-all headlines.
        The best ones will be read aloud, printed, and immortalized at the party.
      </p>

          Submit Your Headline <span class="arrow">›</span>
        </button>

    <aside class="how-card">
      <h3>How It Works</h3>
      <ol>
        <li>Hit the yellow <strong>Submit</strong> button — top right or bottom of the page.</li>
        <li>Write a headline. The juicier, sillier, or more dramatic, the better.</li>
        <li>Add your byline so we know who broke the story — or stay anonymous if you want.</li>
        <li>Send to press. The best headlines get the spotlight on <strong>May 25</strong>.</li>
      </ol>
      <div class="meta">
        <span>Deadline · <strong>May 25, 6 PM</strong></span>
        <span>Submissions · <strong>Unlimited</strong></span>
      </div>

<main class="page">
  <section class="hero">

    <article class="lead-story">
      <div class="kicker">Breaking</div>
      <h2>Sandals With Socks Sweep The Floor; Crowd Stunned</h2>
      <p class="deck">A bold sartorial choice has divided the dancefloor into believers and skeptics. By the second chorus, the skeptics had quietly converted.</p>
      <div class="byline">By A Concerned Onlooker</div>
    </article>

    <article class="story-card">

        <h4>Mystery Kitchen Romance Stuns Cheese Plate Witnesses</h4>
        <p>Sources close to the brie report prolonged eye contact and at least one shared cracker.</p>
        <div class="byline">By Our Hallway Correspondent</div>
      </div>
    </article>

    <article class="story-card">
      <div class="badge">!<span class="num">52,910</span></div>

        <div class="byline">By The Living Room Bureau</div>
      </div>
    </article>

    <article class="story-card">

        <div class="kicker">Style</div>
        <h4>Two-Fisted Drinking Officially Declared "A Look"</h4>

        <div class="byline">By The Fashion Desk</div>
      </div>
    </article>

    <article class="story-card">

        <div class="kicker">Sighted</div>
        <h4>Plus-One Arrives With Three Bottles, Is Immediately Adored</h4>

        <div class="byline">By A Doorway Source</div>
      </div>

    <article class="story-card">

        <div class="byline">By The Dessert Desk</div>
      </div>
    </article>

      <input type="text" id="kicker" placeholder="e.g. Gossip, Style, Scandal" maxlength="40" />

<script>
  // -----------------------------------------------------------------
  // CONFIG — change this email to wherever submissions should land.
  // First submission to a new address triggers a confirmation email
  // from Formsubmit (one-time, click the link to activate).
  // To hide your email from the page source, register at
  // https://formsubmit.co and replace this with the random hash they give you.
  // -----------------------------------------------------------------
  const FORMSUBMIT_TARGET = 'sebastian.r.buck@gmail.com';

  const form = document.getElementById('headline-form');
  const popup = document.getElementById('submit-popup');
  const popupBody = document.getElementById('popup-body');
  const toggle = document.getElementById('submit-toggle');
  const closeBtn = document.getElementById('popup-close');
  const STORAGE_KEY = 'partyTimes.tips.v1';

  // All the buttons that should open the submission popup
  const openers = [
    document.getElementById('submit-toggle'),
    document.getElementById('submit-toggle-top'),
    document.getElementById('hero-submit-btn'),
    document.getElementById('sidebar-submit-btn')
  ];

  function openPopup() {
    popup.classList.add('open');
    toggle.style.display = 'none';
    // reset to form view in case it was thanked
    restoreForm();
    setTimeout(() => document.getElementById('headline').focus(), 50);
  }
  function closePopup() {
    popup.classList.remove('open');
    toggle.style.display = '';
  }

  openers.forEach(b => b && b.addEventListener('click', openPopup));
  closeBtn.addEventListener('click', closePopup);
  document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
    if (e.key === 'Escape' && popup.classList.contains('open')) closePopup();
  });

  // Save submission silently — does NOT appear on the page.
  // The host can retrieve these later from localStorage,
  // or by typing showTips() in the browser console.
  function saveTip(item) {
    let arr = [];
    try {
      const raw = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
      if (raw) arr = JSON.parse(raw);
    } catch (e) {}
    arr.push(item);
    try { localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(arr)); } catch (e) {}
  }

  // Send the tip to the host's inbox via Formsubmit (no backend needed).
  async function emailTip(item) {
    try {
      const res = await fetch('https://formsubmit.co/ajax/' + FORMSUBMIT_TARGET, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
          'Accept': 'application/json'
        },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          _subject: 'Page 6 Tip: ' + item.headline.slice(0, 80),
          _template: 'box',
          _captcha: 'false',
          Section: item.kicker || '(none)',
          Headline: item.headline,
          Summary: item.summary || '(none)',
          Byline: item.byline,
          Submitted: new Date(item.ts).toLocaleString()
        })
      });
      return res.ok;
    } catch (e) {
      return false;
    }
  }

  function showThanks() {
    popupBody.innerHTML = `
      <div class="thanks">
        <div class="stamp">Filed · Off The Record</div>
        <h4>Thanks for the tip.</h4>
        <p>Your headline is locked in the vault until the party on <strong>May 25</strong>.<br>The juiciest ones get read aloud.</p>
        <button class="again" id="submit-again">Submit Another</button>
      </div>
    `;
    document.getElementById('submit-again').addEventListener('click', restoreForm);
    setTimeout(() => {
      // Auto-close after a few seconds
      if (popup.classList.contains('open')) {
        // Keep open so they can submit another — do nothing on auto-close
      }
    }, 4000);
  }

  function restoreForm() {
    popupBody.innerHTML = `
      <p class="intro">A scoop is a terrible thing to waste. Submissions stay private until the party.</p>
      <form id="headline-form" autocomplete="off">
        <label for="kicker">Section</label>
        <input type="text" id="kicker" placeholder="e.g. Gossip, Style, Scandal" maxlength="40" />

        <label for="headline">Headline*</label>
        <input type="text" id="headline" placeholder="Write a snappy headline…" maxlength="140" required />

        <label for="summary">Summary (optional)</label>
        <textarea id="summary" placeholder="A sentence or two of context…" maxlength="280"></textarea>

        <label for="byline">Your Byline <span style="text-transform:none; letter-spacing:0; color:#999;">(optional — leave blank to stay anonymous)</span></label>
        <input type="text" id="byline" placeholder="By Jane Doe" maxlength="60" />

        <button type="submit" class="send">Send To Press</button>
      </form>
    `;
    bindForm();
  }

  function bindForm() {
    const f = document.getElementById('headline-form');
    if (!f) return;
    f.addEventListener('submit', (e) => {
      e.preventDefault();
      const headline = document.getElementById('headline').value.trim();
      let byline = document.getElementById('byline').value.trim();
      if (!headline) return;
      if (!byline) {
        byline = 'By Anonymous';
      } else if (!byline.toLowerCase().startsWith('by ')) {
        byline = 'By ' + byline;
      }
      const item = {
        kicker: document.getElementById('kicker').value.trim(),
        headline,
        summary: document.getElementById('summary').value.trim(),
        byline,
        ts: Date.now()
      };
      saveTip(item);
      showThanks();
    });
  }

  bindForm();

  // Host-only helper — open the browser console and run showTips()
  // to see every submission collected on this device.
  window.showTips = function () {
    try {
      const raw = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
      const arr = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : [];
      console.log('%cPage 6 — Submitted Tips (' + arr.length + ')', 'font-weight:bold; color:#f5d800; background:#000; padding:4px 8px;');
      console.table(arr.map(t => ({
        when: new Date(t.ts).toLocaleString(),
        section: t.kicker,
        headline: t.headline,
        summary: t.summary,
        byline: t.byline
      })));
      return arr;
    } catch (e) {
      console.error(e);
      return [];
    }
  };
  console.log('%cPage 6 host: type showTips() to see submissions.', 'color:#666');
</script>
</body>
</html>
