<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
<title>The Page 6 Party · May 25</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Anton&family=Oswald:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,700;0,900;1,700;1,900&family=Bevan&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700;800;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@supabase/supabase-js@2"></script>
<style>
  :root {
    --black: #0a0a0a;
    --yellow: #f5d800;
    --ink: #111;
    --muted: #666;
    --line: #e6e6e6;
    --bg: #ffffff;
  }
  * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

  body {
    font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--ink);
    line-height: 1.4;
    padding-bottom: 80px;
  }

  /* ---------- Top black header ---------- */
  .top-header {
    background: var(--black);
    color: #fff;
    padding: 14px 24px;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr auto 1fr;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 16px;
  }
  .top-header .left,
  .top-header .right {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 14px;
  }
  .top-header .right { justify-content: flex-end; }

  .nav-btn {
    border: 1.5px solid #fff;
    background: transparent;
    color: #fff;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 13px;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    padding: 8px 14px;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    cursor: pointer;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }
  .nav-btn:hover { background: #fff; color: var(--black); }
  .nav-btn.cta { background: var(--yellow); color: var(--black); border-color: var(--yellow); }
  .nav-btn.cta:hover { background: #fff; border-color: #fff; }

  .icon-btn {
    background: transparent;
    border: none;
    color: #fff;
    cursor: pointer;
    padding: 6px;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
  }
  .icon-btn:hover { color: var(--yellow); }
  .icon-btn svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; }

  .logo {
    font-family: 'Bevan', 'Bookman Old Style', serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-style: normal;
    font-size: clamp(34px, 5vw, 58px);
    line-height: 1;
    color: #fff;
    letter-spacing: 0;
    white-space: nowrap;
    text-transform: none;
  }

  /* Yellow strip */
  .yellow-strip {
    background: var(--yellow);
    height: 8px;
  }

  /* ---------- THE BIG SUBMIT HERO ---------- */
  .submit-hero {
    background: var(--black);
    color: #fff;
    padding: 56px 24px 64px 24px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    border-bottom: 8px solid var(--yellow);
  }
  .submit-hero .inner {
    max-width: 1100px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1.4fr 1fr;
    gap: 56px;
    align-items: center;
  }
  .submit-hero .eyebrow {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 13px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 4px;
    color: var(--yellow);
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
    display: inline-block;
    border-bottom: 3px solid var(--yellow);
    padding-bottom: 4px;
  }
  .submit-hero h1 {
    font-family: 'Bevan', 'Bookman Old Style', serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: clamp(44px, 6.5vw, 84px);
    line-height: 0.95;
    margin-bottom: 18px;
    color: #fff;
    letter-spacing: -0.5px;
  }
  .submit-hero h1 .accent { color: var(--yellow); }
  .submit-hero .deck {
    font-size: 19px;
    line-height: 1.5;
    color: #e8e8e8;
    margin-bottom: 22px;
    max-width: 560px;
  }
  .submit-hero .deck strong { color: #fff; }

  .submit-hero .cta-row {
    display: flex;
    gap: 14px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    align-items: center;
  }
  .submit-hero .big-btn {
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    border: 3px solid var(--yellow);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 17px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    padding: 18px 28px;
    cursor: pointer;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    transition: transform 0.15s, background 0.15s;
  }
  .submit-hero .big-btn:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); background: #fff; border-color: #fff; }
  .submit-hero .big-btn .arrow { font-size: 22px; line-height: 0; }
  .submit-hero .note {
    color: #aaa;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
  }

  /* The "how-it-works" card */
  .how-card {
    background: #fff;
    color: var(--ink);
    padding: 26px 24px 22px 24px;
    position: relative;
    border-top: 6px solid var(--yellow);
  }
  .how-card::before {
    content: 'EXCLUSIVE';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 24px;
    transform: translateY(-50%);
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 12px;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    padding: 6px 12px;
  }
  .how-card h3 {
    font-family: 'Bevan', serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: 28px;
    line-height: 1.05;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    color: var(--ink);
  }
  .how-card ol {
    list-style: none;
    counter-reset: step;
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
  }
  .how-card ol li {
    counter-increment: step;
    padding: 10px 0 10px 42px;
    position: relative;
    font-size: 15px;
    line-height: 1.4;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .how-card ol li:first-child { border-top: none; padding-top: 6px; }
  .how-card ol li::before {
    content: counter(step);
    position: absolute;
    left: 0;
    top: 10px;
    width: 28px;
    height: 28px;
    background: var(--black);
    color: var(--yellow);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 14px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
  }
  .how-card .meta {
    margin-top: 14px;
    padding-top: 14px;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--line);
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    gap: 14px;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 12px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    color: var(--muted);
  }
  .how-card .meta strong { color: var(--ink); }

  /* ---------- Marquee of section labels ---------- */
  .label-strip {
    background: #fffbe0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
    padding: 12px 24px;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #333;
    text-align: center;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .label-strip span { margin: 0 14px; color: var(--ink); font-weight: 600; }
  .label-strip .dot { color: var(--yellow); font-weight: 900; }

  /* ---------- Sample headlines ---------- */
  .page {
    max-width: 1280px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 36px 24px 24px 24px;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 2fr) minmax(280px, 1fr);
    gap: 40px;
  }

  .hero { min-width: 0; }
  .section-title {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    font-size: 14px;
    border-top: 3px solid var(--black);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--black);
    padding: 8px 0;
    margin-bottom: 22px;
    color: var(--black);
  }
  .section-title .tag {
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    padding: 2px 8px;
    margin-right: 8px;
    font-size: 11px;
  }

  /* Lead story */
  .lead-story {
    margin-bottom: 36px;
    padding-bottom: 28px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .lead-story .kicker {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 13px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    color: var(--black);
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
    display: inline-block;
    border-bottom: 3px solid var(--yellow);
    padding-bottom: 2px;
  }
  .lead-story h2 {
    font-family: 'Anton', 'Oswald', Impact, sans-serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: clamp(46px, 6.5vw, 88px);
    line-height: 0.95;
    letter-spacing: -1px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }
  .lead-story .deck {
    font-size: 18px;
    font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 1.4;
    color: #222;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    max-width: 680px;
  }
  .lead-story .byline {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 12px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    color: var(--muted);
  }

  /* Story cards */
  .story-card {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 110px 1fr;
    gap: 18px;
    padding: 18px 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .story-card:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  .story-card .badge {
    width: 100%;
    aspect-ratio: 1 / 1;
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-family: 'Anton', sans-serif;
    font-size: 36px;
    line-height: 1;
    position: relative;
  }
  .story-card:nth-child(odd) .badge { background: var(--black); color: var(--yellow); }
  .story-card .badge .num {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 6px;
    right: 6px;
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    padding: 2px 5px;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  }
  .story-card:nth-child(odd) .badge .num { background: var(--yellow); color: var(--black); }
  .story-card .body { min-width: 0; }
  .story-card .body .kicker {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 11px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    color: #b8000d;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 4px;
  }
  .story-card .body h4 {
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 800;
    font-size: 20px;
    line-height: 1.15;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
  }
  .story-card .body p {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #333;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    line-height: 1.4;
  }
  .story-card .body .byline {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 11px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    color: var(--muted);
  }

  /* Sidebar */
  .sidebar { min-width: 0; }
  .sidebar-cta {
    background: var(--black);
    color: #fff;
    padding: 22px 20px;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
    border-bottom: 5px solid var(--yellow);
    position: relative;
  }
  .sidebar-cta::before {
    content: 'TIPS WANTED';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 20px;
    transform: translateY(-50%);
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    padding: 5px 10px;
  }
  .sidebar-cta h4 {
    font-family: 'Bevan', serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: 22px;
    line-height: 1.1;
    margin: 8px 0 10px 0;
    color: #fff;
  }
  .sidebar-cta p {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #ddd;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
    line-height: 1.4;
  }
  .sidebar-cta button {
    width: 100%;
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    border: none;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 13px;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    padding: 11px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    cursor: pointer;
  }
  .sidebar-cta button:hover { background: #fff; }

  .trending h3 {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    font-size: 18px;
    margin-bottom: 2px;
  }
  .trending .sub {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 12px;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    color: var(--muted);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    border-bottom: 3px solid var(--yellow);
    padding-bottom: 8px;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
    display: inline-block;
  }
  .trending-item {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 90px 1fr;
    gap: 12px;
    padding: 12px 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .trending-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  .trending-item .thumb {
    width: 90px;
    height: 90px;
    background: var(--black);
    color: var(--yellow);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-family: 'Anton', sans-serif;
    font-size: 32px;
    position: relative;
  }
  .trending-item:nth-child(even) .thumb { background: var(--yellow); color: var(--black); }
  .trending-item .thumb .views {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 6px;
    right: 6px;
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 10px;
    padding: 2px 5px;
  }
  .trending-item:nth-child(even) .thumb .views { background: var(--black); color: var(--yellow); }
  .trending-item h5 {
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 14px;
    line-height: 1.3;
  }
  .trending-item .byline {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 10px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    color: var(--muted);
    margin-top: 4px;
  }

  /* ---------- Footer ---------- */
  footer {
    background: var(--black);
    color: #aaa;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 24px;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 11px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    margin-top: 40px;
  }
  footer .yellow { color: var(--yellow); }

  /* ---------- Floating submit popup ---------- */
  .submit-toggle {
    position: fixed;
    bottom: 24px;
    right: 24px;
    z-index: 50;
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    border: 2px solid var(--black);
    padding: 14px 22px;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 13px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    cursor: pointer;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
    transition: transform 0.2s, background 0.2s;
  }
  .submit-toggle:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); background: #fff; }
  .submit-toggle .plus { margin-right: 6px; }

  .submit-popup {
    position: fixed;
    bottom: 24px;
    right: 24px;
    width: 400px;
    max-width: calc(100vw - 48px);
    background: #fff;
    border: 2px solid var(--black);
    box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
    z-index: 60;
    padding: 0;
    display: none;
    animation: popIn 0.2s ease-out;
  }
  .submit-popup.open { display: block; }
  @keyframes popIn {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(10px); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }
  .submit-popup .popup-header {
    background: var(--black);
    color: #fff;
    padding: 14px 18px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    border-bottom: 4px solid var(--yellow);
  }

  /* Thank-you state inside popup */

    text-align: center;

  }
  .thanks .stamp {
    display: inline-block;

  /* ---------- Responsive ---------- */
  @media (max-width: 980px) {
    .submit-hero .inner { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 32px; }

  /* ---------- Admin overlay ---------- */

        Welcome to the <strong>Page 6 Party</strong>. This year, the gossip writes itself — because <strong>you write it.</strong>

<!-- Admin overlay (visible when URL hash is #admin) -->

      </form>

    </div>

</div>

<script>
  // -----------------------------------------------------------------
  // CONFIG — change this email to wherever submissions should land.
  // First submission to a new address triggers a confirmation email
  // from Formsubmit (one-time, click the link to activate).
  // To hide your email from the page source, register at
  // https://formsubmit.co and replace this with the random hash they give you.
  // -----------------------------------------------------------------
  const FORMSUBMIT_TARGET = 'sebastian.r.buck@gmail.com';

  const form = document.getElementById('headline-form');
  const popup = document.getElementById('submit-popup');
  const popupBody = document.getElementById('popup-body');
  const toggle = document.getElementById('submit-toggle');
  const closeBtn = document.getElementById('popup-close');
  const STORAGE_KEY = 'partyTimes.tips.v1';

  // All the buttons that should open the submission popup
  const openers = [
    document.getElementById('submit-toggle'),
    document.getElementById('submit-toggle-top'),
    document.getElementById('hero-submit-btn'),
    document.getElementById('sidebar-submit-btn')
  ];

  function openPopup() {
    popup.classList.add('open');
    toggle.style.display = 'none';
    // reset to form view in case it was thanked
    restoreForm();
    setTimeout(() => document.getElementById('headline').focus(), 50);
  }
  function closePopup() {
    popup.classList.remove('open');
    toggle.style.display = '';
  }

  openers.forEach(b => b && b.addEventListener('click', openPopup));
  closeBtn.addEventListener('click', closePopup);
  document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
    if (e.key === 'Escape' && popup.classList.contains('open')) closePopup();
  });

  // Save submission silently — does NOT appear on the page.
  // The host can retrieve these later from localStorage,
  // or by typing showTips() in the browser console.
  function saveTip(item) {
    let arr = [];
    try {
      const raw = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
      if (raw) arr = JSON.parse(raw);
    } catch (e) {}
    arr.push(item);
    try { localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(arr)); } catch (e) {}
  }

  // Send the tip to the host's inbox via Formsubmit (no backend needed).
  async function emailTip(item) {
    try {
      const res = await fetch('https://formsubmit.co/ajax/' + FORMSUBMIT_TARGET, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
          'Accept': 'application/json'
        },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          _subject: 'Page 6 Tip: ' + item.headline.slice(0, 80),
          _template: 'box',
          _captcha: 'false',
          Section: item.kicker || '(none)',
          Headline: item.headline,
          Summary: item.summary || '(none)',
          Byline: item.byline,
          Submitted: new Date(item.ts).toLocaleString()
        })
      });
      return res.ok;
    } catch (e) {
      return false;
    }
  }

  function showThanks() {
    popupBody.innerHTML = `
      <div class="thanks">
        <div class="stamp">Filed · Off The Record</div>
        <h4>Thanks for the tip.</h4>
        <p>Your headline is locked in the vault until the party on <strong>May 25</strong>.<br>The juiciest ones get read aloud.</p>
        <button class="again" id="submit-again">Submit Another</button>
      </div>
    `;
    document.getElementById('submit-again').addEventListener('click', restoreForm);
    setTimeout(() => {
      // Auto-close after a few seconds
      if (popup.classList.contains('open')) {
        // Keep open so they can submit another — do nothing on auto-close
      }
    }, 4000);
  }

  function restoreForm() {
    popupBody.innerHTML = `
      <p class="intro">A scoop is a terrible thing to waste. Submissions stay private until the party.</p>
      <form id="headline-form" autocomplete="off">
        <label for="kicker">Section</label>
        <input type="text" id="kicker" placeholder="e.g. Gossip, Style, Scandal" maxlength="40" />

        <label for="headline">Headline*</label>
        <input type="text" id="headline" placeholder="Write a snappy headline…" maxlength="140" required />

        <label for="summary">Summary (optional)</label>
        <textarea id="summary" placeholder="A sentence or two of context…" maxlength="280"></textarea>

        <label for="byline">Your Byline <span style="text-transform:none; letter-spacing:0; color:#999;">(optional — leave blank to stay anonymous)</span></label>
        <input type="text" id="byline" placeholder="By Jane Doe" maxlength="60" />

        <button type="submit" class="send">Send To Press</button>
      </form>
    `;
    bindForm();
  }

  function bindForm() {
    const f = document.getElementById('headline-form');
    if (!f) return;
    f.addEventListener('submit', (e) => {
      e.preventDefault();
      const headline = document.getElementById('headline').value.trim();
      let byline = document.getElementById('byline').value.trim();
      if (!headline) return;
      if (!byline) {
        byline = 'By Anonymous';
      } else if (!byline.toLowerCase().startsWith('by ')) {
        byline = 'By ' + byline;
      }
      const item = {
        kicker: document.getElementById('kicker').value.trim(),
        headline,
        summary: document.getElementById('summary').value.trim(),
        byline,
        ts: Date.now()
      };
      saveTip(item);
      showThanks();
    });
  }

  bindForm();

  // Host-only helper — open the browser console and run showTips()
  // to see every submission collected on this device.
  window.showTips = function () {
    try {
      const raw = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
      const arr = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : [];
      console.log('%cPage 6 — Submitted Tips (' + arr.length + ')', 'font-weight:bold; color:#f5d800; background:#000; padding:4px 8px;');
      console.table(arr.map(t => ({
        when: new Date(t.ts).toLocaleString(),
        section: t.kicker,
        headline: t.headline,
        summary: t.summary,
        byline: t.byline
      })));
      return arr;
    } catch (e) {
      console.error(e);
      return [];
    }
  };
  console.log('%cPage 6 host: type showTips() to see submissions.', 'color:#666');
</script>
</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
<title>The Page 6 Party · May 25</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Anton&family=Oswald:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,700;0,900;1,700;1,900&family=Bevan&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700;800;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@supabase/supabase-js@2"></script>
<style>
  :root {
    --black: #0a0a0a;
    --yellow: #f5d800;
    --ink: #111;
    --muted: #666;
    --line: #e6e6e6;
    --bg: #ffffff;
  }
  * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

  body {
    font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--ink);
    line-height: 1.4;
    padding-bottom: 80px;
  }

  /* ---------- Top black header ---------- */
  .top-header {
    background: var(--black);

    padding: 14px 24px;

    grid-template-columns: 1fr auto 1fr;

  }
  .top-header .left,
  .top-header .right {
    display: flex;

    gap: 14px;
  }
  .top-header .right { justify-content: flex-end; }

  .nav-btn {
    border: 1.5px solid #fff;
    background: transparent;
    color: #fff;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 13px;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    padding: 8px 14px;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    cursor: pointer;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }
  .nav-btn:hover { background: #fff; color: var(--black); }
  .nav-btn.cta { background: var(--yellow); color: var(--black); border-color: var(--yellow); }
  .nav-btn.cta:hover { background: #fff; border-color: #fff; }

  .icon-btn {
    background: transparent;
    border: none;
    color: #fff;
    cursor: pointer;
    padding: 6px;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
  }
  .icon-btn:hover { color: var(--yellow); }
  .icon-btn svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; }

  .logo {
    font-family: 'Bevan', 'Bookman Old Style', serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-style: normal;
    font-size: clamp(34px, 5vw, 58px);
    line-height: 1;
    color: #fff;
    letter-spacing: 0;
    white-space: nowrap;
    text-transform: none;
  }

  /* Yellow strip */
  .yellow-strip {
    background: var(--yellow);
    height: 8px;
  }

  /* ---------- THE BIG SUBMIT HERO ---------- */
  .submit-hero {
    background: var(--black);
    color: #fff;
    padding: 56px 24px 64px 24px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    border-bottom: 8px solid var(--yellow);
  }
  .submit-hero .inner {
    max-width: 1100px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1.4fr 1fr;

    align-items: center;
  }
  .submit-hero .eyebrow {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;

  .submit-hero h1 .accent { color: var(--yellow); }
  .submit-hero .deck {

  .submit-hero .cta-row {

  .submit-hero .big-btn {

  .submit-hero .big-btn:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); background: #fff; border-color: #fff; }

  /* The "how-it-works" card */
  .how-card {
    background: #fff;

  .how-card::before {

  .how-card h3 {

  }
  .how-card ol {

  .how-card ol li {

  }
  .how-card ol li:first-child { border-top: none; padding-top: 6px; }
  .how-card ol li::before {

  /* ---------- Marquee of section labels ---------- */

  /* ---------- Sample headlines ---------- */
  .page {

  .hero { min-width: 0; }
  .section-title {

  /* Lead story */

  /* Story cards */

  .story-card .badge {

  /* Sidebar */

  .sidebar-cta p {

  .sidebar-cta button {

  .sidebar-cta button:hover { background: #fff; }

  .trending h3 {

    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    font-size: 18px;

  }
  .trending .sub {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;

    display: inline-block;
  }
  .trending-item {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 90px 1fr;
    gap: 12px;
    padding: 12px 0;

  }
  .trending-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  .trending-item .thumb {

  }
  .trending-item:nth-child(even) .thumb { background: var(--yellow); color: var(--black); }
  .trending-item .thumb .views {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 6px;

    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;

    padding: 2px 5px;
  }
  .trending-item:nth-child(even) .thumb .views { background: var(--black); color: var(--yellow); }
  .trending-item h5 {
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 14px;
    line-height: 1.3;
  }
  .trending-item .byline {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 10px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    color: var(--muted);
    margin-top: 4px;
  }

  /* ---------- Footer ---------- */
  footer {
    background: var(--black);
    color: #aaa;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 24px;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 11px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    margin-top: 40px;
  }
  footer .yellow { color: var(--yellow); }

  /* ---------- Floating submit popup ---------- */
  .submit-toggle {
    position: fixed;
    bottom: 24px;
    right: 24px;
    z-index: 50;
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    border: 2px solid var(--black);
    padding: 14px 22px;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 13px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    cursor: pointer;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
    transition: transform 0.2s, background 0.2s;
  }
  .submit-toggle:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); background: #fff; }
  .submit-toggle .plus { margin-right: 6px; }

  .submit-popup {
    position: fixed;
    bottom: 24px;
    right: 24px;
    width: 400px;
    max-width: calc(100vw - 48px);
    background: #fff;
    border: 2px solid var(--black);
    box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
    z-index: 60;
    padding: 0;
    display: none;
    animation: popIn 0.2s ease-out;
  }
  .submit-popup.open { display: block; }
  @keyframes popIn {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(10px); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }
  .submit-popup .popup-header {
    background: var(--black);
    color: #fff;
    padding: 14px 18px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    border-bottom: 4px solid var(--yellow);
  }
  .submit-popup .popup-header h3 {
    font-family: 'Bevan', serif;

  .submit-popup .close {

  .submit-popup .close:hover { color: var(--yellow); }
  .submit-popup .popup-body { padding: 18px 18px 20px 18px; }
  .submit-popup .intro {

  .submit-popup label {

  .submit-popup input[type="text"],

  }
  .submit-popup textarea { resize: vertical; min-height: 60px; }
  .submit-popup input[type="text"]:focus,
  .submit-popup textarea:focus { border-color: #b8000d; }
  .submit-popup button.send {
    margin-top: 16px;
    width: 100%;
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    border: 2px solid var(--black);
    padding: 12px 16px;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 13px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    cursor: pointer;
  }
  .submit-popup button.send:hover { background: var(--black); color: var(--yellow); }

  /* Thank-you state inside popup */
  .thanks {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 20px 4px 8px 4px;
  }
  .thanks .stamp {
    display: inline-block;
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    padding: 8px 16px;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    font-size: 12px;
    transform: rotate(-3deg);
    margin-bottom: 14px;
    border: 2px solid var(--black);
  }
  .thanks h4 {
    font-family: 'Bevan', serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: 26px;
    line-height: 1.1;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
  }
  .thanks p {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #333;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
    line-height: 1.4;
  }
  .thanks .again {
    background: transparent;
    border: 1.5px solid var(--black);
    color: var(--black);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 12px;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    padding: 10px 16px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    cursor: pointer;
  }
  .thanks .again:hover { background: var(--black); color: var(--yellow); }

  /* ---------- Responsive ---------- */
  @media (max-width: 980px) {
    .submit-hero .inner { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 32px; }
    .page { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 24px; }
    .top-header { grid-template-columns: auto 1fr auto; gap: 8px; }
    .top-header .left .nav-btn { display: none; }
  }
  @media (max-width: 560px) {
    .submit-popup { width: calc(100vw - 32px); right: 16px; bottom: 16px; }
    .submit-toggle { right: 16px; bottom: 16px; }
    .lead-story h2 { font-size: 40px; }
    .story-card { grid-template-columns: 80px 1fr; }
  }

  /* ---------- Admin overlay ---------- */
  .admin-overlay {
    display: none;
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    background: #f3f3f3;
    z-index: 100;
    overflow-y: auto;
  }
  .admin-overlay.open { display: block; }
  .admin-wrap { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 24px 60px; }
  .admin-header {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    background: var(--black);
    color: #fff;
    padding: 16px 24px;
    margin: 0 -24px 24px -24px;
    border-bottom: 6px solid var(--yellow);
  }
  .admin-header h2 {
    font-family: 'Bevan', serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: 28px;
    color: #fff;
  }
  .admin-close {
    background: transparent;
    border: 1.5px solid #fff;
    color: #fff;
    width: 36px; height: 36px;
    font-size: 22px;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-family: serif;
    line-height: 1;
  }
  .admin-close:hover { background: var(--yellow); color: var(--black); border-color: var(--yellow); }
  .admin-section {
    background: #fff;
    padding: 28px;
    border: 1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .admin-section p { font-size: 15px; color: #333; margin-bottom: 14px; line-height: 1.5; }
  .admin-section label {
    display: block;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 11px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    color: var(--muted);
    margin-bottom: 4px;
  }
  .admin-section input[type="email"] {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 360px;
    border: 1.5px solid var(--black);
    background: #fff;
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-size: 15px;
    padding: 10px 12px;
    outline: none;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
  }
  .admin-section input[type="email"]:focus { border-color: #b8000d; }
  .admin-btn {
    display: inline-block;
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    border: 2px solid var(--black);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 13px;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    padding: 11px 18px;

    cursor: pointer;
  }
  .admin-btn:hover { background: var(--black); color: var(--yellow); }
  .admin-btn-sm {
    background: #fff;
    color: var(--black);
    border: 1.5px solid var(--black);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    padding: 6px 12px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    cursor: pointer;
  }
  .admin-btn-sm:hover { background: var(--black); color: var(--yellow); }
  .admin-note { font-size: 13px; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 12px; line-height: 1.5; }
  .admin-note.ok { color: #1a7a1a; }
  .admin-note.err { color: #b8000d; }
  .admin-toolbar {
    display: flex;
    gap: 10px;
    align-items: center;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    padding-bottom: 14px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
    margin-bottom: 18px;
  }
  .admin-toolbar #admin-user-label {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;

  .admin-stats {

  .admin-table-wrap { overflow-x: auto; }

  }

  .admin-table tr:hover td { background: #fffce6; }
  .admin-table td:nth-child(1) { white-space: nowrap; color: var(--muted); font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; }
  .admin-table td:nth-child(2) { color: #b8000d; font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase; white-space: nowrap; }
  .admin-table td:nth-child(3) { font-weight: 700; min-width: 240px; }

  .admin-link { color: var(--yellow); text-decoration: none; margin-left: 8px; opacity: 0.6; }
  .admin-link:hover { opacity: 1; text-decoration: underline; }
</style>
</head>

        Welcome to the <strong>Page 6 Party</strong>. This year, the gossip writes itself — because <strong>you write it.</strong>

<footer>The Page 6 Party · <span class="yellow">May 25</span> · All The News That Fits, We Print <a href="#admin" class="admin-link">· Admin</a></footer>

<button class="submit-toggle" id="submit-toggle" aria-label="Submit a headline">
  <span class="plus">+</span> Submit Your Headline

  </div>

    <form id="headline-form" autocomplete="off">
      <label for="kicker">Section</label>
      <input type="text" id="kicker" placeholder="e.g. Gossip, Style, Scandal" maxlength="40" />

      <label for="summary">Summary (optional)</label>
      <textarea id="summary" placeholder="A sentence or two of context…" maxlength="280"></textarea>

      <label for="byline">Your Byline*</label>
      <input type="text" id="byline" placeholder="By Jane Doe" maxlength="60" required />

      <button type="submit" class="send">Send To Press</button>
    </form>
  </div>
</aside>

<!-- Admin overlay (visible when URL hash is #admin) -->
<div class="admin-overlay" id="admin-overlay" aria-hidden="true">
  <div class="admin-wrap">
    <header class="admin-header">
      <h2>Page 6 · Admin</h2>
      <button class="admin-close" id="admin-close" aria-label="Close">×</button>
    </header>

    <div id="admin-login" class="admin-section">
      <p>Sign in with a one-time magic link to see all submitted tips.</p>
      <form id="admin-login-form">
        <label for="admin-email">Email</label>
        <input type="email" id="admin-email" placeholder="you@example.com" required />
        <button type="submit" class="admin-btn">Send Magic Link</button>
      </form>
      <p class="admin-note" id="admin-login-msg"></p>
    </div>

    <div id="admin-view" class="admin-section" hidden>
      <div class="admin-toolbar">
        <span id="admin-user-label"></span>
        <button class="admin-btn-sm" id="admin-refresh">Refresh</button>
        <button class="admin-btn-sm" id="admin-export">Export CSV</button>
        <button class="admin-btn-sm" id="admin-signout">Sign Out</button>
      </div>
      <div class="admin-stats" id="admin-stats"></div>
      <div class="admin-table-wrap">
        <table class="admin-table" id="admin-table">
          <thead><tr><th>When</th><th>Section</th><th>Headline</th><th>Summary</th><th>Byline</th></tr></thead>
          <tbody></tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
  // -----------------------------------------------------------------
  // CONFIG — paste your Supabase project URL + anon key here.
  // Setup (one-time, ~5 minutes):
  //   1. Sign up at https://supabase.com  → New project (free tier is fine).
  //   2. SQL Editor → paste & run:
  //        create table tips (
  //          id bigserial primary key,
  //          created_at timestamptz default now(),
  //          section text, headline text not null,
  //          summary text, byline text
  //        );
  //        alter table tips enable row level security;
  //        create policy "anyone can insert" on tips
  //          for insert to anon, authenticated with check (true);
  //        create policy "authenticated can read" on tips
  //          for select to authenticated using (true);
  //   3. Authentication → Providers → Email → enable Magic Link.
  //   4. Authentication → URL Configuration → add your deployed site URL
  //      to "Site URL" and "Redirect URLs".
  //   5. Project Settings → API → copy "Project URL" and "anon public" key
  //      into the two constants below.
  // -----------------------------------------------------------------
  const SUPABASE_URL      = '';   // e.g. 'https://abcd1234.supabase.co'
  const SUPABASE_ANON_KEY = '';   // long public 'anon' key from API settings

  const sb = (SUPABASE_URL && SUPABASE_ANON_KEY && window.supabase)
    ? window.supabase.createClient(SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_ANON_KEY)
    : null;

  const form = document.getElementById('headline-form');
  const popup = document.getElementById('submit-popup');
  const popupBody = document.getElementById('popup-body');
  const toggle = document.getElementById('submit-toggle');
  const closeBtn = document.getElementById('popup-close');
  const STORAGE_KEY = 'partyTimes.tips.v1';

  // All the buttons that should open the submission popup
  const openers = [
    document.getElementById('submit-toggle'),
    document.getElementById('submit-toggle-top'),
    document.getElementById('hero-submit-btn'),
    document.getElementById('sidebar-submit-btn')
  ];

  function openPopup() {
    popup.classList.add('open');
    toggle.style.display = 'none';
    // reset to form view in case it was thanked
    restoreForm();
    setTimeout(() => document.getElementById('headline').focus(), 50);
  }
  function closePopup() {
    popup.classList.remove('open');
    toggle.style.display = '';
  }

  openers.forEach(b => b && b.addEventListener('click', openPopup));
  closeBtn.addEventListener('click', closePopup);
  document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
    if (e.key === 'Escape' && popup.classList.contains('open')) closePopup();
  });

  // Save submission silently — does NOT appear on the page.
  // The host can retrieve these later from localStorage,
  // or by typing showTips() in the browser console.
  function saveTip(item) {
    let arr = [];
    try {
      const raw = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
      if (raw) arr = JSON.parse(raw);
    } catch (e) {}
    arr.push(item);
    try { localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(arr)); } catch (e) {}
  }

  // Send the tip to the host's inbox via Formsubmit (no backend needed).
  async function emailTip(item) {
    try {
      const res = await fetch('https://formsubmit.co/ajax/' + FORMSUBMIT_TARGET, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
          'Accept': 'application/json'
        },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          _subject: 'Page 6 Tip: ' + item.headline.slice(0, 80),
          _template: 'box',
          _captcha: 'false',
          Section: item.kicker || '(none)',
          Headline: item.headline,
          Summary: item.summary || '(none)',
          Byline: item.byline,
          Submitted: new Date(item.ts).toLocaleString()
        })
      });
      return res.ok;
    } catch (e) {
      return false;
    }
  }

  function showThanks() {
    popupBody.innerHTML = `
      <div class="thanks">
        <div class="stamp">Filed · Off The Record</div>
        <h4>Thanks for the tip.</h4>
        <p>Your headline is locked in the vault until the party on <strong>May 25</strong>.<br>The juiciest ones get read aloud.</p>
        <button class="again" id="submit-again">Submit Another</button>
      </div>
    `;
    document.getElementById('submit-again').addEventListener('click', restoreForm);
    setTimeout(() => {
      // Auto-close after a few seconds
      if (popup.classList.contains('open')) {
        // Keep open so they can submit another — do nothing on auto-close
      }
    }, 4000);
  }

  function restoreForm() {
    popupBody.innerHTML = `
      <p class="intro">A scoop is a terrible thing to waste. Submissions stay private until the party.</p>
      <form id="headline-form" autocomplete="off">
        <label for="kicker">Section</label>
        <input type="text" id="kicker" placeholder="e.g. Gossip, Style, Scandal" maxlength="40" />

        <label for="headline">Headline*</label>
        <input type="text" id="headline" placeholder="Write a snappy headline…" maxlength="140" required />

        <label for="summary">Summary (optional)</label>
        <textarea id="summary" placeholder="A sentence or two of context…" maxlength="280"></textarea>

        <label for="byline">Your Byline <span style="text-transform:none; letter-spacing:0; color:#999;">(optional — leave blank to stay anonymous)</span></label>
        <input type="text" id="byline" placeholder="By Jane Doe" maxlength="60" />

        <button type="submit" class="send">Send To Press</button>
      </form>
    `;
    bindForm();
  }

  function bindForm() {
    const f = document.getElementById('headline-form');
    if (!f) return;
    f.addEventListener('submit', (e) => {
      e.preventDefault();
      const headline = document.getElementById('headline').value.trim();
      let byline = document.getElementById('byline').value.trim();
      if (!headline) return;
      if (!byline) {
        byline = 'By Anonymous';
      } else if (!byline.toLowerCase().startsWith('by ')) {
        byline = 'By ' + byline;
      }
      const item = {
        kicker: document.getElementById('kicker').value.trim(),
        headline,
        summary: document.getElementById('summary').value.trim(),
        byline,
        ts: Date.now()
      };
      saveTip(item);
      showThanks();
    });
  }

  bindForm();

  // Host-only helper — open the browser console and run showTips()
  // to see every submission collected on this device.
  window.showTips = function () {
    try {
      const raw = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
      const arr = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : [];
      console.log('%cPage 6 — Submitted Tips (' + arr.length + ')', 'font-weight:bold; color:#f5d800; background:#000; padding:4px 8px;');
      console.table(arr.map(t => ({
        when: new Date(t.ts).toLocaleString(),
        section: t.kicker,
        headline: t.headline,
        summary: t.summary,
        byline: t.byline
      })));
      return arr;
    } catch (e) {
      console.error(e);
      return [];
    }
  };
  console.log('%cPage 6 host: type showTips() to see submissions.', 'color:#666');
</script>
</body>
</html>

+  // Send the tip to the Supabase 'tips' table. Returns true on success.

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>

<title>The Page 6 Party · May 25</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Anton&family=Oswald:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,700;0,900;1,700;1,900&family=Bevan&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700;800;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@supabase/supabase-js@2"></script>
<style>
  :root {

    --ink: #111;
    --muted: #666;
    --line: #e6e6e6;

  }
  * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

  body {

  /* ---------- Top black header ---------- */

  .nav-btn {

    font-weight: 600;

    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    padding: 8px 14px;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    cursor: pointer;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }
  .nav-btn:hover { background: #fff; color: var(--black); }
  .nav-btn.cta { background: var(--yellow); color: var(--black); border-color: var(--yellow); }
  .nav-btn.cta:hover { background: #fff; border-color: #fff; }

  .icon-btn {
    background: transparent;

    color: #fff;

    justify-content: center;
  }
  .icon-btn:hover { color: var(--yellow); }
  .icon-btn svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; }

  .logo {
    font-family: 'Bevan', 'Bookman Old Style', serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-style: normal;
    font-size: clamp(34px, 5vw, 58px);
    line-height: 1;
    color: #fff;
    letter-spacing: 0;
    white-space: nowrap;
    text-transform: none;
  }

  /* Yellow strip */
  .yellow-strip {
    background: var(--yellow);
    height: 8px;
  }

  /* ---------- THE BIG SUBMIT HERO ---------- */
  .submit-hero {
    background: var(--black);
    color: #fff;
    padding: 56px 24px 64px 24px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    border-bottom: 8px solid var(--yellow);
  }
  .submit-hero .inner {
    max-width: 1100px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1.4fr 1fr;

    align-items: center;
  }
  .submit-hero .eyebrow {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;

    color: var(--yellow);

    margin-bottom: 14px;
    display: inline-block;
    border-bottom: 3px solid var(--yellow);
    padding-bottom: 4px;
  }
  .submit-hero h1 {
    font-family: 'Bevan', 'Bookman Old Style', serif;

    margin-bottom: 18px;
    color: #fff;
    letter-spacing: -0.5px;
  }
  .submit-hero h1 .accent { color: var(--yellow); }
  .submit-hero .deck {
    font-size: 19px;

    margin-bottom: 22px;

  .submit-hero .deck strong { color: #fff; }

  .submit-hero .cta-row {
    display: flex;

  }
  .submit-hero .big-btn {
    background: var(--yellow);

    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;

    font-size: 17px;

    letter-spacing: 2px;

    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    transition: transform 0.15s, background 0.15s;
  }
  .submit-hero .big-btn:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); background: #fff; border-color: #fff; }
  .submit-hero .big-btn .arrow { font-size: 22px; line-height: 0; }
  .submit-hero .note {
    color: #aaa;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    text-transform: uppercase;

  /* The "how-it-works" card */
  .how-card {
    background: #fff;
    color: var(--ink);

  .how-card::before {

  }
  .how-card ol {

  .how-card ol li {
    counter-increment: step;

  }
  .how-card ol li:first-child { border-top: none; padding-top: 6px; }
  .how-card ol li::before {
    content: counter(step);

  .how-card .meta {

  }
  .how-card .meta strong { color: var(--ink); }

  /* ---------- Marquee of section labels ---------- */
  .label-strip {
    background: #fffbe0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
    padding: 12px 24px;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    text-transform: uppercase;

  }
  .label-strip span { margin: 0 14px; color: var(--ink); font-weight: 600; }
  .label-strip .dot { color: var(--yellow); font-weight: 900; }

  /* ---------- Sample headlines ---------- */
  .page {
    max-width: 1280px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 36px 24px 24px 24px;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 2fr) minmax(280px, 1fr);
    gap: 40px;
  }

  .hero { min-width: 0; }
  .section-title {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    font-size: 14px;

    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--black);

  }
  .section-title .tag {
    background: var(--yellow);

  /* Lead story */
  .lead-story {

  .lead-story .kicker {

  .lead-story h2 {

    text-transform: uppercase;

  }
  .lead-story .deck {
    font-size: 18px;

    line-height: 1.4;
    color: #222;

  }
  .lead-story .byline {

  }

  /* Story cards */
  .story-card {
    display: grid;

  .story-card:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  .story-card .badge {
    width: 100%;

    font-size: 36px;

  .story-card:nth-child(odd) .badge { background: var(--black); color: var(--yellow); }
  .story-card .badge .num {
    position: absolute;

  .story-card:nth-child(odd) .badge .num { background: var(--yellow); color: var(--black); }
  .story-card .body { min-width: 0; }
  .story-card .body .kicker {

  /* Sidebar */

  .sidebar-cta p {

  .sidebar-cta button {

  .sidebar-cta button:hover { background: #fff; }

  .trending h3 {

  }
  .trending .sub {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 12px;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    color: var(--muted);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    border-bottom: 3px solid var(--yellow);

    margin-bottom: 16px;

  }
  .trending-item {
    display: grid;

    gap: 12px;

  .trending-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  .trending-item .thumb {

    display: flex;
    align-items: center;

    position: relative;
  }
  .trending-item:nth-child(even) .thumb { background: var(--yellow); color: var(--black); }
  .trending-item .thumb .views {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 6px;
    right: 6px;
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 10px;
    padding: 2px 5px;
  }
  .trending-item:nth-child(even) .thumb .views { background: var(--black); color: var(--yellow); }
  .trending-item h5 {
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;

  .trending-item .byline {

  /* ---------- Footer ---------- */
  footer {

  footer .yellow { color: var(--yellow); }

  /* ---------- Floating submit popup ---------- */
  .submit-toggle {

  .submit-toggle:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); background: #fff; }
  .submit-toggle .plus { margin-right: 6px; }

  .submit-popup {
    position: fixed;
    bottom: 24px;

    width: 400px;

    animation: popIn 0.2s ease-out;

  .submit-popup.open { display: block; }
  @keyframes popIn {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(10px); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }
  .submit-popup .popup-header {
    background: var(--black);
    color: #fff;
    padding: 14px 18px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;

  }
  .submit-popup .popup-header h3 {
    font-family: 'Bevan', serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: 20px;
    margin: 0;
    color: #fff;
  }
  .submit-popup .close {
    background: transparent;
    border: none;
    color: #fff;
    font-size: 24px;
    cursor: pointer;
    line-height: 1;
  }
  .submit-popup .close:hover { color: var(--yellow); }
  .submit-popup .popup-body { padding: 18px 18px 20px 18px; }
  .submit-popup .intro {
    font-size: 13px;
    color: #333;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    font-style: italic;
  }
  .submit-popup label {
    display: block;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 10px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;

    margin-bottom: 4px;
    margin-top: 10px;

  }
  .submit-popup input[type="text"],
  .submit-popup textarea {
    width: 100%;

    background: #fff;
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-size: 14px;

    outline: none;

  }
  .submit-popup textarea { resize: vertical; min-height: 60px; }
  .submit-popup input[type="text"]:focus,
  .submit-popup textarea:focus { border-color: #b8000d; }
  .submit-popup button.send {

    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 13px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    cursor: pointer;

  .submit-popup button.send:hover { background: var(--black); color: var(--yellow); }

  /* Thank-you state inside popup */
  .thanks {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 20px 4px 8px 4px;
  }
  .thanks .stamp {
    display: inline-block;
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    padding: 8px 16px;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    font-size: 12px;

  .thanks h4 {

    font-size: 26px;

  .thanks p {

  .thanks .again {

    padding: 10px 16px;

  }
  .thanks .again:hover { background: var(--black); color: var(--yellow); }

  /* ---------- Responsive ---------- */
  @media (max-width: 980px) {
    .submit-hero .inner { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 32px; }
    .page { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 24px; }
    .top-header { grid-template-columns: auto 1fr auto; gap: 8px; }
    .top-header .left .nav-btn { display: none; }
  }
  @media (max-width: 560px) {
    .submit-popup { width: calc(100vw - 32px); right: 16px; bottom: 16px; }
    .submit-toggle { right: 16px; bottom: 16px; }
    .lead-story h2 { font-size: 40px; }
    .story-card { grid-template-columns: 80px 1fr; }
  }

  /* ---------- Admin overlay ---------- */
  .admin-overlay {
    display: none;
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    background: #f3f3f3;
    z-index: 100;
    overflow-y: auto;
  }
  .admin-overlay.open { display: block; }
  .admin-wrap { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 24px 60px; }
  .admin-header {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    background: var(--black);
    color: #fff;
    padding: 16px 24px;
    margin: 0 -24px 24px -24px;
    border-bottom: 6px solid var(--yellow);
  }
  .admin-header h2 {
    font-family: 'Bevan', serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: 28px;
    color: #fff;
  }
  .admin-close {
    background: transparent;
    border: 1.5px solid #fff;
    color: #fff;
    width: 36px; height: 36px;
    font-size: 22px;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-family: serif;
    line-height: 1;
  }
  .admin-close:hover { background: var(--yellow); color: var(--black); border-color: var(--yellow); }
  .admin-section {
    background: #fff;
    padding: 28px;
    border: 1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .admin-section p { font-size: 15px; color: #333; margin-bottom: 14px; line-height: 1.5; }
  .admin-section label {
    display: block;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 11px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    color: var(--muted);
    margin-bottom: 4px;
  }
  .admin-section input[type="email"] {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 360px;
    border: 1.5px solid var(--black);
    background: #fff;
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-size: 15px;
    padding: 10px 12px;
    outline: none;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
  }
  .admin-section input[type="email"]:focus { border-color: #b8000d; }
  .admin-btn {
    display: inline-block;
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    border: 2px solid var(--black);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 13px;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    padding: 11px 18px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    cursor: pointer;
  }
  .admin-btn:hover { background: var(--black); color: var(--yellow); }
  .admin-btn-sm {
    background: #fff;
    color: var(--black);
    border: 1.5px solid var(--black);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    padding: 6px 12px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    cursor: pointer;
  }
  .admin-btn-sm:hover { background: var(--black); color: var(--yellow); }
  .admin-note { font-size: 13px; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 12px; line-height: 1.5; }
  .admin-note.ok { color: #1a7a1a; }
  .admin-note.err { color: #b8000d; }
  .admin-toolbar {
    display: flex;
    gap: 10px;
    align-items: center;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    padding-bottom: 14px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
    margin-bottom: 18px;
  }
  .admin-toolbar #admin-user-label {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 12px;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    color: var(--muted);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-right: auto;
  }
  .admin-stats {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 13px;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
    color: var(--ink);
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }
  .admin-stats strong { color: #b8000d; }
  .admin-table-wrap { overflow-x: auto; }
  .admin-table {
    width: 100%;
    border-collapse: collapse;
    font-size: 14px;
  }
  .admin-table th {
    background: var(--black);
    color: var(--yellow);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    font-size: 11px;
    padding: 10px 12px;
    text-align: left;
  }
  .admin-table td {
    padding: 12px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
    vertical-align: top;
    line-height: 1.4;
  }
  .admin-table tr:hover td { background: #fffce6; }
  .admin-table td:nth-child(1) { white-space: nowrap; color: var(--muted); font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; }
  .admin-table td:nth-child(2) { color: #b8000d; font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase; white-space: nowrap; }
  .admin-table td:nth-child(3) { font-weight: 700; min-width: 240px; }
  .admin-table td:nth-child(5) { white-space: nowrap; color: var(--muted); font-size: 12px; }
  .admin-link { color: var(--yellow); text-decoration: none; margin-left: 8px; opacity: 0.6; }
  .admin-link:hover { opacity: 1; text-decoration: underline; }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- Top black header -->
<header class="top-header">
  <div class="left">

    </button>

    <button class="nav-btn">

      Log In

</header>

<div class="yellow-strip"></div>

<!-- THE BIG SUBMIT HERO -->
<section class="submit-hero">
  <div class="inner">
    <div>
      <div class="eyebrow">Monday, May 25 · Invite Only</div>
      <h1>You Are<br>The <span class="accent">Headline.</span></h1>
      <p class="deck">
        Welcome to the <strong>Page 6 Party</strong>. This year, the gossip writes itself — because <strong>you write it.</strong>
        Submit your hottest, most scandalous, completely-fabricated-or-not-at-all headlines.
        The best ones will be read aloud, printed, and immortalized at the party.
      </p>
      <div class="cta-row">
        <button class="big-btn" id="hero-submit-btn">
          Submit Your Headline <span class="arrow">›</span>
        </button>

    </div>

    <aside class="how-card">
      <h3>How It Works</h3>
      <ol>
        <li>Hit the yellow <strong>Submit</strong> button — top right or bottom of the page.</li>
        <li>Write a headline. The juicier, sillier, or more dramatic, the better.</li>
        <li>Add your byline so we know who broke the story — or stay anonymous if you want.</li>
        <li>Send to press. The best headlines get the spotlight on <strong>May 25</strong>.</li>
      </ol>
      <div class="meta">
        <span>Deadline · <strong>May 25, 6 PM</strong></span>

</section>

<!-- Label strip -->
<div class="label-strip">

<!-- Sample headlines (static / decorative) -->
<main class="page">
  <section class="hero">
    <h3 class="section-title"><span class="tag">SAMPLE</span> What A Headline Looks Like</h3>

    <article class="lead-story">
      <div class="kicker">Breaking</div>
      <h2>Sandals With Socks Sweep The Floor; Crowd Stunned</h2>
      <p class="deck">A bold sartorial choice has divided the dancefloor into believers and skeptics. By the second chorus, the skeptics had quietly converted.</p>
      <div class="byline">By A Concerned Onlooker</div>
    </article>

    <article class="story-card">
      <div class="badge">♥<span class="num">38,204</span></div>
      <div class="body">
        <div class="kicker">Gossip</div>
        <h4>Mystery Kitchen Romance Stuns Cheese Plate Witnesses</h4>
        <p>Sources close to the brie report prolonged eye contact and at least one shared cracker.</p>
        <div class="byline">By Our Hallway Correspondent</div>
      </div>
    </article>

    <article class="story-card">
      <div class="badge">!<span class="num">52,910</span></div>
      <div class="body">

        <p>A peaceful transition of power is, as of press time, not assured. Negotiations now hinge on a single Robyn track.</p>
        <div class="byline">By The Living Room Bureau</div>
      </div>
    </article>

    <article class="story-card">
      <div class="badge">✦<span class="num">27,341</span></div>
      <div class="body">
        <div class="kicker">Style</div>
        <h4>Two-Fisted Drinking Officially Declared "A Look"</h4>
        <p>Fashion editors stunned. "It just makes sense," said one early adopter, gesturing with both.</p>
        <div class="byline">By The Fashion Desk</div>
      </div>
    </article>

    <article class="story-card">
      <div class="badge">◉<span class="num">61,005</span></div>
      <div class="body">
        <div class="kicker">Sighted</div>
        <h4>Plus-One Arrives With Three Bottles, Is Immediately Adored</h4>
        <p>Identity still being verified. The wine, however, has been authenticated and consumed.</p>
        <div class="byline">By A Doorway Source</div>
      </div>
    </article>

    <article class="story-card">
      <div class="badge">✖<span class="num">44,872</span></div>
      <div class="body">
        <div class="kicker">Scandal</div>
        <h4>Cake Cut At Improper Angle; Etiquette Columnist "Resting"</h4>
        <p>The breach occurred at 10:47 PM. A second slice has since stabilized the situation.</p>
        <div class="byline">By The Dessert Desk</div>
      </div>

  </section>

  <aside class="sidebar">
    <div class="sidebar-cta">
      <h4>Got A Scoop? File It Now.</h4>

      </div>
      <div class="trending-item">

</main>

<footer>The Page 6 Party · <span class="yellow">May 25</span> · All The News That Fits, We Print <a href="#admin" class="admin-link">· Admin</a></footer>

<!-- Floating submit toggle -->
<button class="submit-toggle" id="submit-toggle" aria-label="Submit a headline">
  <span class="plus">+</span> Submit Your Headline
</button>

<!-- Floating submit popup -->
<aside class="submit-popup" id="submit-popup" role="dialog" aria-labelledby="popup-title">
  <div class="popup-header">
    <h3 id="popup-title">File a Tip</h3>
    <button class="close" id="popup-close" aria-label="Close">×</button>
  </div>
  <div class="popup-body" id="popup-body">
    <p class="intro">A scoop is a terrible thing to waste. Submissions stay private until the party.</p>
    <form id="headline-form" autocomplete="off">
      <label for="kicker">Section</label>
      <input type="text" id="kicker" placeholder="e.g. Gossip, Style, Scandal" maxlength="40" />

      <label for="headline">Headline*</label>
      <input type="text" id="headline" placeholder="Write a snappy headline…" maxlength="140" required />

      <label for="summary">Summary (optional)</label>
      <textarea id="summary" placeholder="A sentence or two of context…" maxlength="280"></textarea>

      <label for="byline">Your Byline*</label>
      <input type="text" id="byline" placeholder="By Jane Doe" maxlength="60" required />

      <button type="submit" class="send">Send To Press</button>
    </form>
  </div>
</aside>

<!-- Admin overlay (visible when URL hash is #admin) -->
<div class="admin-overlay" id="admin-overlay" aria-hidden="true">
  <div class="admin-wrap">
    <header class="admin-header">
      <h2>Page 6 · Admin</h2>
      <button class="admin-close" id="admin-close" aria-label="Close">×</button>
    </header>

    <div id="admin-login" class="admin-section">
      <p>Sign in with a one-time magic link to see all submitted tips.</p>
      <form id="admin-login-form">
        <label for="admin-email">Email</label>
        <input type="email" id="admin-email" placeholder="you@example.com" required />
        <button type="submit" class="admin-btn">Send Magic Link</button>
      </form>
      <p class="admin-note" id="admin-login-msg"></p>
    </div>

    <div id="admin-view" class="admin-section" hidden>
      <div class="admin-toolbar">
        <span id="admin-user-label"></span>
        <button class="admin-btn-sm" id="admin-refresh">Refresh</button>
        <button class="admin-btn-sm" id="admin-export">Export CSV</button>
        <button class="admin-btn-sm" id="admin-signout">Sign Out</button>
      </div>
      <div class="admin-stats" id="admin-stats"></div>
      <div class="admin-table-wrap">
        <table class="admin-table" id="admin-table">
          <thead><tr><th>When</th><th>Section</th><th>Headline</th><th>Summary</th><th>Byline</th></tr></thead>
          <tbody></tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
  // -----------------------------------------------------------------
  // CONFIG — paste your Supabase project URL + anon key here.
  // Setup (one-time, ~5 minutes):
  //   1. Sign up at https://supabase.com  → New project (free tier is fine).
  //   2. SQL Editor → paste & run:
  //        create table tips (
  //          id bigserial primary key,
  //          created_at timestamptz default now(),
  //          section text, headline text not null,
  //          summary text, byline text
  //        );
  //        alter table tips enable row level security;
  //        create policy "anyone can insert" on tips
  //          for insert to anon, authenticated with check (true);
  //        create policy "authenticated can read" on tips
  //          for select to authenticated using (true);
  //   3. Authentication → Providers → Email → enable Magic Link.
  //   4. Authentication → URL Configuration → add your deployed site URL
  //      to "Site URL" and "Redirect URLs".
  //   5. Project Settings → API → copy "Project URL" and "anon public" key
  //      into the two constants below.
  // -----------------------------------------------------------------
  const SUPABASE_URL      = '';   // e.g. 'https://abcd1234.supabase.co'
  const SUPABASE_ANON_KEY = '';   // long public 'anon' key from API settings

  const sb = (SUPABASE_URL && SUPABASE_ANON_KEY && window.supabase)
    ? window.supabase.createClient(SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_ANON_KEY)
    : null;

  const form = document.getElementById('headline-form');
  const popup = document.getElementById('submit-popup');
  const popupBody = document.getElementById('popup-body');
  const toggle = document.getElementById('submit-toggle');
  const closeBtn = document.getElementById('popup-close');
  const STORAGE_KEY = 'partyTimes.tips.v1';

  // All the buttons that should open the submission popup
  const openers = [
    document.getElementById('submit-toggle'),
    document.getElementById('submit-toggle-top'),
    document.getElementById('hero-submit-btn'),
    document.getElementById('sidebar-submit-btn')
  ];

  function openPopup() {
    popup.classList.add('open');
    toggle.style.display = 'none';
    // reset to form view in case it was thanked
    restoreForm();
    setTimeout(() => document.getElementById('headline').focus(), 50);
  }
  function closePopup() {
    popup.classList.remove('open');
    toggle.style.display = '';
  }

  openers.forEach(b => b && b.addEventListener('click', openPopup));
  closeBtn.addEventListener('click', closePopup);
  document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
    if (e.key === 'Escape' && popup.classList.contains('open')) closePopup();
  });

  // Save submission silently — does NOT appear on the page.
  // The host can retrieve these later from localStorage,
  // or by typing showTips() in the browser console.
  function saveTip(item) {
    let arr = [];
    try {
      const raw = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
      if (raw) arr = JSON.parse(raw);
    } catch (e) {}
    arr.push(item);
    try { localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(arr)); } catch (e) {}
  }

  // Send the tip to the Supabase 'tips' table. Returns true on success.
  async function sendTipToBackend(item) {
    if (!sb) return false;
    try {
      const { error } = await sb.from('tips').insert({
        section: item.kicker || null,
        headline: item.headline,
        summary: item.summary || null,
        byline: item.byline
      });
      if (error) console.warn('Supabase insert error:', error);
      return !error;
    } catch (e) {
      console.warn('Supabase insert failed:', e);
      return false;
    }
  }

  function showThanks() {
    popupBody.innerHTML = `
      <div class="thanks">
        <div class="stamp">Filed · Off The Record</div>
        <h4>Thanks for the tip.</h4>
        <p>Your headline is locked in the vault until the party on <strong>May 25</strong>.<br>The juiciest ones get read aloud.</p>
        <button class="again" id="submit-again">Submit Another</button>
      </div>
    `;
    document.getElementById('submit-again').addEventListener('click', restoreForm);
    setTimeout(() => {
      // Auto-close after a few seconds
      if (popup.classList.contains('open')) {
        // Keep open so they can submit another — do nothing on auto-close
      }
    }, 4000);
  }

  function restoreForm() {
    popupBody.innerHTML = `
      <p class="intro">A scoop is a terrible thing to waste. Submissions stay private until the party.</p>
      <form id="headline-form" autocomplete="off">
        <label for="kicker">Section</label>
        <input type="text" id="kicker" placeholder="e.g. Gossip, Style, Scandal" maxlength="40" />

        <label for="headline">Headline*</label>
        <input type="text" id="headline" placeholder="Write a snappy headline…" maxlength="140" required />

        <label for="summary">Summary (optional)</label>
        <textarea id="summary" placeholder="A sentence or two of context…" maxlength="280"></textarea>

        <label for="byline">Your Byline <span style="text-transform:none; letter-spacing:0; color:#999;">(optional — leave blank to stay anonymous)</span></label>
        <input type="text" id="byline" placeholder="By Jane Doe" maxlength="60" />

        <button type="submit" class="send">Send To Press</button>
      </form>
    `;
    bindForm();
  }

  function bindForm() {
    const f = document.getElementById('headline-form');
    if (!f) return;
    f.addEventListener('submit', (e) => {
      e.preventDefault();
      const headline = document.getElementById('headline').value.trim();
      let byline = document.getElementById('byline').value.trim();
      if (!headline) return;
      if (!byline) {
        byline = 'By Anonymous';
      } else if (!byline.toLowerCase().startsWith('by ')) {
        byline = 'By ' + byline;
      }
      const item = {
        kicker: document.getElementById('kicker').value.trim(),
        headline,
        summary: document.getElementById('summary').value.trim(),
        byline,
        ts: Date.now()
      };
      saveTip(item);
      showThanks();
    });
  }

  bindForm();

  // Host-only helper — open the browser console and run showTips()
  // to see every submission collected on this device.
  window.showTips = function () {
    try {
      const raw = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
      const arr = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : [];
      console.log('%cPage 6 — Submitted Tips (' + arr.length + ')', 'font-weight:bold; color:#f5d800; background:#000; padding:4px 8px;');
      console.table(arr.map(t => ({
        when: new Date(t.ts).toLocaleString(),
        section: t.kicker,
        headline: t.headline,
        summary: t.summary,
        byline: t.byline
      })));
      return arr;
    } catch (e) {
      console.error(e);
      return [];
    }
  };
  console.log('%cPage 6 host: type showTips() to see submissions.', 'color:#666');
</script>
</body>
</html>
