<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
<title>The Page 6 Party · May 25</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Anton&family=Oswald:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,700;0,900;1,700;1,900&family=Bevan&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700;800;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@supabase/supabase-js@2"></script>
<style>
  :root {
    --black: #0a0a0a;
    --yellow: #f5d800;
    --ink: #111;
    --muted: #666;
    --line: #e6e6e6;
    --bg: #ffffff;
  }
  * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

  body {
    font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--ink);
    line-height: 1.4;
    padding-bottom: 80px;
  }

  /* ---------- Top black header ---------- */
  .top-header {
    background: var(--black);
    color: #fff;
    padding: 14px 24px;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr auto 1fr;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 16px;
  }
  .top-header .left,
  .top-header .right {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 14px;
  }
  .top-header .right { justify-content: flex-end; }

  .nav-btn {
    border: 1.5px solid #fff;
    background: transparent;
    color: #fff;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 13px;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    padding: 8px 14px;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    cursor: pointer;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }
  .nav-btn:hover { background: #fff; color: var(--black); }
  .nav-btn.cta { background: var(--yellow); color: var(--black); border-color: var(--yellow); }
  .nav-btn.cta:hover { background: #fff; border-color: #fff; }

  .icon-btn {
    background: transparent;
    border: none;
    color: #fff;
    cursor: pointer;
    padding: 6px;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
  }
  .icon-btn:hover { color: var(--yellow); }
  .icon-btn svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; }

  .logo {
    font-family: 'Bevan', 'Bookman Old Style', serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-style: normal;
    font-size: clamp(34px, 5vw, 58px);
    line-height: 1;
    color: #fff;
    letter-spacing: 0;
    white-space: nowrap;
    text-transform: none;
  }

  /* Yellow strip */
  .yellow-strip {
    background: var(--yellow);
    height: 8px;
  }

  /* ---------- THE BIG SUBMIT HERO ---------- */
  .submit-hero {
    background: var(--black);
    color: #fff;
    padding: 56px 24px 64px 24px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    border-bottom: 8px solid var(--yellow);
  }
  .submit-hero .inner {
    max-width: 1100px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1.4fr 1fr;
    gap: 56px;
    align-items: center;
  }
  .submit-hero .eyebrow {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 13px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 4px;
    color: var(--yellow);
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
    display: inline-block;
    border-bottom: 3px solid var(--yellow);
    padding-bottom: 4px;
  }
  .submit-hero h1 {
    font-family: 'Bevan', 'Bookman Old Style', serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: clamp(44px, 6.5vw, 84px);
    line-height: 0.95;
    margin-bottom: 18px;
    color: #fff;
    letter-spacing: -0.5px;
  }
  .submit-hero h1 .accent { color: var(--yellow); }
  .submit-hero .deck {
    font-size: 19px;
    line-height: 1.5;
    color: #e8e8e8;
    margin-bottom: 22px;
    max-width: 560px;
  }
  .submit-hero .deck strong { color: #fff; }

  .submit-hero .cta-row {
    display: flex;
    gap: 14px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    align-items: center;
  }
  .submit-hero .big-btn {
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    border: 3px solid var(--yellow);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 17px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    padding: 18px 28px;
    cursor: pointer;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    transition: transform 0.15s, background 0.15s;
  }
  .submit-hero .big-btn:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); background: #fff; border-color: #fff; }
  .submit-hero .big-btn .arrow { font-size: 22px; line-height: 0; }
  .submit-hero .note {
    color: #aaa;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
  }

  /* The "how-it-works" card */
  .how-card {
    background: #fff;
    color: var(--ink);
    padding: 26px 24px 22px 24px;
    position: relative;
    border-top: 6px solid var(--yellow);
  }
  .how-card::before {
    content: 'EXCLUSIVE';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 24px;
    transform: translateY(-50%);
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 12px;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    padding: 6px 12px;
  }
  .how-card h3 {
    font-family: 'Bevan', serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: 28px;
    line-height: 1.05;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    color: var(--ink);
  }
  .how-card ol {
    list-style: none;
    counter-reset: step;
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
  }
  .how-card ol li {
    counter-increment: step;
    padding: 10px 0 10px 42px;
    position: relative;
    font-size: 15px;
    line-height: 1.4;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .how-card ol li:first-child { border-top: none; padding-top: 6px; }
  .how-card ol li::before {
    content: counter(step);
    position: absolute;
    left: 0;
    top: 10px;
    width: 28px;
    height: 28px;
    background: var(--black);
    color: var(--yellow);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 14px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
  }
  .how-card .meta {
    margin-top: 14px;
    padding-top: 14px;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--line);
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    gap: 14px;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 12px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    color: var(--muted);
  }
  .how-card .meta strong { color: var(--ink); }

  /* ---------- Marquee of section labels ---------- */
  .label-strip {
    background: #fffbe0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
    padding: 12px 24px;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #333;
    text-align: center;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .label-strip span { margin: 0 14px; color: var(--ink); font-weight: 600; }
  .label-strip .dot { color: var(--yellow); font-weight: 900; }

  /* ---------- Sample headlines ---------- */
  .page {
    max-width: 1280px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 36px 24px 24px 24px;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 2fr) minmax(280px, 1fr);
    gap: 40px;
  }

  .hero { min-width: 0; }
  .section-title {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    font-size: 14px;
    border-top: 3px solid var(--black);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--black);
    padding: 8px 0;
    margin-bottom: 22px;
    color: var(--black);
  }
  .section-title .tag {
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    padding: 2px 8px;
    margin-right: 8px;
    font-size: 11px;
  }

  /* Lead story */
  .lead-story {
    margin-bottom: 36px;
    padding-bottom: 28px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .lead-story .kicker {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 13px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    color: var(--black);
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
    display: inline-block;
    border-bottom: 3px solid var(--yellow);
    padding-bottom: 2px;
  }
  .lead-story h2 {
    font-family: 'Anton', 'Oswald', Impact, sans-serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: clamp(46px, 6.5vw, 88px);
    line-height: 0.95;
    letter-spacing: -1px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }
  .lead-story .deck {
    font-size: 18px;
    font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 1.4;
    color: #222;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    max-width: 680px;
  }
  .lead-story .byline {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 12px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    color: var(--muted);
  }

  /* Story cards */
  .story-card {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 110px 1fr;
    gap: 18px;
    padding: 18px 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .story-card:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  .story-card .badge {
    width: 100%;
    aspect-ratio: 1 / 1;
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-family: 'Anton', sans-serif;
    font-size: 36px;
    line-height: 1;
    position: relative;
  }
  .story-card:nth-child(odd) .badge { background: var(--black); color: var(--yellow); }
  .story-card .badge .num {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 6px;
    right: 6px;
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    padding: 2px 5px;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  }
  .story-card:nth-child(odd) .badge .num { background: var(--yellow); color: var(--black); }
  .story-card .body { min-width: 0; }
  .story-card .body .kicker {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 11px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    color: #b8000d;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 4px;
  }
  .story-card .body h4 {
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 800;
    font-size: 20px;
    line-height: 1.15;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
  }
  .story-card .body p {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #333;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    line-height: 1.4;
  }
  .story-card .body .byline {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 11px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    color: var(--muted);
  }

  /* Sidebar */
  .sidebar { min-width: 0; }
  .sidebar-cta {
    background: var(--black);
    color: #fff;
    padding: 22px 20px;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
    border-bottom: 5px solid var(--yellow);
    position: relative;
  }
  .sidebar-cta::before {
    content: 'TIPS WANTED';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 20px;
    transform: translateY(-50%);
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    padding: 5px 10px;
  }
  .sidebar-cta h4 {
    font-family: 'Bevan', serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: 22px;
    line-height: 1.1;
    margin: 8px 0 10px 0;
    color: #fff;
  }
  .sidebar-cta p {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #ddd;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
    line-height: 1.4;
  }
  .sidebar-cta button {
    width: 100%;
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    border: none;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 13px;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    padding: 11px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    cursor: pointer;
  }
  .sidebar-cta button:hover { background: #fff; }

  .trending h3 {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    font-size: 18px;
    margin-bottom: 2px;
  }
  .trending .sub {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 12px;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    color: var(--muted);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    border-bottom: 3px solid var(--yellow);
    padding-bottom: 8px;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
    display: inline-block;
  }
  .trending-item {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 90px 1fr;
    gap: 12px;
    padding: 12px 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .trending-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  .trending-item .thumb {
    width: 90px;
    height: 90px;
    background: var(--black);
    color: var(--yellow);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-family: 'Anton', sans-serif;
    font-size: 32px;
    position: relative;
  }
  .trending-item:nth-child(even) .thumb { background: var(--yellow); color: var(--black); }
  .trending-item .thumb .views {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 6px;
    right: 6px;
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 10px;
    padding: 2px 5px;
  }
  .trending-item:nth-child(even) .thumb .views { background: var(--black); color: var(--yellow); }
  .trending-item h5 {
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 14px;
    line-height: 1.3;
  }
  .trending-item .byline {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 10px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    color: var(--muted);
    margin-top: 4px;
  }

  /* ---------- Footer ---------- */
  footer {
    background: var(--black);
    color: #aaa;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 24px;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 11px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    margin-top: 40px;
  }
  footer .yellow { color: var(--yellow); }

  /* ---------- Floating submit popup ---------- */
  .submit-toggle {
    position: fixed;
    bottom: 24px;
    right: 24px;
    z-index: 50;
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    border: 2px solid var(--black);
    padding: 14px 22px;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 13px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    cursor: pointer;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
    transition: transform 0.2s, background 0.2s;
  }
  .submit-toggle:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); background: #fff; }
  .submit-toggle .plus { margin-right: 6px; }

  .submit-popup {
    position: fixed;
    bottom: 24px;
    right: 24px;
    width: 400px;
    max-width: calc(100vw - 48px);
    background: #fff;
    border: 2px solid var(--black);
    box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
    z-index: 60;
    padding: 0;
    display: none;
    animation: popIn 0.2s ease-out;
  }
  .submit-popup.open { display: block; }
  @keyframes popIn {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(10px); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }
  .submit-popup .popup-header {
    background: var(--black);
    color: #fff;
    padding: 14px 18px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    border-bottom: 4px solid var(--yellow);
  }
  .submit-popup .popup-header h3 {
    font-family: 'Bevan', serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: 20px;
    margin: 0;
    color: #fff;
  }
  .submit-popup .close {
    background: transparent;
    border: none;
    color: #fff;
    font-size: 24px;
    cursor: pointer;
    line-height: 1;
  }
  .submit-popup .close:hover { color: var(--yellow); }
  .submit-popup .popup-body { padding: 18px 18px 20px 18px; }
  .submit-popup .intro {
    font-size: 13px;
    color: #333;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    font-style: italic;
  }
  .submit-popup label {
    display: block;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 10px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    color: var(--muted);
    margin-bottom: 4px;
    margin-top: 10px;
    font-weight: 600;
  }
  .submit-popup input[type="text"],
  .submit-popup textarea {
    width: 100%;
    border: 1.5px solid var(--black);
    background: #fff;
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-size: 14px;
    padding: 8px 10px;
    outline: none;
    color: var(--ink);
  }
  .submit-popup textarea { resize: vertical; min-height: 60px; }
  .submit-popup input[type="text"]:focus,
  .submit-popup textarea:focus { border-color: #b8000d; }
  .submit-popup button.send {
    margin-top: 16px;
    width: 100%;
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    border: 2px solid var(--black);
    padding: 12px 16px;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 13px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    cursor: pointer;
  }
  .submit-popup button.send:hover { background: var(--black); color: var(--yellow); }

  /* Thank-you state inside popup */
  .thanks {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 20px 4px 8px 4px;
  }
  .thanks .stamp {
    display: inline-block;
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    padding: 8px 16px;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    font-size: 12px;
    transform: rotate(-3deg);
    margin-bottom: 14px;
    border: 2px solid var(--black);
  }
  .thanks h4 {
    font-family: 'Bevan', serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: 26px;
    line-height: 1.1;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
  }
  .thanks p {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #333;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
    line-height: 1.4;
  }
  .thanks .again {
    background: transparent;
    border: 1.5px solid var(--black);
    color: var(--black);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 12px;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    padding: 10px 16px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    cursor: pointer;
  }
  .thanks .again:hover { background: var(--black); color: var(--yellow); }

  /* ---------- Responsive ---------- */
  @media (max-width: 980px) {
    .submit-hero .inner { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 32px; }
    .page { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 24px; }
    .top-header { grid-template-columns: auto 1fr auto; gap: 8px; }
    .top-header .left .nav-btn { display: none; }
  }
  @media (max-width: 560px) {
    .submit-popup { width: calc(100vw - 32px); right: 16px; bottom: 16px; }
    .submit-toggle { right: 16px; bottom: 16px; }
    .lead-story h2 { font-size: 40px; }
    .story-card { grid-template-columns: 80px 1fr; }
  }

  /* ---------- Admin overlay ---------- */
  .admin-overlay {
    display: none;
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    background: #f3f3f3;
    z-index: 100;
    overflow-y: auto;
  }
  .admin-overlay.open { display: block; }
  .admin-wrap { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 24px 60px; }
  .admin-header {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    background: var(--black);
    color: #fff;
    padding: 16px 24px;
    margin: 0 -24px 24px -24px;
    border-bottom: 6px solid var(--yellow);
  }
  .admin-header h2 {
    font-family: 'Bevan', serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: 28px;
    color: #fff;
  }
  .admin-close {
    background: transparent;
    border: 1.5px solid #fff;
    color: #fff;
    width: 36px; height: 36px;
    font-size: 22px;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-family: serif;
    line-height: 1;
  }
  .admin-close:hover { background: var(--yellow); color: var(--black); border-color: var(--yellow); }
  .admin-section {
    background: #fff;
    padding: 28px;
    border: 1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .admin-section p { font-size: 15px; color: #333; margin-bottom: 14px; line-height: 1.5; }
  .admin-section label {
    display: block;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 11px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    color: var(--muted);
    margin-bottom: 4px;
  }
  .admin-section input[type="email"] {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 360px;
    border: 1.5px solid var(--black);
    background: #fff;
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-size: 15px;
    padding: 10px 12px;
    outline: none;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
  }
  .admin-section input[type="email"]:focus { border-color: #b8000d; }
  .admin-btn {
    display: inline-block;
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    border: 2px solid var(--black);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 13px;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    padding: 11px 18px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    cursor: pointer;
  }
  .admin-btn:hover { background: var(--black); color: var(--yellow); }
  .admin-btn-sm {
    background: #fff;
    color: var(--black);
    border: 1.5px solid var(--black);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    padding: 6px 12px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    cursor: pointer;
  }
  .admin-btn-sm:hover { background: var(--black); color: var(--yellow); }
  .admin-note { font-size: 13px; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 12px; line-height: 1.5; }
  .admin-note.ok { color: #1a7a1a; }
  .admin-note.err { color: #b8000d; }
  .admin-toolbar {
    display: flex;
    gap: 10px;
    align-items: center;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    padding-bottom: 14px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
    margin-bottom: 18px;
  }
  .admin-toolbar #admin-user-label {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 12px;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    color: var(--muted);
    text-transform: uppercase;

  }

  }

  .admin-link { color: var(--yellow); text-decoration: none; margin-left: 8px; opacity: 0.6; }

</style>

</div>

<script>
  // -----------------------------------------------------------------
  // CONFIG — paste your Supabase project URL + anon key here.
  // Setup (one-time, ~5 minutes):
  //   1. Sign up at https://supabase.com  → New project (free tier is fine).
  //   2. SQL Editor → paste & run:
  //        create table tips (
  //          id bigserial primary key,
  //          created_at timestamptz default now(),
  //          section text, headline text not null,
  //          summary text, byline text
  //        );
  //        alter table tips enable row level security;
  //        create policy "anyone can insert" on tips
  //          for insert to anon, authenticated with check (true);
  //        create policy "authenticated can read" on tips
  //          for select to authenticated using (true);
  //   3. Authentication → Providers → Email → enable Magic Link.
  //   4. Authentication → URL Configuration → add your deployed site URL
  //      to "Site URL" and "Redirect URLs".
  //   5. Project Settings → API → copy "Project URL" and "anon public" key
  //      into the two constants below.
  // -----------------------------------------------------------------
  const SUPABASE_URL      = '';   // e.g. 'https://abcd1234.supabase.co'
  const SUPABASE_ANON_KEY = '';   // long public 'anon' key from API settings

  const sb = (SUPABASE_URL && SUPABASE_ANON_KEY && window.supabase)
    ? window.supabase.createClient(SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_ANON_KEY)
    : null;

  const form = document.getElementById('headline-form');
  const popup = document.getElementById('submit-popup');
  const popupBody = document.getElementById('popup-body');
  const toggle = document.getElementById('submit-toggle');
  const closeBtn = document.getElementById('popup-close');
  const STORAGE_KEY = 'partyTimes.tips.v1';

  // All the buttons that should open the submission popup
  const openers = [
    document.getElementById('submit-toggle'),
    document.getElementById('submit-toggle-top'),
    document.getElementById('hero-submit-btn'),
    document.getElementById('sidebar-submit-btn')
  ];

  function openPopup() {
    popup.classList.add('open');
    toggle.style.display = 'none';
    // reset to form view in case it was thanked
    restoreForm();
    setTimeout(() => document.getElementById('headline').focus(), 50);
  }
  function closePopup() {
    popup.classList.remove('open');
    toggle.style.display = '';
  }

  openers.forEach(b => b && b.addEventListener('click', openPopup));
  closeBtn.addEventListener('click', closePopup);
  document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
    if (e.key === 'Escape' && popup.classList.contains('open')) closePopup();
  });

  // Save submission silently — does NOT appear on the page.
  // The host can retrieve these later from localStorage,
  // or by typing showTips() in the browser console.
  function saveTip(item) {
    let arr = [];
    try {
      const raw = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
      if (raw) arr = JSON.parse(raw);
    } catch (e) {}
    arr.push(item);
    try { localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(arr)); } catch (e) {}
  }

  // Send the tip to the Supabase 'tips' table. Returns true on success.
  async function sendTipToBackend(item) {
    if (!sb) return false;
    try {
      const { error } = await sb.from('tips').insert({
        section: item.kicker || null,
        headline: item.headline,
        summary: item.summary || null,
        byline: item.byline
      });
      if (error) console.warn('Supabase insert error:', error);
      return !error;
    } catch (e) {
      console.warn('Supabase insert failed:', e);
      return false;
    }
  }

  function showThanks() {
    popupBody.innerHTML = `
      <div class="thanks">
        <div class="stamp">Filed · Off The Record</div>
        <h4>Thanks for the tip.</h4>
        <p>Your headline is locked in the vault until the party on <strong>May 25</strong>.<br>The juiciest ones get read aloud.</p>
        <button class="again" id="submit-again">Submit Another</button>
      </div>
    `;
    document.getElementById('submit-again').addEventListener('click', restoreForm);
    setTimeout(() => {
      // Auto-close after a few seconds
      if (popup.classList.contains('open')) {
        // Keep open so they can submit another — do nothing on auto-close
      }
    }, 4000);
  }

  function restoreForm() {
    popupBody.innerHTML = `
      <p class="intro">A scoop is a terrible thing to waste. Submissions stay private until the party.</p>
      <form id="headline-form" autocomplete="off">
        <label for="kicker">Section</label>
        <input type="text" id="kicker" placeholder="e.g. Gossip, Style, Scandal" maxlength="40" />

        <label for="headline">Headline*</label>
        <input type="text" id="headline" placeholder="Write a snappy headline…" maxlength="140" required />

        <label for="summary">Summary (optional)</label>
        <textarea id="summary" placeholder="A sentence or two of context…" maxlength="280"></textarea>

        <label for="byline">Your Byline <span style="text-transform:none; letter-spacing:0; color:#999;">(optional — leave blank to stay anonymous)</span></label>
        <input type="text" id="byline" placeholder="By Jane Doe" maxlength="60" />

        <button type="submit" class="send">Send To Press</button>
      </form>
    `;
    bindForm();
  }

  function bindForm() {
    const f = document.getElementById('headline-form');
    if (!f) return;
    f.addEventListener('submit', (e) => {
      e.preventDefault();
      const headline = document.getElementById('headline').value.trim();
      let byline = document.getElementById('byline').value.trim();
      if (!headline) return;
      if (!byline) {
        byline = 'By Anonymous';
      } else if (!byline.toLowerCase().startsWith('by ')) {
        byline = 'By ' + byline;
      }
      const item = {
        kicker: document.getElementById('kicker').value.trim(),
        headline,
        summary: document.getElementById('summary').value.trim(),
        byline,
        ts: Date.now()
      };
      saveTip(item);                     // local backup on this device
      sendTipToBackend(item);            // fire-and-forget to Supabase
      showThanks();
    });
  }

  bindForm();

  // Host-only helper — open the browser console and run showTips()
  // to see every submission collected on this device.
  window.showTips = function () {
    try {
      const raw = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
      const arr = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : [];
      console.log('%cPage 6 — Submitted Tips (' + arr.length + ')', 'font-weight:bold; color:#f5d800; background:#000; padding:4px 8px;');
      console.table(arr.map(t => ({
        when: new Date(t.ts).toLocaleString(),
        section: t.kicker,
        headline: t.headline,
        summary: t.summary,
        byline: t.byline
      })));
      return arr;
    } catch (e) {
      console.error(e);
      return [];
    }
  };
  console.log('%cPage 6 host: type showTips() to see submissions.', 'color:#666');
</script>
</body>
</html>

[View your site](computer:///Users/sebastian/Library/Application Support/Claude/local-agent-mode-sessions/89cbab50-0fb3-4368-941c-4a9db031e0ba/e9e996a0-ad85-4a19-8e56-fc4c6ccf761c/local_e947efda-5e19-4502-ab2b-d0a9b213d26c/outputs/index.html)

The plumbing is all wired up. Here's what's now in the file and what you need to do to make it live.

**What changed in the code**

Submissions now POST to a Supabase `tips` table. There's an `#admin` route (visit `yoursite.com/#admin` or click the tiny "Admin" link in the footer) that opens a sign-in panel. Sign in with a one-time magic link sent to your email, and you'll see a sortable table of every submission with Refresh, Export CSV, and Sign Out buttons. Local-storage backup is still in place so a tip never disappears if the network is flaky during submission.

**Step 1 — Supabase project (5 min)**

Go to [supabase.com](https://supabase.com), sign up (free), and create a new project. Pick any name and a strong DB password, wait ~2 minutes for it to provision.

Once it's up, click "SQL Editor" in the left nav, hit "New query", paste this in, and run it:

```sql
create table tips (
  id bigserial primary key,
  created_at timestamptz default now(),
  section text,
  headline text not null,
  summary text,
  byline text
);

alter table tips enable row level security;

create policy "anyone can insert"
  on tips for insert
  to anon, authenticated
  with check (true);

create policy "authenticated can read"
  on tips for select
  to authenticated
  using (true);
```

Then go to **Authentication → Providers → Email** and confirm "Enable Email provider" + "Enable magic links" are both on. Under **Authentication → URL Configuration**, you'll add your deployed site URL in a minute (after Step 3).

**Step 2 — Paste your keys**

Go to **Project Settings → API**. Copy the "Project URL" and the "anon public" key, then open `index.html` and find this near the top of the `<script>` block:

```js
const SUPABASE_URL      = '';
const SUPABASE_ANON_KEY = '';
```

Paste your values into the quotes.

**Step 3 — Get the site online**

Easiest path: go to [app.netlify.com/drop](https://app.netlify.com/drop) and drag `index.html` (or the whole `outputs` folder) onto the page. You'll get a URL like `https://hungry-newton-12ab34.netlify.app` instantly. No account required for the temporary URL, but signing up lets you claim it permanently and add a custom domain.

Other one-click options if you prefer: [Vercel](https://vercel.com/new), [Cloudflare Pages](https://pages.cloudflare.com), or [GitHub Pages](https://pages.github.com).

**Step 4 — Tell Supabase your URL**

Back in Supabase, go to **Authentication → URL Configuration** and paste your deployed URL into both "Site URL" and "Redirect URLs". This is what lets the magic-link email send you back to the right place.

**Done. To test:**

Open your deployed site, submit a test headline. Then visit `yoursite.com/#admin`, enter your email, click the magic link in your inbox, and you should see the test tip in the table.

Want me to also lock the admin to only your email (so even if someone else signs up they can't view the table)? Easy tweak — just say the word and I'll update the RLS policy.

  section text,
  headline text not null,
  summary text,
  byline text
);

alter table tips enable row level security;

create policy "anyone can insert"
  on tips for insert
  to anon, authenticated
  with check (true);

create policy "authenticated can read"
  on tips for select
  to authenticated
  using (true);
```

Then go to **Authentication → Providers → Email** and confirm "Enable Email provider" + "Enable magic links" are both on. Under **Authentication → URL Configuration**, you'll add your deployed site URL in a minute (after Step 3).

**Step 2 — Paste your keys**

Go to **Project Settings → API**. Copy the "Project URL" and the "anon public" key, then open `index.html` and find this near the top of the `<script>` block:

```js
const SUPABASE_URL      = '';
const SUPABASE_ANON_KEY = '';
```

Paste your values into the quotes.

**Step 3 — Get the site online**

Easiest path: go to [app.netlify.com/drop](https://app.netlify.com/drop) and drag `index.html` (or the whole `outputs` folder) onto the page. You'll get a URL like `https://hungry-newton-12ab34.netlify.app` instantly. No account required for the temporary URL, but signing up lets you claim it permanently and add a custom domain.

Other one-click options if you prefer: [Vercel](https://vercel.com/new), [Cloudflare Pages](https://pages.cloudflare.com), or [GitHub Pages](https://pages.github.com).

**Step 4 — Tell Supabase your URL**

Back in Supabase, go to **Authentication → URL Configuration** and paste your deployed URL into both "Site URL" and "Redirect URLs". This is what lets the magic-link email send you back to the right place.

**Done. To test:**

Open your deployed site, submit a test headline. Then visit `yoursite.com/#admin`, enter your email, click the magic link in your inbox, and you should see the test tip in the table.

Want me to also lock the admin to only your email (so even if someone else signs up they can't view the table)? Easy tweak — just say the word and I'll update the RLS policy.

input.content:
# Page 6 Party

A headline-submission site for a party. Guests submit "scoops" via a popup form;
the host reads them via a password-protected admin table.

Stack: static HTML + tiny Express server + Render Postgres.

## Deploy

### 1. Push to GitHub

```bash
cd outputs
git init
git add .
git commit -m "Initial commit"
git branch -M main
# create an empty repo on github.com first, then:
git remote add origin git@github.com:YOUR-USER/page-six-party.git
git push -u origin main
```

### 2. Deploy on Render

1. Go to https://dashboard.render.com/blueprints and click **New Blueprint Instance**.
2. Connect your GitHub repo. Render reads `render.yaml` and proposes a web service plus a free Postgres database.
3. Approve. First deploy takes ~3 minutes.
4. When it's up, click into the web service, open the **Environment** tab, and copy the auto-generated `ADMIN_PASSWORD` value. Keep it somewhere safe — that's the admin login password.

### 3. Use it

- The party site lives at your Render URL, e.g. `https://page-six-party.onrender.com`.
- The admin view is the same URL with `#admin` appended (or click the small "Admin" link in the footer). Enter the password copied above to see the table of submissions.

## Local development

```bash
npm install
ADMIN_PASSWORD=test \
DATABASE_URL=postgres://localhost/page_six \
npm start
# visit http://localhost:10000
```

## Notes

- **Free web service sleeps after 15 min** of inactivity. First request after sleep takes ~30s to wake. Visit the site 5 minutes before guests arrive to pre-warm it.
- **Free Postgres expires after 90 days**. After that, upgrade to the $7/month tier or migrate. Fine for a one-off party.
- All submissions live in the `tips` table. Use `Export CSV` in the admin view to save a backup.

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
<title>The Page 6 Party · May 25</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Anton&family=Oswald:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,700;0,900;1,700;1,900&family=Bevan&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700;800;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@supabase/supabase-js@2"></script>
<style>
  :root {
    --black: #0a0a0a;
    --yellow: #f5d800;
    --ink: #111;
    --muted: #666;
    --line: #e6e6e6;
    --bg: #ffffff;
  }
  * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

  body {
    font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--ink);
    line-height: 1.4;
    padding-bottom: 80px;
  }

  /* ---------- Top black header ---------- */
  .top-header {
    background: var(--black);
    color: #fff;
    padding: 14px 24px;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr auto 1fr;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 16px;
  }
  .top-header .left,
  .top-header .right {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 14px;
  }
  .top-header .right { justify-content: flex-end; }

  .nav-btn {
    border: 1.5px solid #fff;
    background: transparent;
    color: #fff;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 13px;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    padding: 8px 14px;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    cursor: pointer;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }
  .nav-btn:hover { background: #fff; color: var(--black); }
  .nav-btn.cta { background: var(--yellow); color: var(--black); border-color: var(--yellow); }
  .nav-btn.cta:hover { background: #fff; border-color: #fff; }

  .icon-btn {
    background: transparent;
    border: none;
    color: #fff;
    cursor: pointer;
    padding: 6px;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
  }
  .icon-btn:hover { color: var(--yellow); }
  .icon-btn svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; }

  .logo {
    font-family: 'Bevan', 'Bookman Old Style', serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-style: normal;
    font-size: clamp(34px, 5vw, 58px);
    line-height: 1;
    color: #fff;
    letter-spacing: 0;
    white-space: nowrap;
    text-transform: none;
  }

  /* Yellow strip */
  .yellow-strip {
    background: var(--yellow);
    height: 8px;
  }

  /* ---------- THE BIG SUBMIT HERO ---------- */
  .submit-hero {
    background: var(--black);
    color: #fff;
    padding: 56px 24px 64px 24px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    border-bottom: 8px solid var(--yellow);
  }
  .submit-hero .inner {
    max-width: 1100px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1.4fr 1fr;
    gap: 56px;
    align-items: center;
  }
  .submit-hero .eyebrow {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 13px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 4px;
    color: var(--yellow);
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
    display: inline-block;
    border-bottom: 3px solid var(--yellow);
    padding-bottom: 4px;
  }
  .submit-hero h1 {
    font-family: 'Bevan', 'Bookman Old Style', serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: clamp(44px, 6.5vw, 84px);
    line-height: 0.95;
    margin-bottom: 18px;
    color: #fff;
    letter-spacing: -0.5px;
  }
  .submit-hero h1 .accent { color: var(--yellow); }
  .submit-hero .deck {
    font-size: 19px;
    line-height: 1.5;
    color: #e8e8e8;
    margin-bottom: 22px;
    max-width: 560px;
  }
  .submit-hero .deck strong { color: #fff; }

  .submit-hero .cta-row {
    display: flex;
    gap: 14px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    align-items: center;
  }
  .submit-hero .big-btn {
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    border: 3px solid var(--yellow);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 17px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    padding: 18px 28px;
    cursor: pointer;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    transition: transform 0.15s, background 0.15s;
  }
  .submit-hero .big-btn:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); background: #fff; border-color: #fff; }
  .submit-hero .big-btn .arrow { font-size: 22px; line-height: 0; }
  .submit-hero .note {
    color: #aaa;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
  }

  /* The "how-it-works" card */
  .how-card {
    background: #fff;
    color: var(--ink);
    padding: 26px 24px 22px 24px;
    position: relative;
    border-top: 6px solid var(--yellow);
  }
  .how-card::before {
    content: 'EXCLUSIVE';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 24px;
    transform: translateY(-50%);
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 12px;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    padding: 6px 12px;
  }
  .how-card h3 {
    font-family: 'Bevan', serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: 28px;
    line-height: 1.05;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    color: var(--ink);
  }
  .how-card ol {
    list-style: none;
    counter-reset: step;
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
  }
  .how-card ol li {
    counter-increment: step;
    padding: 10px 0 10px 42px;
    position: relative;
    font-size: 15px;
    line-height: 1.4;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .how-card ol li:first-child { border-top: none; padding-top: 6px; }
  .how-card ol li::before {
    content: counter(step);
    position: absolute;
    left: 0;
    top: 10px;
    width: 28px;
    height: 28px;
    background: var(--black);
    color: var(--yellow);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 14px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
  }
  .how-card .meta {
    margin-top: 14px;
    padding-top: 14px;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--line);
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    gap: 14px;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 12px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    color: var(--muted);
  }
  .how-card .meta strong { color: var(--ink); }

  /* ---------- Marquee of section labels ---------- */
  .label-strip {
    background: #fffbe0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
    padding: 12px 24px;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #333;
    text-align: center;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .label-strip span { margin: 0 14px; color: var(--ink); font-weight: 600; }
  .label-strip .dot { color: var(--yellow); font-weight: 900; }

  /* ---------- Sample headlines ---------- */
  .page {
    max-width: 1280px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 36px 24px 24px 24px;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 2fr) minmax(280px, 1fr);
    gap: 40px;
  }

  .hero { min-width: 0; }
  .section-title {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    font-size: 14px;
    border-top: 3px solid var(--black);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--black);
    padding: 8px 0;
    margin-bottom: 22px;
    color: var(--black);
  }
  .section-title .tag {
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    padding: 2px 8px;
    margin-right: 8px;
    font-size: 11px;
  }

  /* Lead story */
  .lead-story {
    margin-bottom: 36px;
    padding-bottom: 28px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .lead-story .kicker {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 13px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    color: var(--black);
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
    display: inline-block;
    border-bottom: 3px solid var(--yellow);
    padding-bottom: 2px;
  }
  .lead-story h2 {
    font-family: 'Anton', 'Oswald', Impact, sans-serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: clamp(46px, 6.5vw, 88px);
    line-height: 0.95;
    letter-spacing: -1px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }
  .lead-story .deck {
    font-size: 18px;
    font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 1.4;
    color: #222;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    max-width: 680px;
  }
  .lead-story .byline {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 12px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    color: var(--muted);
  }

  /* Story cards */
  .story-card {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 110px 1fr;
    gap: 18px;
    padding: 18px 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .story-card:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  .story-card .badge {
    width: 100%;
    aspect-ratio: 1 / 1;
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-family: 'Anton', sans-serif;
    font-size: 36px;
    line-height: 1;
    position: relative;
  }
  .story-card:nth-child(odd) .badge { background: var(--black); color: var(--yellow); }
  .story-card .badge .num {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 6px;
    right: 6px;
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    padding: 2px 5px;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  }
  .story-card:nth-child(odd) .badge .num { background: var(--yellow); color: var(--black); }
  .story-card .body { min-width: 0; }
  .story-card .body .kicker {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 11px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    color: #b8000d;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 4px;
  }
  .story-card .body h4 {
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 800;
    font-size: 20px;
    line-height: 1.15;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
  }
  .story-card .body p {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #333;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    line-height: 1.4;
  }
  .story-card .body .byline {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 11px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    color: var(--muted);
  }

  /* Sidebar */
  .sidebar { min-width: 0; }
  .sidebar-cta {
    background: var(--black);
    color: #fff;
    padding: 22px 20px;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
    border-bottom: 5px solid var(--yellow);
    position: relative;
  }
  .sidebar-cta::before {
    content: 'TIPS WANTED';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 20px;
    transform: translateY(-50%);
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    padding: 5px 10px;
  }
  .sidebar-cta h4 {
    font-family: 'Bevan', serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: 22px;
    line-height: 1.1;
    margin: 8px 0 10px 0;
    color: #fff;
  }
  .sidebar-cta p {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #ddd;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
    line-height: 1.4;
  }
  .sidebar-cta button {
    width: 100%;
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    border: none;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 13px;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    padding: 11px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    cursor: pointer;
  }

  /* ---------- Floating submit popup ---------- */
  .submit-toggle {

  .submit-popup {

  /* Thank-you state inside popup */

  /* ---------- Responsive ---------- */
  @media (max-width: 980px) {

  /* ---------- Admin overlay ---------- */
  .admin-overlay {

  .admin-wrap { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 24px 60px; }

  .admin-section {

<!-- Top black header -->
<header class="top-header">
  <div class="left">
    <button class="nav-btn" aria-label="Sections">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" width="14" height="14"><line x1="3" y1="6" x2="21" y2="6"/><line x1="3" y1="12" x2="21" y2="12"/><line x1="3" y1="18" x2="21" y2="18"/></svg>

    </button>

      Submit a Tip
    </button>
    <button class="nav-btn">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" width="14" height="14"><path d="M20 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-4-4H8a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v2"/><circle cx="12" cy="7" r="4"/></svg>
      Log In
    </button>
  </div>
</header>

<div class="yellow-strip"></div>

<!-- THE BIG SUBMIT HERO -->
<section class="submit-hero">
  <div class="inner">
    <div>
      <div class="eyebrow">Monday, May 25 · Invite Only</div>
      <h1>You Are<br>The <span class="accent">Headline.</span></h1>
      <p class="deck">
        Welcome to the <strong>Page 6 Party</strong>. This year, the gossip writes itself — because <strong>you write it.</strong>
        Submit your hottest, most scandalous, completely-fabricated-or-not-at-all headlines.
        The best ones will be read aloud, printed, and immortalized at the party.
      </p>
      <div class="cta-row">
        <button class="big-btn" id="hero-submit-btn">
          Submit Your Headline <span class="arrow">›</span>
        </button>
        <span class="note">Takes 30 seconds · Submissions are private</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <aside class="how-card">
      <h3>How It Works</h3>
      <ol>
        <li>Hit the yellow <strong>Submit</strong> button — top right or bottom of the page.</li>
        <li>Write a headline. The juicier, sillier, or more dramatic, the better.</li>
        <li>Add your byline so we know who broke the story — or stay anonymous if you want.</li>
        <li>Send to press. The best headlines get the spotlight on <strong>May 25</strong>.</li>
      </ol>
      <div class="meta">
        <span>Deadline · <strong>May 25, 6 PM</strong></span>
        <span>Submissions · <strong>Unlimited</strong></span>
      </div>
    </aside>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Label strip -->
<div class="label-strip">
  <span>Gossip</span><span class="dot">✦</span>
  <span>Sighted</span><span class="dot">✦</span>
  <span>Scandal</span><span class="dot">✦</span>
  <span>Style</span><span class="dot">✦</span>
  <span>Overheard</span><span class="dot">✦</span>
  <span>Power Couples</span><span class="dot">✦</span>
  <span>Exclusives</span>
</div>

<!-- Sample headlines (static / decorative) -->
<main class="page">
  <section class="hero">
    <h3 class="section-title"><span class="tag">SAMPLE</span> What A Headline Looks Like</h3>

    <article class="lead-story">
      <div class="kicker">Breaking</div>
      <h2>Sandals With Socks Sweep The Floor; Crowd Stunned</h2>
      <p class="deck">A bold sartorial choice has divided the dancefloor into believers and skeptics. By the second chorus, the skeptics had quietly converted.</p>
      <div class="byline">By A Concerned Onlooker</div>
    </article>

    <article class="story-card">
      <div class="badge">♥<span class="num">38,204</span></div>
      <div class="body">
        <div class="kicker">Gossip</div>
        <h4>Mystery Kitchen Romance Stuns Cheese Plate Witnesses</h4>
        <p>Sources close to the brie report prolonged eye contact and at least one shared cracker.</p>
        <div class="byline">By Our Hallway Correspondent</div>
      </div>
    </article>

    <article class="story-card">
      <div class="badge">!<span class="num">52,910</span></div>
      <div class="body">
        <div class="kicker">Politics</div>
        <h4>Aux Cord Coup In Progress; DJ Cries Foul</h4>
        <p>A peaceful transition of power is, as of press time, not assured. Negotiations now hinge on a single Robyn track.</p>
        <div class="byline">By The Living Room Bureau</div>
      </div>
    </article>

    <article class="story-card">
      <div class="badge">✦<span class="num">27,341</span></div>
      <div class="body">
        <div class="kicker">Style</div>
        <h4>Two-Fisted Drinking Officially Declared "A Look"</h4>
        <p>Fashion editors stunned. "It just makes sense," said one early adopter, gesturing with both.</p>
        <div class="byline">By The Fashion Desk</div>
      </div>
    </article>

    <article class="story-card">
      <div class="badge">◉<span class="num">61,005</span></div>
      <div class="body">
        <div class="kicker">Sighted</div>
        <h4>Plus-One Arrives With Three Bottles, Is Immediately Adored</h4>
        <p>Identity still being verified. The wine, however, has been authenticated and consumed.</p>
        <div class="byline">By A Doorway Source</div>
      </div>
    </article>

    <article class="story-card">
      <div class="badge">✖<span class="num">44,872</span></div>
      <div class="body">
        <div class="kicker">Scandal</div>
        <h4>Cake Cut At Improper Angle; Etiquette Columnist "Resting"</h4>
        <p>The breach occurred at 10:47 PM. A second slice has since stabilized the situation.</p>
        <div class="byline">By The Dessert Desk</div>
      </div>
    </article>
  </section>

  <aside class="sidebar">
    <div class="sidebar-cta">
      <h4>Got A Scoop? File It Now.</h4>
      <p>The party's whole point is the headlines you write. Don't let anyone else get the byline on a story you saw first.</p>
      <button id="sidebar-submit-btn">Submit Your Headline</button>
    </div>

    <div class="trending">

      <div class="sub">Sample Headlines</div>

          <div class="byline">By The Couch Bureau</div>
        </div>
      </div>

  </aside>
</main>

<footer>The Page 6 Party · <span class="yellow">May 25</span> · All The News That Fits, We Print <a href="#admin" class="admin-link">· Admin</a></footer>

      <div class="admin-stats" id="admin-stats"></div>
      <div class="admin-table-wrap">
        <table class="admin-table" id="admin-table">
          <thead><tr><th>When</th><th>Section</th><th>Headline</th><th>Summary</th><th>Byline</th></tr></thead>
          <tbody></tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
  // -----------------------------------------------------------------
  // CONFIG — paste your Supabase project URL + anon key here.
  // Setup (one-time, ~5 minutes):
  //   1. Sign up at https://supabase.com  → New project (free tier is fine).
  //   2. SQL Editor → paste & run:
  //        create table tips (
  //          id bigserial primary key,
  //          created_at timestamptz default now(),
  //          section text, headline text not null,
  //          summary text, byline text
  //        );
  //        alter table tips enable row level security;
  //        create policy "anyone can insert" on tips
  //          for insert to anon, authenticated with check (true);
  //        create policy "authenticated can read" on tips
  //          for select to authenticated using (true);
  //   3. Authentication → Providers → Email → enable Magic Link.
  //   4. Authentication → URL Configuration → add your deployed site URL
  //      to "Site URL" and "Redirect URLs".
  //   5. Project Settings → API → copy "Project URL" and "anon public" key
  //      into the two constants below.
  // -----------------------------------------------------------------
  const SUPABASE_URL      = '';   // e.g. 'https://abcd1234.supabase.co'
  const SUPABASE_ANON_KEY = '';   // long public 'anon' key from API settings

  const sb = (SUPABASE_URL && SUPABASE_ANON_KEY && window.supabase)
    ? window.supabase.createClient(SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_ANON_KEY)
    : null;

  const form = document.getElementById('headline-form');
  const popup = document.getElementById('submit-popup');
  const popupBody = document.getElementById('popup-body');
  const toggle = document.getElementById('submit-toggle');
  const closeBtn = document.getElementById('popup-close');
  const STORAGE_KEY = 'partyTimes.tips.v1';

  // All the buttons that should open the submission popup
  const openers = [
    document.getElementById('submit-toggle'),
    document.getElementById('submit-toggle-top'),
    document.getElementById('hero-submit-btn'),
    document.getElementById('sidebar-submit-btn')
  ];

  function openPopup() {
    popup.classList.add('open');
    toggle.style.display = 'none';
    // reset to form view in case it was thanked
    restoreForm();
    setTimeout(() => document.getElementById('headline').focus(), 50);
  }
  function closePopup() {
    popup.classList.remove('open');
    toggle.style.display = '';
  }

  openers.forEach(b => b && b.addEventListener('click', openPopup));
  closeBtn.addEventListener('click', closePopup);
  document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
    if (e.key === 'Escape' && popup.classList.contains('open')) closePopup();
  });

  // Save submission silently — does NOT appear on the page.
  // The host can retrieve these later from localStorage,
  // or by typing showTips() in the browser console.
  function saveTip(item) {
    let arr = [];
    try {
      const raw = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
      if (raw) arr = JSON.parse(raw);
    } catch (e) {}
    arr.push(item);
    try { localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(arr)); } catch (e) {}
  }

  // Send the tip to the Supabase 'tips' table. Returns true on success.
  async function sendTipToBackend(item) {
    if (!sb) return false;
    try {
      const { error } = await sb.from('tips').insert({
        section: item.kicker || null,
        headline: item.headline,
        summary: item.summary || null,
        byline: item.byline
      });
      if (error) console.warn('Supabase insert error:', error);
      return !error;
    } catch (e) {
      console.warn('Supabase insert failed:', e);
      return false;
    }
  }

  function showThanks() {
    popupBody.innerHTML = `
      <div class="thanks">
        <div class="stamp">Filed · Off The Record</div>
        <h4>Thanks for the tip.</h4>
        <p>Your headline is locked in the vault until the party on <strong>May 25</strong>.<br>The juiciest ones get read aloud.</p>
        <button class="again" id="submit-again">Submit Another</button>
      </div>
    `;
    document.getElementById('submit-again').addEventListener('click', restoreForm);
    setTimeout(() => {
      // Auto-close after a few seconds
      if (popup.classList.contains('open')) {
        // Keep open so they can submit another — do nothing on auto-close
      }
    }, 4000);
  }

  function restoreForm() {
    popupBody.innerHTML = `
      <p class="intro">A scoop is a terrible thing to waste. Submissions stay private until the party.</p>
      <form id="headline-form" autocomplete="off">
        <label for="kicker">Section</label>
        <input type="text" id="kicker" placeholder="e.g. Gossip, Style, Scandal" maxlength="40" />

        <label for="headline">Headline*</label>
        <input type="text" id="headline" placeholder="Write a snappy headline…" maxlength="140" required />

        <label for="summary">Summary (optional)</label>
        <textarea id="summary" placeholder="A sentence or two of context…" maxlength="280"></textarea>

        <label for="byline">Your Byline <span style="text-transform:none; letter-spacing:0; color:#999;">(optional — leave blank to stay anonymous)</span></label>
        <input type="text" id="byline" placeholder="By Jane Doe" maxlength="60" />

        <button type="submit" class="send">Send To Press</button>
      </form>
    `;
    bindForm();
  }

  function bindForm() {
    const f = document.getElementById('headline-form');
    if (!f) return;
    f.addEventListener('submit', (e) => {
      e.preventDefault();
      const headline = document.getElementById('headline').value.trim();
      let byline = document.getElementById('byline').value.trim();
      if (!headline) return;
      if (!byline) {
        byline = 'By Anonymous';
      } else if (!byline.toLowerCase().startsWith('by ')) {
        byline = 'By ' + byline;
      }
      const item = {
        kicker: document.getElementById('kicker').value.trim(),
        headline,
        summary: document.getElementById('summary').value.trim(),
        byline,
        ts: Date.now()
      };
      saveTip(item);                     // local backup on this device
      sendTipToBackend(item);            // fire-and-forget to Supabase
      showThanks();
    });
  }

  bindForm();

  // Host-only helper — open the browser console and run showTips()
  // to see every submission collected on this device.
  window.showTips = function () {
    try {
      const raw = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
      const arr = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : [];
      console.log('%cPage 6 — Submitted Tips (' + arr.length + ')', 'font-weight:bold; color:#f5d800; background:#000; padding:4px 8px;');
      console.table(arr.map(t => ({
        when: new Date(t.ts).toLocaleString(),
        section: t.kicker,
        headline: t.headline,
        summary: t.summary,
        byline: t.byline
      })));
      return arr;
    } catch (e) {
      console.error(e);
      return [];
    }
  };
  console.log('%cPage 6 host: type showTips() to see submissions saved on this device.', 'color:#666');

  // -----------------------------------------------------------------
  // ADMIN — hash-routed (#admin). Magic-link sign-in via Supabase.
  // -----------------------------------------------------------------
  const adminOverlay   = document.getElementById('admin-overlay');
  const adminLogin     = document.getElementById('admin-login');
  const adminView      = document.getElementById('admin-view');
  const adminMsg       = document.getElementById('admin-login-msg');
  const adminClose     = document.getElementById('admin-close');
  const adminTableBody = document.querySelector('#admin-table tbody');
  const adminStats     = document.getElementById('admin-stats');
  const adminUserLabel = document.getElementById('admin-user-label');

  function adminEscape(s) {
    return String(s == null ? '' : s)
      .replace(/&/g, '&').replace(/</g, '<').replace(/>/g, '>')
      .replace(/"/g, '"').replace(/'/g, ''');
  }

  function isAdminRoute() { return window.location.hash === '#admin'; }
  function openAdmin() {
    adminOverlay.classList.add('open');
    document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
    refreshAdminState();
  }
  function closeAdmin() {
    adminOverlay.classList.remove('open');
    document.body.style.overflow = '';
    if (window.location.hash === '#admin') {
      history.replaceState(null, '', window.location.pathname + window.location.search);
    }
  }
  adminClose.addEventListener('click', closeAdmin);
  window.addEventListener('hashchange', () => { if (isAdminRoute()) openAdmin(); });

  async function refreshAdminState() {
    if (!sb) {
      adminLogin.hidden = false;
      adminView.hidden = true;
      adminMsg.className = 'admin-note err';
      adminMsg.textContent = 'Supabase isn\'t configured yet. Open the source and fill in SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_ANON_KEY at the top of the script.';
      return;
    }
    const { data: { session } } = await sb.auth.getSession();
    if (session && session.user) {
      adminLogin.hidden = true;
      adminView.hidden = false;
      adminUserLabel.textContent = 'Signed in as ' + session.user.email;
      await loadTips();
    } else {
      adminLogin.hidden = false;
      adminView.hidden = true;
    }
  }

  document.getElementById('admin-login-form').addEventListener('submit', async (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    const email = document.getElementById('admin-email').value.trim();
    if (!sb) {
      adminMsg.className = 'admin-note err';
      adminMsg.textContent = 'Supabase not configured.';
      return;
    }
    adminMsg.className = 'admin-note';
    adminMsg.textContent = 'Sending magic link…';
    const { error } = await sb.auth.signInWithOtp({
      email,
      options: { emailRedirectTo: window.location.origin + window.location.pathname + '#admin' }
    });
    if (error) {
      adminMsg.className = 'admin-note err';
      adminMsg.textContent = 'Error: ' + error.message;
    } else {
      adminMsg.className = 'admin-note ok';
      adminMsg.textContent = 'Magic link sent to ' + email + '. Click the link in your inbox to sign in. (Check spam if it doesn\'t arrive.)';
    }
  });

  let cachedTips = [];

  async function loadTips() {
    if (!sb) return;
    adminStats.textContent = 'Loading…';
    const { data, error } = await sb
      .from('tips')
      .select('*')
      .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
    if (error) {
      adminStats.innerHTML = 'Error: <strong>' + adminEscape(error.message) + '</strong>';
      adminTableBody.innerHTML = '';
      return;
    }
    cachedTips = data || [];
    renderTipsTable(cachedTips);
  }

  function renderTipsTable(tips) {
    const total  = tips.length;
    const last24 = tips.filter(t => Date.now() - new Date(t.created_at).getTime() < 86400000).length;
    adminStats.innerHTML = 'Total submissions: <strong>' + total + '</strong> · Last 24h: <strong>' + last24 + '</strong>';
    adminTableBody.innerHTML = tips.length
      ? tips.map(t => '<tr>' +
          '<td>' + adminEscape(new Date(t.created_at).toLocaleString()) + '</td>' +
          '<td>' + adminEscape(t.section) + '</td>' +
          '<td>' + adminEscape(t.headline) + '</td>' +
          '<td>' + adminEscape(t.summary) + '</td>' +
          '<td>' + adminEscape(t.byline) + '</td>' +
        '</tr>').join('')
      : '<tr><td colspan="5" style="text-align:center;padding:32px;color:#999;font-style:italic;">No submissions yet.</td></tr>';
  }

  document.getElementById('admin-refresh').addEventListener('click', loadTips);
  document.getElementById('admin-signout').addEventListener('click', async () => {
    if (!sb) return;
    await sb.auth.signOut();
    refreshAdminState();
  });
  document.getElementById('admin-export').addEventListener('click', () => {
    const rows = [['When', 'Section', 'Headline', 'Summary', 'Byline']];
    cachedTips.forEach(t => rows.push([
      new Date(t.created_at).toISOString(),
      t.section || '',
      t.headline || '',
      t.summary || '',
      t.byline || ''
    ]));
    const csv = rows.map(r => r.map(c => '"' + String(c).replace(/"/g, '""') + '"').join(',')).join('\n');
    const blob = new Blob([csv], { type: 'text/csv;charset=utf-8' });
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const a = document.createElement('a');
    a.href = url;
    a.download = 'page6-tips-' + new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10) + '.csv';
    a.click();
    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
  });

  // React to magic-link redirect (Supabase parses the URL hash & fires a SIGNED_IN event)
  if (sb) {
    sb.auth.onAuthStateChange((event) => {
      if (event === 'SIGNED_IN' || event === 'SIGNED_OUT') {
        if (isAdminRoute()) refreshAdminState();
      }
    });
  }

  if (isAdminRoute()) openAdmin();
</script>
</body>
</html>

tool_use_result.originalFile:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
<title>The Page 6 Party · May 25</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Anton&family=Oswald:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,700;0,900;1,700;1,900&family=Bevan&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700;800;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --black: #0a0a0a;
    --yellow: #f5d800;
    --ink: #111;
    --muted: #666;
    --line: #e6e6e6;
    --bg: #ffffff;
  }
  * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

  body {
    font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--ink);
    line-height: 1.4;
    padding-bottom: 80px;
  }

  /* ---------- Top black header ---------- */
  .top-header {
    background: var(--black);
    color: #fff;
    padding: 14px 24px;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr auto 1fr;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 16px;
  }
  .top-header .left,
  .top-header .right {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 14px;
  }
  .top-header .right { justify-content: flex-end; }

  .nav-btn {
    border: 1.5px solid #fff;
    background: transparent;
    color: #fff;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 13px;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    padding: 8px 14px;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    cursor: pointer;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }
  .nav-btn:hover { background: #fff; color: var(--black); }
  .nav-btn.cta { background: var(--yellow); color: var(--black); border-color: var(--yellow); }
  .nav-btn.cta:hover { background: #fff; border-color: #fff; }

  .icon-btn {
    background: transparent;
    border: none;
    color: #fff;
    cursor: pointer;
    padding: 6px;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
  }
  .icon-btn:hover { color: var(--yellow); }
  .icon-btn svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; }

  .logo {
    font-family: 'Bevan', 'Bookman Old Style', serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-style: normal;
    font-size: clamp(34px, 5vw, 58px);
    line-height: 1;
    color: #fff;
    letter-spacing: 0;
    white-space: nowrap;
    text-transform: none;
  }

  /* Yellow strip */
  .yellow-strip {
    background: var(--yellow);
    height: 8px;
  }

  /* ---------- THE BIG SUBMIT HERO ---------- */
  .submit-hero {
    background: var(--black);
    color: #fff;
    padding: 56px 24px 64px 24px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    border-bottom: 8px solid var(--yellow);
  }
  .submit-hero .inner {
    max-width: 1100px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1.4fr 1fr;
    gap: 56px;
    align-items: center;
  }
  .submit-hero .eyebrow {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 13px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 4px;
    color: var(--yellow);
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
    display: inline-block;
    border-bottom: 3px solid var(--yellow);
    padding-bottom: 4px;
  }
  .submit-hero h1 {
    font-family: 'Bevan', 'Bookman Old Style', serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: clamp(44px, 6.5vw, 84px);
    line-height: 0.95;
    margin-bottom: 18px;
    color: #fff;
    letter-spacing: -0.5px;
  }
  .submit-hero h1 .accent { color: var(--yellow); }
  .submit-hero .deck {
    font-size: 19px;
    line-height: 1.5;
    color: #e8e8e8;
    margin-bottom: 22px;
    max-width: 560px;
  }
  .submit-hero .deck strong { color: #fff; }

  .submit-hero .cta-row {
    display: flex;
    gap: 14px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    align-items: center;
  }
  .submit-hero .big-btn {
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    border: 3px solid var(--yellow);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 17px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    padding: 18px 28px;
    cursor: pointer;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    transition: transform 0.15s, background 0.15s;
  }
  .submit-hero .big-btn:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); background: #fff; border-color: #fff; }
  .submit-hero .big-btn .arrow { font-size: 22px; line-height: 0; }
  .submit-hero .note {
    color: #aaa;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
  }

  /* The "how-it-works" card */
  .how-card {
    background: #fff;
    color: var(--ink);
    padding: 26px 24px 22px 24px;
    position: relative;
    border-top: 6px solid var(--yellow);
  }
  .how-card::before {
    content: 'EXCLUSIVE';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 24px;
    transform: translateY(-50%);
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 12px;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    padding: 6px 12px;
  }
  .how-card h3 {
    font-family: 'Bevan', serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: 28px;
    line-height: 1.05;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    color: var(--ink);
  }
  .how-card ol {
    list-style: none;
    counter-reset: step;
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
  }
  .how-card ol li {
    counter-increment: step;
    padding: 10px 0 10px 42px;
    position: relative;
    font-size: 15px;
    line-height: 1.4;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .how-card ol li:first-child { border-top: none; padding-top: 6px; }
  .how-card ol li::before {
    content: counter(step);
    position: absolute;
    left: 0;
    top: 10px;
    width: 28px;
    height: 28px;
    background: var(--black);
    color: var(--yellow);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 14px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
  }
  .how-card .meta {
    margin-top: 14px;
    padding-top: 14px;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--line);
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    gap: 14px;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 12px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    color: var(--muted);
  }
  .how-card .meta strong { color: var(--ink); }

  /* ---------- Marquee of section labels ---------- */
  .label-strip {
    background: #fffbe0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
    padding: 12px 24px;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #333;
    text-align: center;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .label-strip span { margin: 0 14px; color: var(--ink); font-weight: 600; }
  .label-strip .dot { color: var(--yellow); font-weight: 900; }

  /* ---------- Sample headlines ---------- */
  .page {
    max-width: 1280px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 36px 24px 24px 24px;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 2fr) minmax(280px, 1fr);
    gap: 40px;
  }

  .hero { min-width: 0; }
  .section-title {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    font-size: 14px;
    border-top: 3px solid var(--black);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--black);
    padding: 8px 0;
    margin-bottom: 22px;
    color: var(--black);
  }
  .section-title .tag {
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    padding: 2px 8px;
    margin-right: 8px;
    font-size: 11px;
  }

  /* Lead story */
  .lead-story {
    margin-bottom: 36px;
    padding-bottom: 28px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .lead-story .kicker {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 13px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    color: var(--black);
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
    display: inline-block;
    border-bottom: 3px solid var(--yellow);
    padding-bottom: 2px;
  }
  .lead-story h2 {
    font-family: 'Anton', 'Oswald', Impact, sans-serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: clamp(46px, 6.5vw, 88px);
    line-height: 0.95;
    letter-spacing: -1px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }
  .lead-story .deck {
    font-size: 18px;
    font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 1.4;
    color: #222;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    max-width: 680px;
  }
  .lead-story .byline {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 12px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    color: var(--muted);
  }

  /* Story cards */
  .story-card {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 110px 1fr;
    gap: 18px;
    padding: 18px 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .story-card:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  .story-card .badge {
    width: 100%;
    aspect-ratio: 1 / 1;
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-family: 'Anton', sans-serif;
    font-size: 36px;
    line-height: 1;

  .story-card:nth-child(odd) .badge { background: var(--black); color: var(--yellow); }

  .story-card .body { min-width: 0; }

  .trending h3 {

  /* ---------- Footer ---------- */

  /* ---------- Floating submit popup ---------- */
  .submit-toggle {
    position: fixed;
    bottom: 24px;

    z-index: 50;
    background: var(--yellow);

    transition: transform 0.2s, background 0.2s;
  }
  .submit-toggle:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); background: #fff; }

  .submit-popup {
    position: fixed;

  .submit-popup.open { display: block; }
  @keyframes popIn {

    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }

  .submit-popup .popup-header {

  /* Thank-you state inside popup */
  .thanks {

  .thanks .stamp {
    display: inline-block;

  /* ---------- Responsive ---------- */
  @media (max-width: 980px) {
    .submit-hero .inner { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 32px; }
    .page { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 24px; }

    .top-header .left .nav-btn { display: none; }
  }
  @media (max-width: 560px) {
    .submit-popup { width: calc(100vw - 32px); right: 16px; bottom: 16px; }
    .submit-toggle { right: 16px; bottom: 16px; }
    .lead-story h2 { font-size: 40px; }
    .story-card { grid-template-columns: 80px 1fr; }
  }

  /* ---------- Admin overlay ---------- */
  .admin-overlay {
    display: none;
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    background: #f3f3f3;
    z-index: 100;
    overflow-y: auto;

  .admin-wrap { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 24px 60px; }
  .admin-header {

  .admin-section {
    background: #fff;

  }
  .admin-section p { font-size: 15px; color: #333; margin-bottom: 14px; line-height: 1.5; }

  }

  .admin-btn {
    display: inline-block;
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    border: 2px solid var(--black);

  .admin-note { font-size: 13px; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 12px; line-height: 1.5; }
  .admin-note.ok { color: #1a7a1a; }
  .admin-note.err { color: #b8000d; }
  .admin-toolbar {
    display: flex;
    gap: 10px;
    align-items: center;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    padding-bottom: 14px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);

  }
  .admin-toolbar #admin-user-label {

    margin-right: auto;
  }
  .admin-stats {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;

    margin-bottom: 14px;

  }

  .admin-table-wrap { overflow-x: auto; }
  .admin-table {
    width: 100%;

  }
  .admin-table th {
    background: var(--black);
    color: var(--yellow);

  }
  .admin-table tr:hover td { background: #fffce6; }

  .admin-table td:nth-child(2) { color: #b8000d; font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase; white-space: nowrap; }
  .admin-table td:nth-child(3) { font-weight: 700; min-width: 240px; }

  .admin-link { color: var(--yellow); text-decoration: none; margin-left: 8px; opacity: 0.6; }
