</main>

<footer>The Page 6 Party · <span class="yellow">May 25</span> · All The News That Fits, We Print <a href="#admin" class="admin-link">· Admin</a></footer>

<!-- Floating submit toggle -->
<button class="submit-toggle" id="submit-toggle" aria-label="Submit a headline">
  <span class="plus">+</span> Submit Your Headline
</button>

<!-- Floating submit popup -->
<aside class="submit-popup" id="submit-popup" role="dialog" aria-labelledby="popup-title">
  <div class="popup-header">
    <h3 id="popup-title">File a Tip</h3>
    <button class="close" id="popup-close" aria-label="Close">×</button>
  </div>
  <div class="popup-body" id="popup-body">
    <p class="intro">A scoop is a terrible thing to waste. Submissions stay private until the party.</p>
    <form id="headline-form" autocomplete="off">
      <label for="kicker">Section</label>
      <input type="text" id="kicker" placeholder="e.g. Gossip, Style, Scandal" maxlength="40" />

      <label for="headline">Headline*</label>
      <input type="text" id="headline" placeholder="Write a snappy headline…" maxlength="140" required />

      <label for="summary">Summary (optional)</label>
      <textarea id="summary" placeholder="A sentence or two of context…" maxlength="280"></textarea>

      <label for="byline">Your Byline*</label>
      <input type="text" id="byline" placeholder="By Jane Doe" maxlength="60" required />

      <button type="submit" class="send">Send To Press</button>
    </form>
  </div>
</aside>

<!-- Admin overlay (visible when URL hash is #admin) -->
<div class="admin-overlay" id="admin-overlay" aria-hidden="true">
  <div class="admin-wrap">
    <header class="admin-header">
      <h2>Page 6 · Admin</h2>
      <button class="admin-close" id="admin-close" aria-label="Close">×</button>
    </header>

    <div id="admin-login" class="admin-section">
      <p>Enter the admin password to see all submitted tips.</p>
      <form id="admin-login-form">
        <label for="admin-password">Password</label>
        <input type="password" id="admin-password" placeholder="••••••••" required autocomplete="current-password" />
        <button type="submit" class="admin-btn">Sign In</button>
      </form>
      <p class="admin-note" id="admin-login-msg"></p>
    </div>

    <div id="admin-view" class="admin-section" hidden>
      <div class="admin-toolbar">
        <span id="admin-user-label"></span>
        <button class="admin-btn-sm" id="admin-refresh">Refresh</button>
        <button class="admin-btn-sm" id="admin-export">Export CSV</button>
        <button class="admin-btn-sm" id="admin-signout">Sign Out</button>
      </div>
      <div class="admin-stats" id="admin-stats"></div>
      <div class="admin-table-wrap">
        <table class="admin-table" id="admin-table">
          <thead><tr><th>When</th><th>Section</th><th>Headline</th><th>Summary</th><th>Byline</th></tr></thead>
          <tbody></tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
  // -----------------------------------------------------------------
  // Backend lives in server.js (Express + Render Postgres).
  // The frontend just talks to relative URLs on the same host.
  // -----------------------------------------------------------------
  const API_BASE = '';   // same origin
  const ADMIN_TOKEN_KEY = 'page6.adminToken';

  const form = document.getElementById('headline-form');
  const popup = document.getElementById('submit-popup');
  const popupBody = document.getElementById('popup-body');
  const toggle = document.getElementById('submit-toggle');
  const closeBtn = document.getElementById('popup-close');
  const STORAGE_KEY = 'partyTimes.tips.v1';

  // All the buttons that should open the submission popup
  const openers = [
    document.getElementById('submit-toggle'),
    document.getElementById('submit-toggle-top'),
    document.getElementById('hero-submit-btn'),
    document.getElementById('sidebar-submit-btn')
  ];

  function openPopup() {
    popup.classList.add('open');
    toggle.style.display = 'none';
    // reset to form view in case it was thanked
    restoreForm();
    setTimeout(() => document.getElementById('headline').focus(), 50);
  }
  function closePopup() {
    popup.classList.remove('open');
    toggle.style.display = '';
  }

  openers.forEach(b => b && b.addEventListener('click', openPopup));
  closeBtn.addEventListener('click', closePopup);
  document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
    if (e.key === 'Escape' && popup.classList.contains('open')) closePopup();
  });

  // Save submission silently — does NOT appear on the page.
  // The host can retrieve these later from localStorage,
  // or by typing showTips() in the browser console.
  function saveTip(item) {
    let arr = [];
    try {
      const raw = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
      if (raw) arr = JSON.parse(raw);
    } catch (e) {}
    arr.push(item);
    try { localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(arr)); } catch (e) {}
  }

  // POST the tip to the Express backend. Returns true on success.
  async function sendTipToBackend(item) {
    try {
      const res = await fetch(API_BASE + '/api/tips', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          section: item.kicker || null,
          headline: item.headline,
          summary: item.summary || null,
          byline: item.byline
        })
      });
      if (!res.ok) console.warn('Tip submit failed:', res.status);
      return res.ok;
    } catch (e) {
      console.warn('Tip submit error:', e);
      return false;
    }
  }

  function showThanks() {
    popupBody.innerHTML = `
      <div class="thanks">
        <div class="stamp">Filed · Off The Record</div>
        <h4>Thanks for the tip.</h4>
        <p>Your headline is locked in the vault until the party on <strong>May 25</strong>.<br>The juiciest ones get read aloud.</p>
        <button class="again" id="submit-again">Submit Another</button>
      </div>
    `;
    document.getElementById('submit-again').addEventListener('click', restoreForm);
    setTimeout(() => {
      // Auto-close after a few seconds
      if (popup.classList.contains('open')) {
        // Keep open so they can submit another — do nothing on auto-close
      }
    }, 4000);
  }

  function restoreForm() {
    popupBody.innerHTML = `
      <p class="intro">A scoop is a terrible thing to waste. Submissions stay private until the party.</p>
      <form id="headline-form" autocomplete="off">
        <label for="kicker">Section</label>
        <input type="text" id="kicker" placeholder="e.g. Gossip, Style, Scandal" maxlength="40" />

        <label for="headline">Headline*</label>
        <input type="text" id="headline" placeholder="Write a snappy headline…" maxlength="140" required />

        <label for="summary">Summary (optional)</label>
        <textarea id="summary" placeholder="A sentence or two of context…" maxlength="280"></textarea>

        <label for="byline">Your Byline <span style="text-transform:none; letter-spacing:0; color:#999;">(optional — leave blank to stay anonymous)</span></label>
        <input type="text" id="byline" placeholder="By Jane Doe" maxlength="60" />

        <button type="submit" class="send">Send To Press</button>
      </form>
    `;
    bindForm();
  }

  function bindForm() {
    const f = document.getElementById('headline-form');
    if (!f) return;
    f.addEventListener('submit', (e) => {
      e.preventDefault();
      const headline = document.getElementById('headline').value.trim();
      let byline = document.getElementById('byline').value.trim();
      if (!headline) return;
      if (!byline) {
        byline = 'By Anonymous';
      } else if (!byline.toLowerCase().startsWith('by ')) {
        byline = 'By ' + byline;
      }
      const item = {
        kicker: document.getElementById('kicker').value.trim(),
        headline,
        summary: document.getElementById('summary').value.trim(),
        byline,
        ts: Date.now()
      };
      saveTip(item);                     // local backup on this device
      sendTipToBackend(item);            // fire-and-forget to Supabase
      showThanks();
    });
  }

  bindForm();

  // Host-only helper — open the browser console and run showTips()
  // to see every submission collected on this device.
  window.showTips = function () {
    try {
      const raw = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
      const arr = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : [];
      console.log('%cPage 6 — Submitted Tips (' + arr.length + ')', 'font-weight:bold; color:#f5d800; background:#000; padding:4px 8px;');
      console.table(arr.map(t => ({
        when: new Date(t.ts).toLocaleString(),
        section: t.kicker,
        headline: t.headline,
        summary: t.summary,
        byline: t.byline
      })));
      return arr;
    } catch (e) {
      console.error(e);
      return [];
    }
  };
  console.log('%cPage 6 host: type showTips() to see submissions saved on this device.', 'color:#666');

  // -----------------------------------------------------------------
  // ADMIN — hash-routed (#admin). Magic-link sign-in via Supabase.
  // -----------------------------------------------------------------
  const adminOverlay   = document.getElementById('admin-overlay');
  const adminLogin     = document.getElementById('admin-login');
  const adminView      = document.getElementById('admin-view');
  const adminMsg       = document.getElementById('admin-login-msg');
  const adminClose     = document.getElementById('admin-close');
  const adminTableBody = document.querySelector('#admin-table tbody');
  const adminStats     = document.getElementById('admin-stats');
  const adminUserLabel = document.getElementById('admin-user-label');

  function adminEscape(s) {
    return String(s == null ? '' : s)
      .replace(/&/g, '&').replace(/</g, '<').replace(/>/g, '>')
      .replace(/"/g, '"').replace(/'/g, ''');
  }

  function isAdminRoute() { return window.location.hash === '#admin'; }
  function openAdmin() {
    adminOverlay.classList.add('open');
    document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
    refreshAdminState();
  }
  function closeAdmin() {
    adminOverlay.classList.remove('open');
    document.body.style.overflow = '';
    if (window.location.hash === '#admin') {
      history.replaceState(null, '', window.location.pathname + window.location.search);
    }
  }
  adminClose.addEventListener('click', closeAdmin);
  window.addEventListener('hashchange', () => { if (isAdminRoute()) openAdmin(); });

  function getAdminToken() {
    try { return sessionStorage.getItem(ADMIN_TOKEN_KEY) || ''; } catch (e) { return ''; }
  }
  function setAdminToken(t) {
    try {
      if (t) sessionStorage.setItem(ADMIN_TOKEN_KEY, t);
      else sessionStorage.removeItem(ADMIN_TOKEN_KEY);
    } catch (e) {}
  }

  async function refreshAdminState() {
    const token = getAdminToken();
    if (!token) {
      adminLogin.hidden = false;
      adminView.hidden = true;
      return;
    }
    // Validate token by attempting to load tips.
    adminLogin.hidden = true;
    adminView.hidden = false;
    adminUserLabel.textContent = 'Signed in';
    const ok = await loadTips();
    if (!ok) {
      // Token rejected — kick back to login.
      setAdminToken('');
      adminLogin.hidden = false;
      adminView.hidden = true;
      adminMsg.className = 'admin-note err';
      adminMsg.textContent = 'Session expired. Sign in again.';
    }
  }

  document.getElementById('admin-login-form').addEventListener('submit', async (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    const password = document.getElementById('admin-password').value;
    adminMsg.className = 'admin-note';
    adminMsg.textContent = 'Signing in…';
    try {
      const res = await fetch(API_BASE + '/api/admin/login', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ password })
      });
      if (!res.ok) {
        adminMsg.className = 'admin-note err';
        adminMsg.textContent = res.status === 401 ? 'Wrong password.' : 'Login failed (' + res.status + ').';
        return;
      }
      const data = await res.json();
      if (data && data.token) {
        setAdminToken(data.token);
        document.getElementById('admin-password').value = '';
        adminMsg.textContent = '';
        refreshAdminState();
      } else {
        adminMsg.className = 'admin-note err';
        adminMsg.textContent = 'Login failed.';
      }
    } catch (err) {
      adminMsg.className = 'admin-note err';
      adminMsg.textContent = 'Network error: ' + err.message;
    }
  });

  let cachedTips = [];

  async function loadTips() {
    const token = getAdminToken();
    if (!token) return false;
    adminStats.textContent = 'Loading…';
    try {
      const res = await fetch(API_BASE + '/api/admin/tips', {
        headers: { 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + token }
      });
      if (!res.ok) {
        if (res.status === 401) return false;
        adminStats.innerHTML = 'Error: <strong>' + res.status + '</strong>';
        adminTableBody.innerHTML = '';
        return true;
      }
      const data = await res.json();
      cachedTips = (data && data.tips ? data.tips : []);
      renderTipsTable(cachedTips);
      return true;
    } catch (e) {
      adminStats.innerHTML = 'Network error: <strong>' + adminEscape(e.message) + '</strong>';
      adminTableBody.innerHTML = '';
      return true;
    }
  }

  function renderTipsTable(tips) {
    const total  = tips.length;
    const last24 = tips.filter(t => Date.now() - new Date(t.created_at).getTime() < 86400000).length;
    adminStats.innerHTML = 'Total submissions: <strong>' + total + '</strong> · Last 24h: <strong>' + last24 + '</strong>';
    adminTableBody.innerHTML = tips.length
      ? tips.map(t => '<tr>' +
          '<td>' + adminEscape(new Date(t.created_at).toLocaleString()) + '</td>' +
          '<td>' + adminEscape(t.section) + '</td>' +
          '<td>' + adminEscape(t.headline) + '</td>' +
          '<td>' + adminEscape(t.summary) + '</td>' +
          '<td>' + adminEscape(t.byline) + '</td>' +
        '</tr>').join('')
      : '<tr><td colspan="5" style="text-align:center;padding:32px;color:#999;font-style:italic;">No submissions yet.</td></tr>';
  }

  document.getElementById('admin-refresh').addEventListener('click', loadTips);
  document.getElementById('admin-signout').addEventListener('click', async () => {
    if (!sb) return;
    await sb.auth.signOut();
    refreshAdminState();
  });
  document.getElementById('admin-export').addEventListener('click', () => {
    const rows = [['When', 'Section', 'Headline', 'Summary', 'Byline']];
    cachedTips.forEach(t => rows.push([
      new Date(t.created_at).toISOString(),
      t.section || '',
      t.headline || '',
      t.summary || '',
      t.byline || ''
    ]));
    const csv = rows.map(r => r.map(c => '"' + String(c).replace(/"/g, '""') + '"').join(',')).join('\n');
    const blob = new Blob([csv], { type: 'text/csv;charset=utf-8' });
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const a = document.createElement('a');
    a.href = url;
    a.download = 'page6-tips-' + new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10) + '.csv';
    a.click();
    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
  });

  // React to magic-link redirect (Supabase parses the URL hash & fires a SIGNED_IN event)
  if (sb) {
    sb.auth.onAuthStateChange((event) => {
      if (event === 'SIGNED_IN' || event === 'SIGNED_OUT') {
        if (isAdminRoute()) refreshAdminState();
      }
    });
  }

  if (isAdminRoute()) openAdmin();
</script>
</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>

<title>The Page 6 Party · May 25</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Anton&family=Oswald:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,700;0,900;1,700;1,900&family=Bevan&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700;800;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --black: #0a0a0a;
    --yellow: #f5d800;
    --ink: #111;

    --line: #e6e6e6;

  }
  * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

  body {
    font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;

  }

  /* ---------- Top black header ---------- */

  .nav-btn {

    gap: 8px;
    cursor: pointer;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }
  .nav-btn:hover { background: #fff; color: var(--black); }
  .nav-btn.cta { background: var(--yellow); color: var(--black); border-color: var(--yellow); }
  .nav-btn.cta:hover { background: #fff; border-color: #fff; }

  .icon-btn {
    background: transparent;

    color: #fff;

    justify-content: center;
  }
  .icon-btn:hover { color: var(--yellow); }
  .icon-btn svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; }

  .logo {
    font-family: 'Bevan', 'Bookman Old Style', serif;
    font-weight: 400;

    font-size: clamp(34px, 5vw, 58px);

    color: #fff;

    white-space: nowrap;
    text-transform: none;
  }

  /* Yellow strip */
  .yellow-strip {
    background: var(--yellow);
    height: 8px;
  }

  /* ---------- THE BIG SUBMIT HERO ---------- */
  .submit-hero {
    background: var(--black);
    color: #fff;
    padding: 56px 24px 64px 24px;
    position: relative;

  }
  .submit-hero .inner {

  .submit-hero .eyebrow {

  .submit-hero h1 .accent { color: var(--yellow); }
  .submit-hero .deck {

  .submit-hero .cta-row {

  .submit-hero .big-btn {

  /* The "how-it-works" card */

  .how-card ol {

  .how-card ol li::before {

  /* ---------- Marquee of section labels ---------- */

  /* ---------- Sample headlines ---------- */

  .hero { min-width: 0; }

  /* Lead story */

  .trending-item:nth-child(even) .thumb { background: var(--yellow); color: var(--black); }

  .trending-item:nth-child(even) .thumb .views { background: var(--black); color: var(--yellow); }
  .trending-item h5 {

  /* ---------- Footer ---------- */
  footer {

  footer .yellow { color: var(--yellow); }

  /* ---------- Floating submit popup ---------- */
  .submit-toggle {

    background: var(--yellow);

    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;

  .submit-toggle:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); background: #fff; }
  .submit-toggle .plus { margin-right: 6px; }

  .submit-popup {
    position: fixed;
    bottom: 24px;

    width: 400px;
    max-width: calc(100vw - 48px);
    background: #fff;

    animation: popIn 0.2s ease-out;
  }
  .submit-popup.open { display: block; }
  @keyframes popIn {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(10px); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }

  .submit-popup .popup-header {
    background: var(--black);
    color: #fff;
    padding: 14px 18px;

    justify-content: space-between;

  .submit-popup .popup-header h3 {

  .submit-popup .close {

  .submit-popup .close:hover { color: var(--yellow); }
  .submit-popup .popup-body { padding: 18px 18px 20px 18px; }
  .submit-popup .intro {

  .submit-popup label {

  .submit-popup input[type="text"],

  .thanks .again {

    color: var(--black);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 12px;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    padding: 10px 16px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    cursor: pointer;
  }
  .thanks .again:hover { background: var(--black); color: var(--yellow); }

  /* ---------- Responsive ---------- */
  @media (max-width: 980px) {
    .submit-hero .inner { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 32px; }
    .page { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 24px; }
    .top-header { grid-template-columns: auto 1fr auto; gap: 8px; }
    .top-header .left .nav-btn { display: none; }
  }
  @media (max-width: 560px) {
    .submit-popup { width: calc(100vw - 32px); right: 16px; bottom: 16px; }
    .submit-toggle { right: 16px; bottom: 16px; }
    .lead-story h2 { font-size: 40px; }
    .story-card { grid-template-columns: 80px 1fr; }
  }

  /* ---------- Admin overlay ---------- */
  .admin-overlay {
    display: none;
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    background: #f3f3f3;
    z-index: 100;
    overflow-y: auto;
  }
  .admin-overlay.open { display: block; }
  .admin-wrap { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 24px 60px; }
  .admin-header {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    background: var(--black);
    color: #fff;
    padding: 16px 24px;
    margin: 0 -24px 24px -24px;
    border-bottom: 6px solid var(--yellow);
  }
  .admin-header h2 {
    font-family: 'Bevan', serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: 28px;
    color: #fff;
  }
  .admin-close {
    background: transparent;
    border: 1.5px solid #fff;
    color: #fff;
    width: 36px; height: 36px;
    font-size: 22px;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-family: serif;
    line-height: 1;
  }
  .admin-close:hover { background: var(--yellow); color: var(--black); border-color: var(--yellow); }
  .admin-section {
    background: #fff;
    padding: 28px;
    border: 1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .admin-section p { font-size: 15px; color: #333; margin-bottom: 14px; line-height: 1.5; }
  .admin-section label {
    display: block;
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 11px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    color: var(--muted);
    margin-bottom: 4px;
  }
  .admin-section input[type="email"] {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 360px;
    border: 1.5px solid var(--black);
    background: #fff;
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-size: 15px;
    padding: 10px 12px;
    outline: none;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
  }
  .admin-section input[type="email"]:focus { border-color: #b8000d; }
  .admin-btn {
    display: inline-block;
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--black);
    border: 2px solid var(--black);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 13px;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    padding: 11px 18px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    cursor: pointer;
  }
  .admin-btn:hover { background: var(--black); color: var(--yellow); }
  .admin-btn-sm {
    background: #fff;
    color: var(--black);
    border: 1.5px solid var(--black);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    padding: 6px 12px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    cursor: pointer;
  }
  .admin-btn-sm:hover { background: var(--black); color: var(--yellow); }
  .admin-note { font-size: 13px; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 12px; line-height: 1.5; }
  .admin-note.ok { color: #1a7a1a; }
  .admin-note.err { color: #b8000d; }
  .admin-toolbar {
    display: flex;
    gap: 10px;
    align-items: center;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    padding-bottom: 14px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
    margin-bottom: 18px;
  }
  .admin-toolbar #admin-user-label {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 12px;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    color: var(--muted);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-right: auto;
  }
  .admin-stats {
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-size: 13px;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
    color: var(--ink);
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }
  .admin-stats strong { color: #b8000d; }
  .admin-table-wrap { overflow-x: auto; }
  .admin-table {
    width: 100%;
    border-collapse: collapse;
    font-size: 14px;
  }
  .admin-table th {
    background: var(--black);
    color: var(--yellow);
    font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    font-size: 11px;
    padding: 10px 12px;
    text-align: left;
  }
  .admin-table td {
    padding: 12px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
    vertical-align: top;
    line-height: 1.4;
  }
  .admin-table tr:hover td { background: #fffce6; }
  .admin-table td:nth-child(1) { white-space: nowrap; color: var(--muted); font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; }
  .admin-table td:nth-child(2) { color: #b8000d; font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase; white-space: nowrap; }
  .admin-table td:nth-child(3) { font-weight: 700; min-width: 240px; }
  .admin-table td:nth-child(5) { white-space: nowrap; color: var(--muted); font-size: 12px; }
  .admin-link { color: var(--yellow); text-decoration: none; margin-left: 8px; opacity: 0.6; }
  .admin-link:hover { opacity: 1; text-decoration: underline; }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- THE BIG SUBMIT HERO -->

        Welcome to the <strong>Page 6 Party</strong>. This year, the gossip writes itself — because <strong>you write it.</strong>

        <li>Write a headline. The juicier, sillier, or more dramatic, the better.</li>

<!-- Sample headlines (static / decorative) -->
<main class="page">

</main>

<footer>The Page 6 Party · <span class="yellow">May 25</span> · All The News That Fits, We Print <a href="#admin" class="admin-link">· Admin</a></footer>

<!-- Floating submit toggle -->
<button class="submit-toggle" id="submit-toggle" aria-label="Submit a headline">
  <span class="plus">+</span> Submit Your Headline
</button>

<!-- Floating submit popup -->
<aside class="submit-popup" id="submit-popup" role="dialog" aria-labelledby="popup-title">
  <div class="popup-header">
    <h3 id="popup-title">File a Tip</h3>

  </div>

    <form id="headline-form" autocomplete="off">
      <label for="kicker">Section</label>
      <input type="text" id="kicker" placeholder="e.g. Gossip, Style, Scandal" maxlength="40" />

      <label for="headline">Headline*</label>

      <label for="summary">Summary (optional)</label>
      <textarea id="summary" placeholder="A sentence or two of context…" maxlength="280"></textarea>

      <label for="byline">Your Byline*</label>
      <input type="text" id="byline" placeholder="By Jane Doe" maxlength="60" required />

      <button type="submit" class="send">Send To Press</button>
    </form>
  </div>
</aside>

<!-- Admin overlay (visible when URL hash is #admin) -->
<div class="admin-overlay" id="admin-overlay" aria-hidden="true">
  <div class="admin-wrap">
    <header class="admin-header">
      <h2>Page 6 · Admin</h2>
      <button class="admin-close" id="admin-close" aria-label="Close">×</button>
    </header>

    <div id="admin-login" class="admin-section">
      <p>Enter the admin password to see all submitted tips.</p>
      <form id="admin-login-form">
        <label for="admin-password">Password</label>
        <input type="password" id="admin-password" placeholder="••••••••" required autocomplete="current-password" />
        <button type="submit" class="admin-btn">Sign In</button>
      </form>
      <p class="admin-note" id="admin-login-msg"></p>
    </div>

    <div id="admin-view" class="admin-section" hidden>
      <div class="admin-toolbar">
        <span id="admin-user-label"></span>
        <button class="admin-btn-sm" id="admin-refresh">Refresh</button>
        <button class="admin-btn-sm" id="admin-export">Export CSV</button>
        <button class="admin-btn-sm" id="admin-signout">Sign Out</button>
      </div>
      <div class="admin-stats" id="admin-stats"></div>
      <div class="admin-table-wrap">
        <table class="admin-table" id="admin-table">
          <thead><tr><th>When</th><th>Section</th><th>Headline</th><th>Summary</th><th>Byline</th></tr></thead>
          <tbody></tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
  // -----------------------------------------------------------------
  // Backend lives in server.js (Express + Render Postgres).
  // The frontend just talks to relative URLs on the same host.
  // -----------------------------------------------------------------
  const API_BASE = '';   // same origin
  const ADMIN_TOKEN_KEY = 'page6.adminToken';

  const form = document.getElementById('headline-form');
  const popup = document.getElementById('submit-popup');
  const popupBody = document.getElementById('popup-body');
  const toggle = document.getElementById('submit-toggle');
  const closeBtn = document.getElementById('popup-close');
  const STORAGE_KEY = 'partyTimes.tips.v1';

  // All the buttons that should open the submission popup
  const openers = [
    document.getElementById('submit-toggle'),
    document.getElementById('submit-toggle-top'),
    document.getElementById('hero-submit-btn'),
    document.getElementById('sidebar-submit-btn')
  ];

  function openPopup() {
    popup.classList.add('open');
    toggle.style.display = 'none';
    // reset to form view in case it was thanked
    restoreForm();
    setTimeout(() => document.getElementById('headline').focus(), 50);
  }
  function closePopup() {
    popup.classList.remove('open');
    toggle.style.display = '';
  }

  openers.forEach(b => b && b.addEventListener('click', openPopup));
  closeBtn.addEventListener('click', closePopup);
  document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
    if (e.key === 'Escape' && popup.classList.contains('open')) closePopup();
  });

  // Save submission silently — does NOT appear on the page.
  // The host can retrieve these later from localStorage,
  // or by typing showTips() in the browser console.
  function saveTip(item) {
    let arr = [];
    try {
      const raw = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
      if (raw) arr = JSON.parse(raw);
    } catch (e) {}
    arr.push(item);
    try { localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(arr)); } catch (e) {}
  }

  // POST the tip to the Express backend. Returns true on success.
  async function sendTipToBackend(item) {
    try {
      const res = await fetch(API_BASE + '/api/tips', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          section: item.kicker || null,
          headline: item.headline,
          summary: item.summary || null,
          byline: item.byline
        })
      });
      if (!res.ok) console.warn('Tip submit failed:', res.status);
      return res.ok;
    } catch (e) {
      console.warn('Tip submit error:', e);
      return false;
    }
  }

  function showThanks() {
    popupBody.innerHTML = `
      <div class="thanks">
        <div class="stamp">Filed · Off The Record</div>
        <h4>Thanks for the tip.</h4>
        <p>Your headline is locked in the vault until the party on <strong>May 25</strong>.<br>The juiciest ones get read aloud.</p>
        <button class="again" id="submit-again">Submit Another</button>
      </div>
    `;
    document.getElementById('submit-again').addEventListener('click', restoreForm);
    setTimeout(() => {
      // Auto-close after a few seconds
      if (popup.classList.contains('open')) {
        // Keep open so they can submit another — do nothing on auto-close
      }
    }, 4000);
  }

  function restoreForm() {
    popupBody.innerHTML = `
      <p class="intro">A scoop is a terrible thing to waste. Submissions stay private until the party.</p>
      <form id="headline-form" autocomplete="off">
        <label for="kicker">Section</label>
        <input type="text" id="kicker" placeholder="e.g. Gossip, Style, Scandal" maxlength="40" />

        <label for="headline">Headline*</label>
        <input type="text" id="headline" placeholder="Write a snappy headline…" maxlength="140" required />

        <label for="summary">Summary (optional)</label>
        <textarea id="summary" placeholder="A sentence or two of context…" maxlength="280"></textarea>

        <label for="byline">Your Byline <span style="text-transform:none; letter-spacing:0; color:#999;">(optional — leave blank to stay anonymous)</span></label>
        <input type="text" id="byline" placeholder="By Jane Doe" maxlength="60" />

        <button type="submit" class="send">Send To Press</button>
      </form>
    `;
    bindForm();
  }

  function bindForm() {
    const f = document.getElementById('headline-form');
    if (!f) return;
    f.addEventListener('submit', (e) => {
      e.preventDefault();
      const headline = document.getElementById('headline').value.trim();
      let byline = document.getElementById('byline').value.trim();
      if (!headline) return;
      if (!byline) {
        byline = 'By Anonymous';
      } else if (!byline.toLowerCase().startsWith('by ')) {
        byline = 'By ' + byline;
      }
      const item = {
        kicker: document.getElementById('kicker').value.trim(),
        headline,
        summary: document.getElementById('summary').value.trim(),
        byline,
        ts: Date.now()
      };
      saveTip(item);                     // local backup on this device
      sendTipToBackend(item);            // fire-and-forget to Supabase
      showThanks();
    });
  }

  bindForm();

  // Host-only helper — open the browser console and run showTips()
  // to see every submission collected on this device.
  window.showTips = function () {
    try {
      const raw = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
      const arr = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : [];
      console.log('%cPage 6 — Submitted Tips (' + arr.length + ')', 'font-weight:bold; color:#f5d800; background:#000; padding:4px 8px;');
      console.table(arr.map(t => ({
        when: new Date(t.ts).toLocaleString(),
        section: t.kicker,
        headline: t.headline,
        summary: t.summary,
        byline: t.byline
      })));
      return arr;
    } catch (e) {
      console.error(e);
      return [];
    }
  };
  console.log('%cPage 6 host: type showTips() to see submissions saved on this device.', 'color:#666');

  // -----------------------------------------------------------------
  // ADMIN — hash-routed (#admin). Magic-link sign-in via Supabase.
  // -----------------------------------------------------------------
  const adminOverlay   = document.getElementById('admin-overlay');
  const adminLogin     = document.getElementById('admin-login');
  const adminView      = document.getElementById('admin-view');
  const adminMsg       = document.getElementById('admin-login-msg');
  const adminClose     = document.getElementById('admin-close');
  const adminTableBody = document.querySelector('#admin-table tbody');
  const adminStats     = document.getElementById('admin-stats');
  const adminUserLabel = document.getElementById('admin-user-label');

  function adminEscape(s) {
    return String(s == null ? '' : s)
      .replace(/&/g, '&').replace(/</g, '<').replace(/>/g, '>')
      .replace(/"/g, '"').replace(/'/g, ''');
  }

  function isAdminRoute() { return window.location.hash === '#admin'; }
  function openAdmin() {
    adminOverlay.classList.add('open');
    document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
    refreshAdminState();
  }
  function closeAdmin() {
    adminOverlay.classList.remove('open');
    document.body.style.overflow = '';
    if (window.location.hash === '#admin') {
      history.replaceState(null, '', window.location.pathname + window.location.search);
    }
  }
  adminClose.addEventListener('click', closeAdmin);
  window.addEventListener('hashchange', () => { if (isAdminRoute()) openAdmin(); });

  function getAdminToken() {
    try { return sessionStorage.getItem(ADMIN_TOKEN_KEY) || ''; } catch (e) { return ''; }
  }
  function setAdminToken(t) {
    try {
      if (t) sessionStorage.setItem(ADMIN_TOKEN_KEY, t);
      else sessionStorage.removeItem(ADMIN_TOKEN_KEY);
    } catch (e) {}
  }

  async function refreshAdminState() {
    const token = getAdminToken();
    if (!token) {
      adminLogin.hidden = false;
      adminView.hidden = true;
      return;
    }
    // Validate token by attempting to load tips.
    adminLogin.hidden = true;
    adminView.hidden = false;
    adminUserLabel.textContent = 'Signed in';
    const ok = await loadTips();
    if (!ok) {
      // Token rejected — kick back to login.
      setAdminToken('');
      adminLogin.hidden = false;
      adminView.hidden = true;
      adminMsg.className = 'admin-note err';
      adminMsg.textContent = 'Session expired. Sign in again.';
    }
  }

  document.getElementById('admin-login-form').addEventListener('submit', async (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    const password = document.getElementById('admin-password').value;
    adminMsg.className = 'admin-note';
    adminMsg.textContent = 'Signing in…';
    try {
      const res = await fetch(API_BASE + '/api/admin/login', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ password })
      });
      if (!res.ok) {
        adminMsg.className = 'admin-note err';
        adminMsg.textContent = res.status === 401 ? 'Wrong password.' : 'Login failed (' + res.status + ').';
        return;
      }
      const data = await res.json();
      if (data && data.token) {
        setAdminToken(data.token);
        document.getElementById('admin-password').value = '';
        adminMsg.textContent = '';
        refreshAdminState();
      } else {
        adminMsg.className = 'admin-note err';
        adminMsg.textContent = 'Login failed.';
      }
    } catch (err) {
      adminMsg.className = 'admin-note err';
      adminMsg.textContent = 'Network error: ' + err.message;
    }
  });

  let cachedTips = [];

  async function loadTips() {
    const token = getAdminToken();
    if (!token) return false;
    adminStats.textContent = 'Loading…';
    try {
      const res = await fetch(API_BASE + '/api/admin/tips', {
        headers: { 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + token }
      });
      if (!res.ok) {
        if (res.status === 401) return false;
        adminStats.innerHTML = 'Error: <strong>' + res.status + '</strong>';
        adminTableBody.innerHTML = '';
        return true;
      }
      const data = await res.json();
      cachedTips = (data && data.tips ? data.tips : []);
      renderTipsTable(cachedTips);
      return true;
    } catch (e) {
      adminStats.innerHTML = 'Network error: <strong>' + adminEscape(e.message) + '</strong>';
      adminTableBody.innerHTML = '';
      return true;
    }
  }

  function renderTipsTable(tips) {
    const total  = tips.length;
    const last24 = tips.filter(t => Date.now() - new Date(t.created_at).getTime() < 86400000).length;
    adminStats.innerHTML = 'Total submissions: <strong>' + total + '</strong> · Last 24h: <strong>' + last24 + '</strong>';
    adminTableBody.innerHTML = tips.length
      ? tips.map(t => '<tr>' +
          '<td>' + adminEscape(new Date(t.created_at).toLocaleString()) + '</td>' +
          '<td>' + adminEscape(t.section) + '</td>' +
          '<td>' + adminEscape(t.headline) + '</td>' +
          '<td>' + adminEscape(t.summary) + '</td>' +
          '<td>' + adminEscape(t.byline) + '</td>' +
        '</tr>').join('')
      : '<tr><td colspan="5" style="text-align:center;padding:32px;color:#999;font-style:italic;">No submissions yet.</td></tr>';
  }

  document.getElementById('admin-refresh').addEventListener('click', loadTips);
  document.getElementById('admin-signout').addEventListener('click', () => {
    setAdminToken('');
    refreshAdminState();
  });
  document.getElementById('admin-export').addEventListener('click', () => {
    const rows = [['When', 'Section', 'Headline', 'Summary', 'Byline']];
    cachedTips.forEach(t => rows.push([
      new Date(t.created_at).toISOString(),
      t.section || '',
      t.headline || '',
      t.summary || '',
      t.byline || ''
    ]));
    const csv = rows.map(r => r.map(c => '"' + String(c).replace(/"/g, '""') + '"').join(',')).join('\n');
    const blob = new Blob([csv], { type: 'text/csv;charset=utf-8' });
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const a = document.createElement('a');
    a.href = url;
    a.download = 'page6-tips-' + new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10) + '.csv';
    a.click();
    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
  });

  // React to magic-link redirect (Supabase parses the URL hash & fires a SIGNED_IN event)
  if (sb) {
    sb.auth.onAuthStateChange((event) => {
      if (event === 'SIGNED_IN' || event === 'SIGNED_OUT') {
        if (isAdminRoute()) refreshAdminState();
      }
    });
  }

  if (isAdminRoute()) openAdmin();
</script>
</body>
</html>

[View server.js](computer:///Users/sebastian/Library/Application Support/Claude/local-agent-mode-sessions/89cbab50-0fb3-4368-941c-4a9db031e0ba/e9e996a0-ad85-4a19-8e56-fc4c6ccf761c/local_e947efda-5e19-4502-ab2b-d0a9b213d26c/outputs/server.js)
[View package.json](computer:///Users/sebastian/Library/Application Support/Claude/local-agent-mode-sessions/89cbab50-0fb3-4368-941c-4a9db031e0ba/e9e996a0-ad85-4a19-8e56-fc4c6ccf761c/local_e947efda-5e19-4502-ab2b-d0a9b213d26c/outputs/package.json)
[View render.yaml](computer:///Users/sebastian/Library/Application Support/Claude/local-agent-mode-sessions/89cbab50-0fb3-4368-941c-4a9db031e0ba/e9e996a0-ad85-4a19-8e56-fc4c6ccf761c/local_e947efda-5e19-4502-ab2b-d0a9b213d26c/outputs/render.yaml)
[View README.md](computer:///Users/sebastian/Library/Application Support/Claude/local-agent-mode-sessions/89cbab50-0fb3-4368-941c-4a9db031e0ba/e9e996a0-ad85-4a19-8e56-fc4c6ccf761c/local_e947efda-5e19-4502-ab2b-d0a9b213d26c/outputs/README.md)

**What's in the folder**

`index.html` (the party site, now points to the new backend), `server.js` (a tiny Express server with two public endpoints — `POST /api/tips` to take submissions and `POST /api/admin/login` + `GET /api/admin/tips` for the admin), `package.json`, `render.yaml` (the Render Blueprint that creates the web service and the free Postgres database in one go), `.gitignore`, and a `README.md` with the same instructions as below.

**Steps to get it live**

First, push to GitHub. Open a terminal in the outputs folder and run:

```bash
cd "/Users/sebastian/Library/Application Support/Claude/local-agent-mode-sessions/89cbab50-0fb3-4368-941c-4a9db031e0ba/e9e996a0-ad85-4a19-8e56-fc4c6ccf761c/local_e947efda-5e19-4502-ab2b-d0a9b213d26c/outputs"
git init
git add .
git commit -m "Initial commit"
git branch -M main
```

Create an empty repo on github.com (no README, no .gitignore — leave it bare), then run:

```bash
git remote add origin git@github.com:YOUR-USERNAME/page-six-party.git
git push -u origin main
```

Second, deploy on Render. Go to [dashboard.render.com/blueprints](https://dashboard.render.com/blueprints), click **New Blueprint Instance**, connect your GitHub account, and pick the repo. Render reads `render.yaml` and proposes a web service plus a free Postgres database — approve, and the first deploy takes about three minutes.

Third, grab your admin password. Once it's up, click into the web service in Render's dashboard, open the **Environment** tab, and reveal the `ADMIN_PASSWORD` value (it was auto-generated). Copy it somewhere safe — that's how you'll sign in to the admin view.

Fourth, try it. Open `https://YOUR-SERVICE-NAME.onrender.com` (Render shows you the URL on the service page), submit a test headline, then visit the same URL with `#admin` appended, paste your password in, and the table should show the test entry. The admin view has Refresh, Export CSV, and Sign Out buttons.

**Two things to know about the free tier**

The web service sleeps after 15 minutes of inactivity — the first request after sleep takes ~30 seconds to wake. Visit your URL five minutes before guests arrive to pre-warm it, or upgrade to the $7/month plan if that's annoying. The free Postgres database expires 90 days after creation; the party on May 25 is well inside that window, but export to CSV after the party so you don't lose the submissions.

Want me to also lock the API so submissions only come from your deployed domain (basic CORS hardening), or add rate-limiting in case someone gets too enthusiastic with the submit button?

content.text:
Two things happened:

First, `git branch -M main` got concatenated with the next command (missing line break), so the rename never ran — but that's harmless because your branch was already called `main` (you can see it in the commit output: `[main (root-commit) 913e864]`).

Second, and this is the real issue: you set the remote to the literal string `YOUR-USERNAME` instead of your actual GitHub username, and you don't have an SSH key set up with GitHub on this Mac. That's why the push fails with "Permission denied (publickey)".

The smoothest fix is GitHub's official CLI — it creates the repo and pushes for you, and handles auth through your browser. Run these in your terminal:

```bash
brew install gh
gh auth login
```

When `gh auth login` runs, pick **GitHub.com**, then **HTTPS**, then **Login with a web browser**. It shows you a one-time code, opens your browser, you paste the code, click authorize. Done. Then from the same `outputs` folder:

```bash
git remote remove origin
gh repo create page-six-party --public --source=. --remote=origin --push
```

That creates the repo on GitHub *and* pushes your code in one command. If you'd rather it be private, swap `--public` for `--private`.

If you don't want to install `gh`, the manual path is: go to [github.com/new](https://github.com/new), name the repo `page-six-party`, leave every checkbox unchecked (no README, no .gitignore, no license), hit Create. Then back in terminal:

```bash
git remote set-url origin https://github.com/YOUR-ACTUAL-USERNAME/page-six-party.git
git push -u origin main
```

When prompted for a password, GitHub no longer accepts your account password from CLI — you need a [Personal Access Token](https://github.com/settings/tokens) (classic tokens with `repo` scope work). The CLI path avoids that entirely, which is why I'd lean toward it.

Let me know which path you take and what happens.

content.text:
Skip the CLI route entirely — for a clean machine like yours, **GitHub Desktop** is the path of least resistance. It's a GUI app that handles auth, repo creation, and pushing in a few clicks. No homebrew, no tokens, no terminal.

Steps:

1. Download GitHub Desktop from [desktop.github.com](https://desktop.github.com) and install it (drag to Applications, open).
2. Sign in to your GitHub account when it prompts (it opens a browser, you authorize, done).
3. In GitHub Desktop: **File → Add Local Repository…**, then navigate to and choose this folder:
   ```
   /Users/sebastian/Library/Application Support/Claude/local-agent-mode-sessions/89cbab50-0fb3-4368-941c-4a9db031e0ba/e9e996a0-ad85-4a19-8e56-fc4c6ccf761c/local_e947efda-5e19-4502-ab2b-d0a9b213d26c/outputs
   ```
   It'll recognize the existing git repo and load your commit.
4. Click the big blue **Publish repository** button at the top. A dialog asks for the repo name (keep `page-six-party`), description, and whether it should be private. Uncheck "Keep this code private" if you want it public. Click Publish.

That's it — your code is on GitHub. Once it's up, go to [dashboard.render.com/blueprints](https://dashboard.render.com/blueprints) and follow the deploy steps from before.

If you'd rather stay in the terminal, the all-terminal alternative is a Personal Access Token: go to [github.com/settings/tokens](https://github.com/settings/tokens?type=beta), generate a fine-grained token with read/write access to your repos (1-week expiration is fine for this), create an empty repo at [github.com/new](https://github.com/new) named `page-six-party`, then run:

```bash
git remote set-url origin https://github.com/YOUR-ACTUAL-USERNAME/page-six-party.git
git push -u origin main
```

When prompted for a password, paste the token. But honestly GitHub Desktop is faster.

No worries — let's skip the terminal tools entirely. There's a way to do this through your browser with no installs and no commands. Three things, in order.

**Thing 1: Reveal your project folder in Finder**

In the same Terminal window you're already in, type this and hit Enter:

```
open .
```

A Finder window will pop up showing the six files (index.html, server.js, package.json, render.yaml, README.md, .gitignore). Keep that window open.

**Thing 2: Put the files on GitHub via the website**

In your browser:

1. Go to [github.com](https://github.com) and sign in (or sign up — it's free).
2. Click the green **New** button (top left, or visit [github.com/new](https://github.com/new) directly).
3. Repository name: `page-six-party`. Leave every other field alone — don't tick "Add a README," "Add .gitignore," or "Add a license." Click the green **Create repository** button at the bottom.
4. The next page has a row of options. Look for the link that says **"uploading an existing file"** and click it.
5. Drag the six files from your Finder window into the box in the browser that says "Drag files here." Wait a moment for them to upload.
6. Scroll down, type "Initial commit" in the message box, and click the green **Commit changes** button.

Your code is now on GitHub. You'll see all six files listed on the repo page.

**Thing 3: Deploy it on Render**

1. Go to [dashboard.render.com](https://dashboard.render.com) and sign up with your GitHub account (one click).
2. After signing in, go to [dashboard.render.com/blueprints](https://dashboard.render.com/blueprints).
3. Click **New Blueprint Instance**.
4. It asks to connect your GitHub repos — say yes, and pick the `page-six-party` repo you just created.
5. Render reads the `render.yaml` file automatically and shows what it'll build (one web service + one Postgres database, both free). Click **Apply**.
6. Wait ~3 minutes while it builds. You'll see progress logs.

When it's done, click on the "page-six-party" web service in your Render dashboard. The URL is shown at the top — something like `https://page-six-party-abcd.onrender.com`. That's your live site.

For the admin password: still in the web service page, click the **Environment** tab on the left, find `ADMIN_PASSWORD`, click the eye icon to reveal it, copy it somewhere safe.

To check the admin view: open `https://page-six-party-abcd.onrender.com/#admin` in your browser, paste the password, sign in.

Tell me where you get stuck and I'll talk you through it.
